title: Equivariant Many-body Message Passing Interatomic Potentials for Magnetic Materials
abstract: Magnetism governs key properties of materials used in energy, data storage, and spintronic technologies, yet its complex coupling to lattice and electronic degrees of freedom challenges conventional first-principles approaches. We introduce an equivariant message-passing graph neural network that embeds atomic magnetic moments as explicit degrees of freedom, enabling the learning of magnetic interactions beyond collinear approximations. The model learns physically consistent and transferable representations of magnetic behaviour and can incorporate spin-orbit coupling, achieving near density-functional-theory accuracy with strong data efficiency across diverse magnetic systems by fine-tuning from a pre-trained model. Applications to structural transformations, finite-temperature magnetic phenomena, and materials screening for strongly spin-orbit coupled materials demonstrate transferable magnetic behaviour, establishing a practical foundation for data-driven, high-throughput discovery of complex magnetic materials.
zh_abstract: 磁学主导着能源、数据存储和自旋电子技术所用材料的关键性质，然而其与晶格和电子自由度之间的复杂耦合对传统第一性原理方法提出了挑战。我们提出了一种等变消息传递图神经网络，将原子磁矩作为显式自由度嵌入，从而能够学习超越共线近似的磁相互作用。该模型学习到物理一致且可迁移的磁行为表示，并可纳入自旋轨道耦合，通过预训练模型的微调，在多种磁体系中以强大的数据效率实现了接近密度泛函理论的精度。在结构转变、有限温度磁现象以及强自旋轨道耦合材料的筛选等应用场景中，该模型展现了可迁移的磁行为表征能力，为数据驱动的复杂磁性材料高通量发现奠定了实用基础。

title: Equivariant Efficient Joint Discrete and Continuous MeanFlow for Molecular Graph Generation
abstract: Graph-structured data jointly contain discrete topology and continuous geometry, which poses fundamental challenges for generative modeling due to heterogeneous distributions, incompatible noise dynamics, and the need for equivariant inductive biases. Existing flow-matching approaches for graph generation typically decouple structure from geometry, lack synchronized cross-domain dynamics, and rely on iterative sampling, often resulting in physically inconsistent molecular conformations and slow sampling. To address these limitations, we propose Equivariant MeanFlow (EQUIMF), a unified SE(3)-equivariant generative framework that jointly models discrete and continuous components through synchronized MeanFlow dynamics. EQUIMF introduces a unified time bridge and average-velocity updates with mutual conditioning between structure and geometry, enabling efficient few-step generation while preserving physical consistency. Moreover, we develop a novel discrete MeanFlow formulation with a simple yet effective parameterization to support efficient generation over discrete graph structures. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EQUIMF consistently outperforms prior diffusion and flow-matching methods in generation quality, physical validity, and sampling efficiency.
zh_abstract: 图结构数据同时包含离散的拓扑结构和连续的几何特征，这给生成建模带来了根本性挑战，原因在于其分布具有异质性、噪声动态不兼容，以及需要等变的归纳偏置。现有的图生成流匹配方法通常将结构与几何解耦，缺乏同步的跨域动态，并依赖于迭代采样，这常常导致物理上不一致的分子构象和缓慢的采样速度。为解决这些局限，我们提出了等变均值流（EQUIMF），一个统一的SE(3)-等变生成框架，通过同步的均值流动动态对离散和连续分量进行联合建模。EQUIMF引入了统一的时间桥接以及结构与几何之间相互条件化的平均速度更新机制，从而在保持物理一致性的同时实现高效的多步生成。此外，我们开发了一种新颖的离散均值流公式，采用简单而有效的参数化方法，以支持在离散图结构上的高效生成。大量实验表明，EQUIMF在生成质量、物理有效性和采样效率方面持续优于先前的扩散模型和流匹配方法。
introduction:
Graph generation has become a central problem in modern machine learning, with broad applications in chemistry, biology, material science, and network analysis~. 

Recent years have witnessed rapid progress in generative models for graphs, enabling the synthesis of complex relational structures with increasing fidelity and diversity.


 Graph-structured data is inherently discrete at its core: nodes and edges correspond to categorical entities and relational types, respectively. Accordingly, a prominent body of research centers on discrete graph generation, where the primary goal is to model probability distributions over valid node-edge configurations. Most existing methods leverage diffusion-based or flow-based frameworks—paradigms that enable principled likelihood-based training and improved scalability for large-scale graph dat. For example ~ proposed discrete-time discrete-state graph diffusion models. Subsequent works ~ {Xu2024DiSco,Siraudin2024Cometh} extended this line of research to continuous-time discrete-state graph diffusion. More recently, discrete flow-based graph generation models ~ have emerged, which are specifically designed to mitigate the computational inefficiencies inherent to graph diffusion models.  

 For many real-world applications, including molecular generation, graph structure alone is insufficient: incorporating 3D geometric information has been shown to significantly improve generation quality, validity, and downstream performance, and equivariant architectures can further ensure geometric consistency under rigid transformations. However, existing flow and diffusion models~ for discrete-continuous molecular generation often decouple topology from geometry, lacking cross-modal synchronized dynamics and inductive biases. This leads to physically inconsistent conformations and slow sampling, hindering their iterative generation process.

 To address these drawbacks, we propose Equivariant MeanFlow (EQUIMF), a unified generative framewor
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新：提出了一种统一且SE(3)等变的平均流（MeanFlow）框架（EQUIMF），通过同步的跨域动力学和相互条件作用，首次在连续时间流匹配范式下实现了离散图拓扑与连续几何的联合高效生成。

2. 关键结论：(1) 所提EQUIMF框架通过统一的“时间桥”和平均速度更新机制，实现了离散结构与连续几何的同步、条件化生成动力学；(2) 该框架设计了一种新颖的离散平均流参数化方法，支持对离散图结构进行高效采样；(3) 实验表明，该方法在生成质量、物理有效性和采样效率上均优于现有的扩散模型和流匹配方法。

3. 专家点评：该工作的核心价值在于系统性地解决了分子图生成中离散与连续变量联合建模的动力学同步与物理一致性问题，其提出的统一平均流框架是一个重要的理论进展。然而，摘要和引言中强调的“物理一致性”和“高效采样”缺乏在结论部分的具体量化证据（如与力场计算的匹配度、采样步数的具体对比），且未讨论该方法对大型复杂生物分子（如蛋白质）或周期性材料体系的泛化能力，这些是评估其实际应用潜力的关键。

title: Explicit Electric Potential-Embedded Machine Learning Framework: A Unified Description from Atomic to Electronic Scales
abstract: To further develop accurate and large-scale simulations of electrochemical interfaces, we propose a unified explicit electric potential framework to simultaneously predict atomic forces and electron density distributions. The framework consists of three components: data generation, model training, and application. The data generation component, implemented in Hy-DFT, efficiently regulates the potential during constant-potential ab initio molecular dynamics (CP-AIMD), reducing the number of single-point calculations required for convergence. The model training component includes two modules: Potential-Embedded MACE (PE-MACE) and Potential-Embedded Electron Density Prediction (PE-EDP). PE-MACE implements an explicit electric potential machine learning force field (EEP-MLFF) based on the MACE architecture. We develop PE-EDP to overcome the limitation of EEP-MLFF in describing atom forces. PE-EDP, also based on equivariant graph neural networks, predicts electron density distributions under arbitrary potentials. Using the Pt(111)/water interface as a model system, both PE-MACE and PE-EDP show high accuracy on training and test sets. Radial distribution functions from CP-MLMD agree well with CP-AIMD, and long-timescale simulations reveal potential-induced reorganization of interfacial water. Planar-integrated charge profiles and Bader analysis from PE-EDP are consistent with DFT results. These results demonstrate that the framework can simultaneously describe atomic dynamics and electron density distributions under arbitrary potentials, providing a useful tool for studying electrochemical interfaces.
zh_abstract: 为进一步发展电化学界面的精确大规模模拟，我们提出一个统一的显式电势框架，用于同时预测原子力和电子密度分布。该框架包含三个组成部分：数据生成、模型训练与应用。数据生成模块在Hy-DFT中实现，能够在恒电势从头算分子动力学（CP-AIMD）过程中高效调控电势，减少收敛所需的单点计算次数。模型训练部分包含两个模块：电势嵌入MACE（PE-MACE）与电势嵌入电子密度预测（PE-EDP）。PE-MACE基于MACE架构实现了显式电势机器学习力场（EEP-MLFF）。我们开发PE-EDP以克服EEP-MLFF在描述原子力方面的局限。PE-EDP同样基于等变图神经网络，可预测任意电势下的电子密度分布。以Pt(111)/水界面为模型体系，PE-MACE与PE-EDP在训练集和测试集上均表现出高精度。CP-MLMD计算得到的径向分布函数与CP-AIMD结果高度吻合，长时程模拟揭示了电势诱导的界面水分子重组。PE-EDP获得的平面积分电荷分布与Bader分析结果均与密度泛函理论（DFT）计算结果一致。这些结果表明该框架能够同时描述任意电势下的原子动力学与电子密度分布，为研究电化学界面提供了有力工具。
introduction:
Electrified solid–liquid interfaces are central to a wide range of electrochemical processes, especially electrocatalysis and rechargeable batteries where the interactions between electrode surfaces, explicit solvent structure, and electric potential determine the device performance or the overall efficiency and selectivity of electrochemical reactions.  However, because experimental characterization under operating conditions demands sophisticated in situ and operando techniques, these complex coupling mechanism remains poorly understood. Consequently, accurate theoretical modeling of electrochemical interfaces under operando conditions has become essential for elucidating interfacial reaction mechanisms and optimizing device performance. 
	
	Recently, grand canonical density functional theory (GC-DFT) based on the implicit solvation model for electrochemical systems has experienced significant development and widespread application. 
	Despite these advances, conventional implicit solvation approaches such as VASPsol's linear polarizable continuum model (LPCM) rely on purely local cavity definitions that ignore the finite size of water molecules and solvated ions,
	which can lead to unphysical penetration of cavity into regions too small to accommodate an entire water molecule or solvated ion in some case. 
	The phenomenon is commonly refered as "solvent leakage" in hybrid explicit-implicit solvation model.
	The recently developed VASPsol++ package employed a nonlocal definition of cavity functions to effectively mitigate the "solvent leakage", while incorporating nonlinear responses, facilitating more accurate and realistic investigations of the charged electrochemical interfaces, especially in constant-potential AIMD (CP-AIMD) simulation.
	
	However, DFT's computational cost severely limits large-scale and long-timescale simulations. Machine learning force fields (MLFFs) have been developed to overcome these computational bottlenecks.
	
	
	
	
	
	
	
	
	
	
	
	
	Sev
conclusion:
In conclusion, we have presented a unified potential-embedded machine learning framework that combines three components for simulating electrochemical interfaces at both the atomic and electronic levels.
Hy\_DFT performs constant-potential ab initio molecular dynamics and automatically generates training data with the electric potential embedded as a scalar field attribute.
PE-MACE and PE-EDP, two decoupled equivariant graph neural network models sharing the same early fusion potential embedding strategy, predict atomic forces and real-space electron densities, respectively, under arbitrary electric potential conditions.
 
Using the Pt(111)/water interface as a test system, the PE-MACE model achieves an energy RMSE of 1.8 meV/atom and a force RMSE of 12.3 meV/ on the test set.
Radial distribution functions from CP-MLMD trajectories agree well with CP-AIMD references at three electric potentials.
Long-time (4~ns) CP-MLMD simulations reveal the potential-induced reorientation of interface water molecules, with the dipole orientation distribution shifting systematically toward the H-down configuration at negative electric potentials, consistent with previously reported trends.
The PE-EDP model achieves an NMAE of 0.848\


The Supporting Information is available free of charge.

	 SI.pdf: 
		Computation details of DFT calculations, the structure and parameters of the neural network for the machine-learning model, as well as the parameters for implementing MD simulations.
		Supplementary Figures and Tables.
		
	




This work was supported by the National Key Research and Development Programs of China (2022YFA1503103, 2023YFA1506902) and the National Natural Science Foundation of China NSF (Grand No. 22073041). We thank the High Performance Computing Center of Nanjing University for computational resources.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一个将外电场电势作为显式标量场嵌入图神经网络架构的统一机器学习框架，能够同时、高效地预测任意电势下电化学界面的原子动力学与实空间电子密度分布。

2. 关键结论: (1) 该框架成功将电势作为图节点特征进行早期融合，使得机器学习势函数（PE-MACE）和电子密度预测模型（PE-EDP）能泛化至训练数据未覆盖的电势条件；(2) 在Pt(111)/水模型体系上，基于该框架的恒电势机器学习分子动力学模拟结果与第一性原理参考数据高度吻合，并能揭示电势诱导的界面水分子重组等长时程现象；(3) PE-EDP模型预测的平面平均电荷分布和Bader电荷分析与DFT结果一致，验证了框架在电子尺度描述的可靠性。

3. 专家点评: 本工作代表了从传统“黑箱”机器学习势函数向可解释、多尺度电化学建模的重要迈进，其“电势嵌入”策略巧妙地解决了可变电荷体系模拟的核心挑战。然而，其当前验证仅限于相对简单的Pt/水界面，该框架在更复杂的电催化反应环境（如存在吸附中间体、离子特异性效应）中的迁移性和准确性仍需系统检验。此外，PE-MACE与PE-EDP模型的“解耦”训练虽然高效，但可能忽略了力与电子密度之间更深刻的相互依赖关系，这或许是未来实现完全自洽、电荷平衡的下一代模型的关键方向。

title: Machine learning Hamiltonian enables scalable and accurate defect calculations: The case of oxygen vacancies in amorphous SiO$_2$
abstract: Point defects critically influence the properties of materials and devices, yet density functional theory (DFT) remains computationally demanding for defect supercell calculations. Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) offer high efficiency but require extensive datasets. MLIPs trained only on defect configurations in small supercells exhibit systematic energy errors in larger supercells, demonstrating limited transferability. Here, we present a machine learning Hamiltonian (MLH) model-based method for calculating total energies and atomic forces in defect supercells with linear-scaling computational cost, enabling efficient structural relaxation and accurate formation energy predictions. We take oxygen vacancies in amorphous SiO$_2$ as an example and train the MLH model on defect configurations in 95-atom supercells, with the training data derived from 120 self-consistent field calculations and 12 structural relaxations. The MLH model enables efficient structural relaxations for host (defect-free) and defect systems in larger supercells, avoiding the systematic energy errors observed in MLIPs. The cancellation of energy errors between host and defect systems yields accurate formation energy predictions, with deviations from DFT below 50 meV. The proposed method holds significant potential for defect simulations in complex materials.
zh_abstract: 点缺陷对材料和器件的性质具有关键影响，但密度泛函理论（DFT）在缺陷超胞计算中仍然计算成本高昂。机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）虽能提供高效计算，但需要大量数据集。仅在小超胞的缺陷构型上训练的MLIPs在更大超胞中会表现出系统性能量误差，显示出有限的迁移性。本文提出一种基于机器学习哈密顿量（MLH）模型的方法，用于计算缺陷超胞中的总能量和原子力，其计算成本呈线性标度，从而能够实现高效的结构弛豫和精确的形成能预测。我们以非晶SiO$_2$中的氧空位为例，在95个原子的超胞缺陷构型上训练MLH模型，训练数据来源于120个自洽场计算和12个结构弛豫。该MLH模型能够在更大超胞中对宿主（无缺陷）和缺陷系统进行高效的结构弛豫，避免了在MLIPs中观察到的系统性能量误差。宿主与缺陷系统之间能量误差的抵消带来了精确的形成能预测，与DFT结果的偏差低于50 meV。所提出的方法在复杂材料的缺陷模拟中具有重要潜力。
introduction:
Amorphous materials play a vital role in microelectronic and optoelectronic devices, yet their performance is strongly affected by point defects~. Oxygen vacancies (V$_$) in amorphous SiO$_2$ (a-SiO$_2$), for instance, introduce defect states that act as carrier traps, lead to bias temperature instability, and enhance leakage current, degrading device performance and reliability~.
While experimental techniques such as deep-level transient spectroscopy and electron paramagnetic resonance are widely used for defect characterization, revealing the microscopic nature of defects in materials remains challenging owing to their diversity and structural complexity.
Currently, ab initio methods based on density functional theory (DFT) have become essential tools for investigating point defects, with calculations typically employing supercells with hundreds of atoms.
However, the self-consistent field (SCF) iteration in DFT is computationally expensive for defect supercell calculations, severely limiting the scale and efficiency of simulations.
To accurately capture the statistical behavior of defects in amorphous materials, extensive sampling of defect sites is required, which further raises the computational cost.
Therefore, developing a method that maintains first-principles accuracy while efficiently predicting defect properties holds significant importance.

To achieve this goal, combining machine learning methods with DFT has emerged as a promising approach.
In recent years, machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs)~
have been increasingly applied in the study of point defects, including high-throughput defect screening~, 
potential energy surface exploration~,
investigations of defect formation and migration mechanisms~,
and simulations of defect evolution during the irradiation damage process
.

However, the application of MLIPs to point defects still faces challenges.
First, training MLIPs requires large datasets, which rely on extensive first-principles calcul
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种基于机器学习哈密顿量模型的线性标度计算方法，有效解决了传统机器学习势函数在缺陷大超胞计算中存在的系统性能量误差问题，实现了高效且精确的缺陷形成能预测。
2. 关键结论: 该方法仅需在小超胞（95原子）的缺陷构型上进行训练，即可将其泛化至大超胞体系，实现线性标度的结构弛豫；模型在宿主与缺陷体系间的能量误差能够相互抵消，使得最终缺陷形成能的计算偏差低于50 meV，达到接近DFT的精度。
3. 专家点评: 这项工作为解决缺陷计算中精度与效率的矛盾提供了一个极具前景的新范式，其核心思想——利用误差相消策略来获得高精度的相对能量——巧妙且实用。然而，该方法的普适性仍需在更多样的缺陷类型（如间隙原子、替位缺陷）和更复杂的材料体系（如含过渡金属、强电子关联体系）中进行验证，以评估其训练数据生成策略和模型泛化能力的边界。此外，文中未详细讨论该方法对于带电缺陷或涉及强局域电子态（如极化子）等更复杂情况的适用性，这是其迈向广泛应用前必须回答的关键问题。

title: Making Room for AI: Multi-GPU Molecular Dynamics with Deep Potentials in GROMACS
abstract: GROMACS is a de-facto standard for classical Molecular Dynamics (MD). The rise of AI-driven interatomic potentials that pursue near-quantum accuracy at MD throughput now poses a significant challenge: embedding neural-network inference into multi-GPU simulations retaining high-performance. In this work, we integrate the MLIP framework DeePMD-kit into GROMACS, enabling domain-decomposed, GPU-accelerated inference across multi-node systems. We extend the GROMACS NNPot interface with a DeePMD backend, and we introduce a domain decomposition layer decoupled from the main simulation. The inference is executed concurrently on all processes, with two MPI collectives used each step to broadcast coordinates and to aggregate and redistribute forces. We train an in-house DPA-1 model (1.6 M parameters) on a dataset of solvated protein fragments. We validate the implementation on a small protein system, then we benchmark the GROMACS-DeePMD integration with a 15,668 atom protein on NVIDIA A100 and AMD MI250x GPUs up to 32 devices. Strong-scaling efficiency reaches 66% at 16 devices and 40% at 32; weak-scaling efficiency is 80% to 16 devices and reaches 48% (MI250x) and 40% (A100) at 32 devices. Profiling with the ROCm System profiler shows that >90% of the wall time is spent in DeePMD inference, while MPI collectives contribute <10%, primarily since they act as a global synchronization point. The principal bottlenecks are the irreducible ghost-atom cost set by the cutoff radius, confirmed by a simple throughput model, and load imbalance across ranks. These results demonstrate that production MD with near ab initio fidelity is feasible at scale in GROMACS.
zh_abstract: GROMACS是经典分子动力学模拟的事实标准。当前，AI驱动的原子间势函数在保持分子动力学计算通量的同时追求接近量子精度的趋势，带来了一个重大挑战：如何将神经网络推理嵌入多GPU模拟并维持高性能。本研究将机器学习势函数框架DeePMD-kit集成至GROMACS，实现了跨多节点系统的域分解式GPU加速推理。我们通过开发DeePMD后端扩展了GROMACS的NNPot接口，并引入独立于主模拟流程的域分解层。推理过程在所有进程上并行执行，每步通过两次MPI集合操作广播坐标并汇总再分配作用力。我们基于溶剂化蛋白质片段数据集训练了自主研发的DPA-1模型（160万个参数）。首先在小型蛋白质体系验证实现正确性，随后在NVIDIA A100和AMD MI250x GPU集群（最多32个设备）上对包含15,668个原子的蛋白质体系进行GROMACS-DeePMD集成性能基准测试。强扩展效率在16设备时达66%，32设备时为40%；弱扩展效率在16设备时达80%，32设备时分别为48%（MI250x）和40%（A100）。ROCm系统性能分析表明>90%的壁时间用于DeePMD推理，而MPI集合通信耗时<10%——主要因其作为全局同步点。关键瓶颈在于截止半径决定的不可约幽灵原子计算开销（经简易吞吐量模型验证）及跨进程负载不均衡。这些结果表明，在GROMACS中实现接近第一性原理精度的生产级分子动力学模拟具备大规模可行性。
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 将DeePMD-kit深度势能模型与GROMACS的经典分子动力学引擎深度集成，实现了在保持高性能和强/弱可扩展性的前提下，于多节点、多GPU系统上进行基于AI势的规模化分子动力学模拟。

2. 关键结论: (1) 通过设计解耦的域分解层和协调的MPI通信策略，成功将神经网络推理嵌入到GROMACS的多GPU并行框架中；(2) 在多达32个GPU（A100/MI250x）上的基准测试表明，该集成方案在强扩展和弱扩展方面均展现出可接受的并行效率，证明了其大规模应用的可行性；(3) 性能分析指出，主要瓶颈来自由截断半径决定的、不可缩减的“幽灵原子”通信开销，以及进程间的负载不均衡。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作具有重要的工程实践意义，它弥合了前沿AI势方法与主流高性能计算软件之间的鸿沟，为在生物大分子体系中进行“生产级”的、接近量子精度的分子动力学模拟铺平了道路。然而，其核心贡献更多在于系统集成与性能工程，而非算法或模型本身的突破。文中指出的“幽灵原子”开销是此类基于短程截断的并行化方法的固有局限，未来性能的进一步提升可能需要探索更高效的通信策略或模型架构。此外，所展示的并行效率在32个GPU时已降至40%-48%，这暗示了在更大规模扩展时可能面临的挑战。

title: From Paper to Program: A Multi-Stage LLM-Assisted Workflow for Accelerating Quantum Many-Body Algorithm Development
abstract: Translating quantum many-body theory into scalable software traditionally requires months of effort. Zero-shot generation of tensor network algorithms by Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently fails due to spatial reasoning errors and memory bottlenecks. We resolve this using a multi-stage workflow that mimics a physics research group. By generating a mathematically rigorous LaTeX specification as an intermediate blueprint, we constrain the coding LLM to produce exact, matrix-free $\mathcal{O}(D^3)$ operations. We validate this approach by generating a Density-Matrix Renormalization Group (DMRG) engine that accurately captures the critical entanglement scaling of the Spin-$1/2$ Heisenberg model and the symmetry-protected topological (SPT) order of the Spin-$1$ AKLT model. Testing across 16 combinations of leading foundation models yielded a 100\% success rate. By compressing a months-long development cycle into under 24 hours ($\sim 14$ active hours), this framework offers a highly reproducible paradigm for accelerating computational physics research.
zh_abstract: 将量子多体理论转化为可扩展的软件传统上需要数月努力。大型语言模型（LLMs）对张量网络算法的零样本生成常因空间推理错误和内存瓶颈而失败。我们通过模拟物理学研究小组的多阶段工作流程解决了这一问题。通过生成数学上严谨的LaTeX规范作为中间蓝图，我们约束编码LLM以生成精确的、无矩阵的$\mathcal{O}(D^3)$运算。我们通过生成一个密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）引擎验证了该方法，该引擎准确捕捉了Spin-$1/2$海森堡模型的临界纠缠标度以及Spin-$1$ AKLT模型的对称保护拓扑（SPT）序。在16种领先基础模型的组合测试中实现了100%的成功率。通过将长达数月的开发周期压缩至24小时内（约14个活跃小时），该框架为加速计算物理研究提供了一个高度可复现的范式。
introduction:
The numerical simulation of strongly correlated quantum many-body systems has been fundamentally transformed by the advent of tensor network methods . In one spatial dimension, the Density-Matrix Renormalization Group (DMRG) algorithm  and the associated Matrix Product State (MPS) formalism  provide an essentially exact description of both critical and gapped quantum phases. However, translating the abstract, diagrammatic mathematics of tensor network theory into explicit, high-performance array operations remains a formidable challenge. 
	
	Developing a production-ready DMRG codebase from scratch traditionally requires months of dedicated graduate-level effort. The difficulty lies not in the conceptual physics, but in the stringent demands of computational implementation: researchers must meticulously track multi-dimensional array indices during tensor contractions (e.g., via ), manage gauge degrees of freedom to maintain canonical forms, and bypass severe $(D^4)$ memory blowups by designing matrix-free iterative eigensolvers (where $D$ is the virtual bond dimension). Consequently, there is a steep learning curve that bottlenecks the rapid prototyping of new algorithms and tensor geometries.
	
	Simultaneously, the rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has revolutionized general-purpose software engineering. Foundation models can now generate, debug, and refactor code for web development and data science with remarkable proficiency. Yet, when applied to computational physics, these models frequently stumble. Zero-shot attempts to generate tensor network algorithms directly from theoretical literature typically result in ``hallucinatory'' code. Because LLMs lack intrinsic spatial reasoning, they frequently output mismatched tensor legs, fail to distinguish between complex conjugation and conjugate transposition, or propose naive dense-matrix contractions that instantly exhaust system memory. Thus, a direct ``Paper to Program'' translation using isol
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种多阶段LLM辅助工作流，通过生成严格的LaTeX数学规范作为中间蓝图，将高维空间推理与代码生成解耦，从而可靠地将复杂的量子多体理论转化为精确、高效的矩阵自由算法实现。

2. 关键结论: (1) 通过模拟物理学研究小组的分工协作模式，将“论文到程序”的翻译过程分解为数学规范生成和约束性代码生成两个关键阶段，有效解决了LLM在空间推理和内存管理上的固有缺陷；(2) 该方法在16种领先的基础模型组合上实现了100%的成功率，能够生成精确捕捉自旋模型临界纠缠标度行为和对称保护拓扑序的DMRG引擎；(3) 该框架将传统上长达数月的开发周期压缩至24小时以内，为计算物理研究提供了一种高度可重复的快速原型开发范式。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作为解决LLM在复杂科学计算领域应用的核心瓶颈（即数学严谨性与算法效率）提供了极具洞察力的工程方案，其“规范先行”的思路具有向其他计算科学领域推广的潜力。然而，该工作流的成功目前严重依赖于对目标算法（如DMRG）的深刻理解以构建有效的提示和验证流程，其通用性尚未在更广泛或更前沿的张量网络算法中得到充分检验。此外，虽然生成了功能正确的代码，但关于生成代码的最终计算性能（如与高度优化的手工代码相比）及其在更大规模问题上的可扩展性，仍需进一步的基准测试和分析。

title: KappaFormer: Physics-aware Transformer for lattice thermal conductivity via cross-domain transfer learning
abstract: Machine learning has been widely used for predicting material properties. However, efficient prediction of lattice thermal conductivity ($κ_\mathrm{L}$) remains a long-standing challenge, primarily due to the scarcity of high-quality training data. Here we introduce KappaFormer, a physics-aware Transformer architecture that embeds the harmonic-anharmonic decomposition of $κ_\mathrm{L}$ within the network. KappaFormer comprises a harmonic branch pre-trained on large-scale elastic property data and an anharmonic branch fine-tuned on limited experimental $κ_\mathrm{L}$ data, enabling effective knowledge transfer and enhanced generalization. High-throughput screening with KappaFormer identifies multiple candidates with ultralow $κ_\mathrm{L}$, which are further confirmed by first-principles calculations. Physics interpretability further elucidates the vibrational mechanisms governing thermal transport suppression, linking structural motifs to strong anharmonicity. This study provides a generalizable framework for physics-guided machine learning to accelerate the discovery of new materials.
zh_abstract: 机器学习已被广泛用于预测材料性质。然而，晶格热导率（$κ_\mathrm{L}$）的高效预测仍是一个长期存在的挑战，这主要是由于高质量训练数据的稀缺。本文提出KappaFormer，一种物理感知的Transformer架构，该架构将$κ_\mathrm{L}$的谐波-非谐波分解嵌入到网络中。KappaFormer包含一个基于大规模弹性性质数据预训练的谐波分支，以及一个在有限实验$κ_\mathrm{L}$数据上微调的非谐波分支，从而实现有效的知识迁移和增强的泛化能力。利用KappaFormer进行高通量筛选，识别出多个具有超低$κ_\mathrm{L}$的候选材料，并进一步通过第一性原理计算得到验证。物理可解释性进一步阐明了主导热输运抑制的振动机制，将结构基元与强非谐性联系起来。本研究为物理引导的机器学习提供了一个可推广的框架，以加速新材料的发现。

title: ADEPT-PolyGraphMT: Automated Molecular Simulation and Multi-Task Multi-Fidelity Machine Learning for Polymer Property Generation and Prediction
abstract: The discovery of polymers with targeted properties is challenged by the vast chemical design space and the limited availability of consistent, high-quality data across multiple properties. In this work, an integrated polymer informatics framework is presented that combines the Automated molecular Dynamics Engine for Polymer simulaTions (ADEPT) workflow with multi-task and multi-fidelity machine learning (PolyGraphMT). Polymer repeat units are represented as molecular graphs and processed using a graph neural network to learn structure-property relationships. Starting from SMILES representations for monomers, ADEPT automates the construction of atomistic models and the evaluation of their properties using molecular dynamics simulations and density functional theory calculations. The simulation data are combined with curated experimental data and group contribution theory estimates to construct a unified dataset of approximately 62,000 polymer property values spanning 28 properties. Using this dataset, inter-property correlations are analyzed, and multi-task learning strategies are evaluated for joint property prediction. The results show that multi-task models achieve performance comparable to single-task models in data-rich regimes and exhibit superior accuracy as training data become limited. In addition, fidelity-aware training improves predictive accuracy when combining experimental and computational data sources. The trained models are further applied to large-scale property prediction for polymers in the PolyInfo database and the PI1M virtual polymer library, producing physically consistent property distributions across a broad chemical space. Overall, the proposed framework provides a structured approach for scalable prediction and screening of polymer properties across multiple property types and data fidelity levels.
zh_abstract: 具有目标性能的聚合物发现面临着巨大的化学设计空间和跨多性能一致、高质量数据可用性有限的挑战。本研究提出了一种集成的聚合物信息学框架，该框架将自动化聚合物模拟分子动力学引擎工作流与多任务、多保真度机器学习相结合。聚合物重复单元被表示为分子图，并使用图神经网络进行处理以学习结构-性能关系。从单体的SMILES表示出发，ADEPT工作流自动化构建原子模型，并利用分子动力学模拟和密度泛函理论计算评估其性能。模拟数据与精选的实验数据以及基团贡献理论估算值相结合，构建了一个包含约62,000个聚合物性能值的统一数据集，涵盖28种性能。利用该数据集，分析了性能间的相关性，并评估了用于联合性能预测的多任务学习策略。结果表明，在数据丰富的场景下，多任务模型达到了与单任务模型相当的性能，并且在训练数据有限时表现出更优的准确性。此外，当结合实验和计算数据源时，保真度感知训练提高了预测准确性。训练后的模型进一步应用于PolyInfo数据库和PI1M虚拟聚合物库中聚合物的大规模性能预测，在广阔的化学空间内产生了物理性质一致的性能分布。总体而言，所提出的框架为跨多种性能类型和数据保真度水平的聚合物性能的可扩展预测与筛选提供了一种结构化方法。
introduction:
Polymers occupy a central role in modern materials science due to their exceptional chemical diversity and tunability across thermal, mechanical, transport, and electronic properties~. This versatility underpins applications ranging from structural materials and membranes to energy storage, electronics, and biomedical devices~. At the same time, identifying polymers with targeted combinations of properties remains a fundamental challenge, as the accessible chemical space is effectively unbounded and experimental characterization is both time-consuming and property-specific~.

Data availability is a central requirement for materials informatics, as machine learning (ML) models rely critically on the quality, quantity, and diversity of training data~. In inorganic materials science and small-molecule chemistry, large open databases derived from high-throughput first-principles calculations and curated experimental measurements, such as the Materials Project, AFLOW, OQMD, and QM9, have played a decisive role in advancing data-driven materials discovery . In the polymer domain, dedicated databases such as PolyInfo and Polymer Genome have enabled important progress by compiling experimental measurements and first-principles data for selected properties . While these databases have enabled important progress in polymer informatics, the underlying data remain highly sparse and heterogeneous. For most polymers, only a limited number of properties are reported, often measured under different processing histories, molecular weights, and testing conditions.
In addition, recent studies have demonstrated the feasibility of high-throughput molecular dynamics (MD) workflows for generating polymer property data at scale~. However, these efforts typically target a narrow set of properties and datasets, ranging from hundreds to a few thousand polymers, and are often generated using study-specific protocols. As a result, polymer property data remain fragmented, with limited multi-prop
conclusion:
In this work, an integrated polymer informatics framework is presented that combines physics-based data generation with data-driven modeling for the prediction of polymer properties. The ADEPT workflow enables automated evaluation of polymer properties from repeat-unit SMILES, using MD and DFT to compute thermal, mechanical, transport, structural, and electronic descriptors consistently. When combined with experimentally curated measurements and GC estimates, this approach results in a heterogeneous dataset of approximately 62,000 property values spanning multiple property classes and data fidelity levels.

Using this dataset, inter-property correlations are quantified to assess the suitability of joint learning across targets. The results show that the effectiveness of multi-task learning depends on task-relatedness, with correlation-informed groupings providing more consistent improvements than uniform task aggregation. The analysis further indicates that multi-task learning improves data efficiency, with performance differences between single-task and multi-task models becoming more pronounced as the available training data are reduced. In addition, fidelity-aware training strategies improve predictive accuracy when combining experimental and computational data by balancing broad coverage from lower-fidelity sources with stronger supervision from experimental measurements.

The trained models are subsequently applied to large-scale property prediction for polymers in the PolyInfo database and the PI1M virtual polymer library. The resulting property distributions remain physically reasonable and reflect trends observed in experimentally characterized polymers, supporting the use of the models for systematic screening across extended chemical spaces.

Overall, the results demonstrate that integrating simulation-derived data, experimental measurements, and ML within a unified framework provides a practical approach for multi-property polymer prediction. The proposed
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 构建了一个将自动化分子模拟（ADEPT）与多任务多保真度机器学习（PolyGraphMT）相结合的集成框架，以统一、可扩展的方式生成和预测多种聚合物性质，并系统性地评估了数据保真度与任务相关性对模型性能的影响。

2. 关键结论: (1) 通过整合自动化模拟数据、实验数据和基团贡献法估算，构建了一个包含约62,000个数据点、覆盖28种性质的异构数据集，解决了聚合物数据稀疏和异质性的关键瓶颈；(2) 多任务学习在数据有限时表现出优于单任务模型的性能，但其有效性高度依赖于任务间的相关性，基于相关性分析的任务分组策略比统一聚合更优；(3) 保真度感知训练能够有效融合不同来源（如计算与实验）和质量的数据，提升预测准确性；(4) 将该框架应用于大型虚拟库（如PI1M）的预测，生成了在广阔化学空间内物理性质一致的聚合物性质分布。

3. 专家点评: 本工作代表了聚合物信息学向系统化、规模化发展的重要一步，其核心价值在于提供了一个从数据生成到模型构建的完整、自动化流程框架，而非单一方法的改进。然而，其局限性在于，自动化模拟（MD/DFT）的精度和适用范围固有地限制了所生成数据的“保真度”，对于强依赖于长程有序结构、复杂动力学或特定化学反应的性能，该框架的预测能力可能不足。未来工作的关键是将此框架与主动学习或实验设计闭环结合，以迭代地验证和提升高价值化学空间的预测可靠性。

title: MatClaw: An Autonomous Code-First LLM Agent for End-to-End Materials Exploration
abstract: Existing LLM agents for computational materials science are constrained by pipeline-bounded architectures tied to specific simulation codes and by dependence on manually written tool functions that grow with task scope. We present MatClaw, a code-first agent that writes and executes Python directly, composing any installed domain library to orchestrate multi-code workflows on remote HPC clusters without predefined tool functions. To sustain coherent execution across multi-day workflows, MatClaw uses a four-layer memory architecture that prevents progressive context loss, and retrieval-augmented generation over domain source code that raises per-step API-call accuracy to ${\sim}$99 %. Three end-to-end demonstrations on ferroelectric CuInP2S6 (machine-learning force field training via active learning, Curie temperature prediction, and heuristic parameter-space search) reveal that the agent handles code generation reliably but struggles with tacit domain knowledge. The missing knowledge, such as appropriate simulation timescales, equilibration protocols, and sampling strategies, is the kind that researchers accumulate through experience but rarely formalize. Two lightweight interventions, literature self-learning and expert-specified constraints, bridge these gaps, defining a guided autonomy model in which the researcher provides high-level domain knowledge while the agent handles workflow execution. Our results demonstrate that the gap between guided and fully autonomous computational materials research is narrower than ever before: LLMs already handle code generation and scientific interpretation reliably, and the rapid improvement in their capabilities will accelerate materials discovery beyond what manual workflows can achieve. All code and benchmarks are open-source.
zh_abstract: 现有用于计算材料科学的大语言模型智能体受限于两大制约：一是其流水线式架构通常与特定模拟代码绑定，二是依赖手动编写的工具函数，这些函数会随任务范围扩大而不断增多。本文提出MatClaw，一个以代码为先的智能体，它能够直接编写并执行Python代码，组合调用任何已安装的领域库，从而在远程高性能计算集群上协调多代码工作流，无需预定义工具函数。为维持跨数日工作流的连贯执行，MatClaw采用四层记忆架构以防止渐进式上下文丢失，并结合基于领域源代码的检索增强生成技术，将单步API调用的准确率提升至约99%。通过铁电材料CuInP2S6的三个端到端演示（基于主动学习的机器学习力场训练、居里温度预测和启发式参数空间搜索），我们发现该智能体在代码生成方面表现可靠，但在处理隐性领域知识时存在困难。这些缺失的知识——例如合适的模拟时间尺度、平衡化方案和采样策略——正是研究人员通过经验积累却很少形式化的内容。我们采用两种轻量级干预方法（文献自学习和专家指定约束）来弥合这些差距，定义了一种“引导式自主”模型：研究者提供高层领域知识，而智能体负责工作流执行。我们的结果表明，引导式自主与完全自主的计算材料研究之间的差距比以往任何时候都更小：大语言模型已能可靠处理代码生成和科学解释，其能力的快速提升将推动材料发现超越手动工作流所能达到的极限。所有代码与基准测试均已开源。

title: Meta-optimization of maximally-localized Wannier functions
abstract: Maximally-localized Wannier functions are quantum wavefunctions resembling atomic orbitals that are used to describe electrons in condensed matter. Since their introduction in 1997, these functions have become ubiquitous in ab initio materials simulations, including applications in linear-scaling methods, strongly-correlated electron systems, quantum transport, electron-phonon interactions, and topological materials. Despite their widespread adoption in a vast software ecosystem, Wannier functions have not yet attained their fullest potential in the presence of entangled bands, as their optimization remains challenging and labor-intensive. Here, we introduce a universal meta-optimization method that leverages workflow abstraction and machine learning techniques like differential evolution and Bayesian optimization to generate globally optimized Wannier functions without human intervention. We demonstrate this approach through three applications: (i) autonomous interpolation of entangled band structures with millielectronvolt accuracy starting from coarse Brillouin zone grids, (ii) thousand-fold acceleration of fully ab initio Boltzmann transport calculations via the use of minimal coarse Brillouin zone grids, and (iii) ultra-fast high-throughput calculations of high-precision Wannier functions for large materials libraries. This work brings calculations that previously required supercomputers within the reach of personal computers.
zh_abstract: 最大局域化Wannier函数是一种类似于原子轨道的量子波函数，用于描述凝聚态物质中的电子行为。自1997年提出以来，这类函数在第一性原理材料模拟中已变得无处不在，其应用涵盖线性标度方法、强关联电子系统、量子输运、电子-声子相互作用以及拓扑材料等领域。尽管Wannier函数已在庞大的软件生态系统中被广泛采用，但在涉及纠缠能带的情况下，其潜力尚未得到充分发挥，因为相关优化过程仍然具有挑战性且需耗费大量人力。本文提出一种通用的元优化方法，该方法利用工作流抽象化以及差分进化和贝叶斯优化等机器学习技术，无需人工干预即可生成全局最优的Wannier函数。我们通过三个应用案例展示了该方法的效果：（i）从粗糙的布里渊区网格出发，以毫电子伏精度自主插值纠缠能带结构；（ii）通过使用最小化的粗糙布里渊区网格，将全第一性原理玻尔兹曼输运计算加速上千倍；（iii）针对大型材料库实现超快速高通量的高精度Wannier函数计算。此项工作使得以往需要超级计算机才能完成的计算任务，如今在个人计算机上即可实现。

title: PolyJarvis: LLM Agent for Autonomous Polymer MD Simulations
abstract: All-atom molecular dynamics (MD) simulations can predict polymer properties from molecular structure, yet their execution requires specialized expertise in force field selection, system construction, equilibration, and property extraction. We present PolyJarvis, an agent that couples a large language model (LLM) with the RadonPy simulation platform through Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, enabling end-to-end polymer property prediction from natural language input. Given a polymer name or SMILES string, PolyJarvis autonomously executes monomer construction, charge assignment, polymerization, force field parameterization, GPU-accelerated equilibration, and property calculation. Validation is conducted on polyethylene (PE), atactic polystyrene (aPS), poly(methyl methacrylate) (PMMA), and poly(ethylene glycol) (PEG). Results show density predictions within 0.1--4.8% and bulk moduli within 17--24% of reference values for aPS and PMMA. PMMA glass transition temperature (Tg) (395~K) matches experiment within +10--18~K, while the remaining three polymers overestimate Tg by +38 to +47K (vs upper experimental bounds). Of the 8 property--polymer combinations with directly comparable experimental references, 5 meet strict acceptance criteria. For cases lacking suitable amorphous-phase experimental, agreement with prior MD literature is reported separately. The remaining Tg failures are attributable primarily to the intrinsic MD cooling-rate bias rather than agent error. This work demonstrates that LLM-driven agents can autonomously execute polymer MD workflows producing results consistent with expert-run simulations.
zh_abstract: 全原子分子动力学（MD）模拟能够从分子结构预测聚合物性质，但其执行过程需要掌握力场选择、体系构建、平衡化及性质提取等方面的专业知识。我们提出了PolyJarvis，这是一个通过模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器将大语言模型（LLM）与RadonPy模拟平台耦合的智能体，能够实现从自然语言输入到聚合物性质预测的端到端流程。给定聚合物名称或SMILES字符串，PolyJarvis可自主执行单体构建、电荷分配、聚合反应、力场参数化、GPU加速平衡化以及性质计算。我们在聚乙烯（PE）、无规聚苯乙烯（aPS）、聚甲基丙烯酸甲酯（PMMA）和聚乙二醇（PEG）上进行了验证。结果显示，对于aPS和PMMA，其密度预测值与参考值偏差在0.1-4.8%之间，体积模量偏差在17-24%之间。PMMA的玻璃化转变温度（Tg）（395 K）与实验值相差+10-18 K，而其余三种聚合物的Tg预测值则比实验上限高出+38至+47 K。在8组具有直接可比较实验参考值的性质-聚合物组合中，有5组满足严格的接受标准。对于缺乏合适非晶相实验数据的情况，我们单独报告了与先前MD文献的一致性。其余Tg预测的偏差主要归因于MD模拟固有的冷却速率偏差，而非智能体本身的错误。本研究表明，LLM驱动的智能体能够自主执行聚合物MD工作流程，并产生与专家级模拟相一致的结果。
introduction:
Computational prediction of polymer properties such as $T_g$, density, and mechanical moduli is essential for accelerating materials discovery.
All-atom MD simulations provide a first-principles route to these predictions, but their practical adoption is hindered by the deep expertise required across force field selection, system construction, multi-stage equilibration, and property-specific analysis.
The manual, decision-intensive nature of these workflows limits reproducibility, with studies on the same system frequently reporting divergent results.

Significant progress has been made in automating the polymer simulation pipeline.
RadonPy provides an end-to-end framework calculating 15 properties for more than 1000 polymers. SPACIER extends the framework with Bayesian optimization. Other notable tools like Polymatic, and Polyply automate specific MD stages. The PolyArena benchmark establishes a standardized evaluation of MD-predicted properties.
Machine learning approaches offer rapid prediction but sacrifice physical interpretability and require extensive training data. However, existing tools execute predefined protocols without making informed decisions based on the specific polymer system.

Agents based on large language models (LLMs) have opened new possibilities for scientific automation.
For example, ChemCrow integrated chemistry tools with GPT-4 for organic synthesis, MDCrow completed 72\
In materials science specifically, modular LLM agents have been applied to multi-task computational workflows, catalyst discovery, materials knowledge navigation, polymer design, and biomolecular MD automation.
However, few have demonstrated an LLM agent autonomously executing validated all-atom polymer MD simulations with quantitative experimental benchmarking (Table~).

deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 首次提出了一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体，能够通过自然语言指令，全自动地执行从单体构建到性能计算的全原子聚合物分子动力学模拟完整工作流。

2. 关键结论: (1) PolyJarvis智能体成功实现了从聚合物名称或SMILES字符串到模拟结果的全流程自动化，无需人工干预；(2) 在PE、aPS、PMMA、PEG等验证体系上，其预测的密度和部分模量与实验值或文献值吻合良好，证明了自动化流程的可行性；(3) 玻璃化转变温度预测存在系统性的高估，作者将此归因于MD模拟固有的冷却速率偏差，而非智能体决策错误。

3. 专家点评: 该工作将LLM智能体应用于复杂科学计算流程自动化，是一个极具前瞻性和工程价值的探索，显著降低了聚合物MD模拟的技术门槛。然而，其核心创新更多在于系统集成与流程自动化，而非科学算法本身；智能体的“决策”本质上是调用预设的RadonPy工具链，其“智能”体现在流程编排而非科学判断上。未来需评估其在更复杂、非标准聚合物体系（如共聚物、含特殊官能团体系）上的鲁棒性，并解决如何让智能体处理模拟中出现的意外情况或进行真正的“优化决策”。

title: CARBON-2D Topological Descriptor (C2DTD): An Interpretable and Physics-Informed Representation for Two-Dimensional Carbon Networks
abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) carbon networks, from pristine graphene to defect-rich and amorphous monolayers, exhibit a complex structure-energy landscape governed not only by local bonding but also by medium-range order and network topology. Capturing these multi-scale effects in a compact, interpretable, and data-efficient manner remains a major challenge for machine learning (ML) in low-dimensional materials. In this work, we introduce the CARBON-2D Topological Descriptor (C2DTD), a physically informed structural representation specifically designed for 2D carbon systems. The descriptor integrates local geometric statistics, a compact radial structural signature, and explicit primitive ring topology into a fixed-length, invariant vector that is both computationally efficient and directly interpretable. Benchmarking on diverse datasets of 2D carbon allotropes and defect-engineered graphene sheets demonstrates that C2DTD achieves robust predictive performance in small-data regimes, outperforming generic high-dimensional featurization schemes while preserving physical transparency. Unsupervised manifold analysis reveals a smoother alignment between descriptor space and the DFT energy landscape, and feature-importance and ablation studies confirm that ring topology emerges as a dominant energetic driver, particularly under vacancy-induced reconstruction. Furthermore, controlled simulations with 5-15% random vacancies show that C2DTD naturally captures the progressive transition from hexagon-dominated graphene to topologically disordered networks, enabling both dataset-level and structure-specific interpretation. Owing to its compactness, interpretability, and strong physics-based inductive bias, C2DTD provides a fast and generalizable framework for data-driven modeling, defect analysis, and high-throughput screening of 2D carbon materials.
zh_abstract: 二维（2D）碳网络——从原始石墨烯到富含缺陷及非晶单层——展现出一种复杂的结构-能量关系，该关系不仅受局部键合影响，还受到中程有序性和网络拓扑结构的调控。如何以紧凑、可解释且数据高效的方式捕捉这些多尺度效应，一直是低维材料机器学习（ML）领域面临的主要挑战。本研究提出了CARBON-2D拓扑描述符（C2DTD），这是一种专为二维碳系统设计的、基于物理信息的结构表征方法。该描述符将局部几何统计、紧凑的径向结构特征以及显式的原始环拓扑结构整合为一个固定长度、具有不变性的向量，兼具计算高效性和直接可解释性。在多种二维碳同素异形体及缺陷工程石墨烯薄片数据集上的基准测试表明，C2DTD在小数据量场景下实现了稳健的预测性能，其表现优于通用的高维特征化方案，同时保持了物理意义的清晰性。无监督流形分析揭示了描述符空间与密度泛函理论（DFT）能量景观之间更平滑的对齐关系，特征重要性和消融研究进一步证实，环拓扑结构是主导的能量驱动因素，尤其是在空位诱导重构的情况下。此外，对含有5-15%随机空位的受控模拟表明，C2DTD能够自然地捕捉从六边形主导的石墨烯到拓扑无序网络的渐进转变过程，从而支持数据集层面和特定结构层面的解释。得益于其紧凑性、可解释性和强大的基于物理的归纳偏置，C2DTD为二维碳材料的数据驱动建模、缺陷分析及高通量筛选提供了一个快速且可推广的框架。

title: Oxygen as a dual function regulator in MoS2 CVD synthesis: enhancing precursor evaporation while modulating reaction kinetics
abstract: Molybdenum disulfide (MoS2) is a promising 2D transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) for optoelectronics and quantum technology applications, but faces challenges in scalable synthesis and defect engineering. Oxygen-assisted chemical vapor deposition (O-CVD), which introduces in-situ oxygen during growth, shows excellent potential in resolving both issues at once. Although co-flowing oxygen shows improvement in growth, the underlying mechanistic role of oxygen remains unclear. In this work, a combination of oxygen dosing experiments, density functional theory (DFT) calculations, computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations, and ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) simulations, uncover the dual role of oxygen in O-CVD. Firstly, AIMD reveals that oxygen increases MoO3 sublimation and enhances Mo3O9 supply. Concomitantly, DFT reveals that sulphur oxides, due to their bulkier nature than pure S2, limit the formation of reactive MoS6 intermediates. Subsequently, by experimentally varying the oxygen flow-interval, flow-rate, and flow-time, and correlating them with CFD simulations, we decouple oxygen's roles in source-poisoning prevention (i.e. MoO3 evaporation) and growth regulation. We find that maintaining a low sulphur-to-oxygen (S:O2) ratio at the MoO3 boat and substrate during nucleation, and a high S:O2 ratio at the substrate during growth is the key to obtaining large-area high-quality monolayer MoS2, confirmed by our optical measurements. Based on our understanding, we present a kinetic phase diagram for MoS2 synthesis, which will enable controlled oxygen dosing as a tuning parameter for scalable, defect-controlled monolayer MoS2 synthesis.
zh_abstract: 二硫化钼（MoS₂）是一种在光电子和量子技术应用中极具前景的二维过渡金属硫族化合物（TMD），但其可扩展合成与缺陷工程仍面临挑战。氧辅助化学气相沉积（O-CVD）通过在生长过程中原位引入氧气，展现出同时解决上述问题的巨大潜力。尽管共流氧气能改善生长效果，但氧气在其中发挥的微观机制尚不明确。本研究结合氧气剂量实验、密度泛函理论（DFT）计算、计算流体动力学（CFD）模拟以及从头算分子动力学（AIMD）模拟，揭示了氧气在O-CVD中的双重作用。首先，AIMD模拟表明氧气能促进MoO₃升华并增强Mo₃O₉的供给。同时，DFT计算显示硫氧化物因其体积比纯S₂更大，限制了活性中间体MoS₆的形成。随后，通过实验调控氧气通入的间隔、流速与时长，并结合CFD模拟分析，我们解耦了氧气在防止源中毒（即促进MoO₃蒸发）与调控生长两方面的作用。研究发现，在成核阶段保持MoO₃舟与衬底处低硫氧比（S:O₂），而在生长阶段维持衬底处高硫氧比，是获得大面积高质量单层MoS₂的关键，这一结论已通过光学表征验证。基于以上认识，我们绘制了MoS₂合成的动力学相图，该相图将为实现可控氧气剂量调控提供依据，从而推动可扩展、缺陷可控的单层MoS₂合成。

title: Crystalite: A Lightweight Transformer for Efficient Crystal Modeling
abstract: Generative models for crystalline materials often rely on equivariant graph neural networks, which capture geometric structure well but are costly to train and slow to sample. We present Crystalite, a lightweight diffusion Transformer for crystal modeling built around two simple inductive biases. The first is Subatomic Tokenization, a compact chemically structured atom representation that replaces high-dimensional one-hot encodings and is better suited to continuous diffusion. The second is the Geometry Enhancement Module (GEM), which injects periodic minimum-image pair geometry directly into attention through additive geometric biases. Together, these components preserve the simplicity and efficiency of a standard Transformer while making it better matched to the structure of crystalline materials. Crystalite achieves state-of-the-art results on crystal structure prediction benchmarks, and de novo generation performance, attaining the best S.U.N. discovery score among the evaluated baselines while sampling substantially faster than geometry-heavy alternatives.
zh_abstract: 用于晶体材料的生成模型通常依赖于等变图神经网络，这类网络能很好地捕捉几何结构，但训练成本高且采样速度慢。我们提出了Crystalite，一种轻量级的扩散Transformer模型，用于晶体建模，其设计基于两个简单的归纳偏置。第一个是亚原子标记化（Subatomic Tokenization），这是一种紧凑的化学结构化原子表示方法，它取代了高维的独热编码，并更适用于连续扩散过程。第二个是几何增强模块（Geometry Enhancement Module, GEM），它通过加法式几何偏置将周期性最小镜像对几何信息直接注入注意力机制中。这些组件共同作用，在保持标准Transformer的简洁性和高效性的同时，使其更匹配晶体材料的结构特性。Crystalite在晶体结构预测基准测试中取得了最先进的结果，并在从头生成任务中表现出色，在评估的基线模型中获得了最佳的S.U.N.发现分数，同时其采样速度显著快于依赖复杂几何计算的其他方法。
introduction:
The discovery of novel, synthesizable, and diverse crystalline materials with targeted properties remains a central goal of materials science . Yet the search space of possible compositions and structures is combinatorially vast, while only a small fraction of candidates is thermodynamically stable. Traditional computational approaches can explore this space systematically . However, even with large high-throughput infrastructures , candidate evaluation still typically relies on density functional theory (DFT) , whose conventional Kohn–Sham implementations remain computationally expensive have cubic scaling with the number of electrons or basis functions .

Deep generative models offer a promising alternative by learning to propose candidate materials directly from data . In crystal generation, however, the geometric and symmetry structure of the problem has driven much of the literature toward equivariant graph neural networks (GNNs) and other specialized architectures . While highly effective, these approaches can be architecturally complex and computationally demanding, motivating the search for simpler backbones that still capture enough crystal geometry to remain competitive . This raises a natural question: can a lightweight transformer recover enough geometric structure to compete without explicit equivariant message passing?



Recent work suggests that transformers can be competitive with GNN-based approaches for crystal generation. In particular, diffusion transformers have emerged as a promising lightweight alternative for atomistic and crystalline generation . However, these approaches often incorporate crystal geometry only weakly or indirectly, leaving open whether a standard diffusion transformer can remain simple while benefiting from a more direct injection of periodic geometric structure.

In this work, we introduce , a lightweight diffusion transformer for crystalline materials. Crystalite augments standard multi-head attention with periodic and g
conclusion:
We introduced Crystalite, a lightweight diffusion Transformer for crystal structure prediction and  crystal generation. By combining chemically structured atom tokens with the Geometry Enhancement Module (GEM), Crystalite injects crystal-specific inductive bias into a standard Transformer without relying on expensive equivariant message passing.

Across benchmarks, Crystalite achieves state-of-the-art crystal structure prediction performance and strong  generation results, attaining the best SUN score among the evaluated baselines while sampling substantially faster than geometry-heavy alternatives. These results show that strong crystal modeling performance does not necessarily require full equivariance, provided that periodic geometry and chemical structure are incorporated in the right way. Overall, Crystalite offers a simple and efficient approach to crystal modeling and suggests that lightweight diffusion Transformers are a promising direction for scalable materials discovery.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新：提出了一种通过“亚原子标记化”和“几何增强模块”将晶体周期性几何结构有效注入标准Transformer的轻量级方法，在保持模型简单高效的同时，取代了对复杂等变图神经网络的依赖。

2. 关键结论：结合了化学结构原子标记与几何增强模块的轻量级扩散Transformer，在不依赖昂贵等变消息传递的情况下，实现了最先进的晶体结构预测性能；该模型在晶体生成任务上取得了最佳的S.U.N.发现分数，且采样速度显著快于依赖复杂几何计算的基线模型；研究结果表明，强大的晶体建模性能不一定需要完全的等变性，关键在于以恰当方式融入周期性几何与化学结构信息。

3. 专家点评：这项工作的核心价值在于对“模型复杂性与性能必要性”的深入探讨，其成功挑战了晶体生成领域依赖复杂等变GNN的范式，为高效、可扩展的材料发现提供了新路径。然而，其局限性在于，论文主要对比了生成速度与部分性能指标，对于模型在捕获复杂晶体对称性、处理缺陷或表面结构等更广泛几何场景下的泛化能力与鲁棒性，仍需更全面的评估。此外，“亚原子标记化”的通用性及其对非常见元素或复杂化学环境的适用性也有待进一步验证。

title: Loop-level surrogate modeling of dopant-distribution effects in Ba(Zr,Ti)O$_3$
abstract: Barium titanate-based perovskites are important candidates for lead-free dielectric and electromechanical technologies. In Zr-substituted BaTiO$_3$ (BZT), functional behavior is usually discussed in terms of the average Zr concentration, while the influence of dopant spatial distribution beyond average concentration is less understood and difficult to explore systematically. Here we present an accelerated materials-design workflow that links controlled dopant distributions to full field-driven response curves. We generate a broad set of Zr distributions spanning a continuum of nanoscale arrangements, with layers, rods, dots, and lamellae serving as representative end-member motifs, and encode each configuration using a compact, parametrized descriptor model. Effective-Hamiltonian molecular dynamics is used to compute polarization-electric-field and strain-field hysteresis loops, and we train a conditional autoencoder surrogate to predict complete loops directly from the distribution parameters. This surrogate enables rapid screening and dense, property-selective design maps at scales that are not feasible with direct simulations alone, and it supports targeted follow-up simulations in regions of interest. Using the predicted loop database, we screen the distribution space for multiple functional targets, including energy-storage performance, electromechanical response, and switching behavior, and identify the corresponding dopant distribution motif families. The resulting design maps show that dopant distribution is an independent tuning parameter that can strongly affect hysteresis behavior and loop-derived figures of merit: layer-like motifs, vertical lamellae, and nanoplate-like inclusions emerge in different performance regimes. More generally, predicting full response curves enables screening of other loop-derived targets and multi-objective design in substituted ferroelectrics.
zh_abstract: 钛酸钡基钙钛矿是无铅介电与机电技术的重要候选材料。在锆取代的BaTiO$_3$（BZT）中，功能特性通常根据平均锆浓度进行讨论，而超过平均浓度的掺杂剂空间分布的影响则研究较少且难以系统探索。本文提出一种加速材料设计工作流程，将受控的掺杂剂分布与全场驱动响应曲线相关联。我们生成了涵盖纳米尺度排列连续体的多种锆分布，以层状、棒状、点状和片层状作为代表性端元构型，并通过紧凑的参数化描述符模型对每种构型进行编码。采用有效哈密顿量分子动力学计算极化-电场与应变-电场滞后回线，并训练条件自编码器代理模型，使其能直接从分布参数预测完整的回线。该代理模型支持快速筛选和生成密集的、面向性能选择的设计图谱，其规模是单纯直接模拟无法实现的，同时支持在感兴趣区域进行定向后续模拟。利用预测的回线数据库，我们在分布空间中针对多种功能目标（包括储能性能、机电响应和开关行为）进行筛选，并识别出相应的掺杂剂分布构型族。所得设计图谱表明，掺杂剂分布是一个独立的调控参数，可显著影响滞后行为及基于回线的性能指标：层状构型、垂直片层和纳米板状夹杂物在不同性能区间中显现。更广泛而言，预测完整响应曲线有助于筛选其他基于回线的目标，并实现取代铁电体的多目标设计。
introduction:
Ferroelectric materials~ show a broad range of functional responses, including dielectric~, electromechanical~, and electrocaloric effects~, and therefore remain important for many technologies. A key advantage of perovskite ferroelectrics is their chemical and structural tunability: relatively small changes in composition, local order, or defects can strongly modify phase stability and field-driven switching. Among lead-free perovskites, BaTiO$_3$ (BT) remains a benchmark system because its phase sequence, switching behavior, and chemical tunability are particularly well established~.
BT exhibits the well-known sequence of structural phases~ (cubic paraelectric $$ tetragonal $$ orthorhombic $$ rhombohedral), and its rich phase behavior already illustrates that functional response is governed not only by average composition but also by how local environments and correlations develop across length scales.

Chemical substitution on the A- or B-site is widely used to tune perovskite ferroelectrics~. Most studies parameterize substitution primarily through the average dopant fraction, which shifts phase boundaries, modifies susceptibilities, and can induce relaxor-like behavior~. At fixed composition, however, the same dopant content can be realized through very different real-space arrangements — random, clustered, compositionally modulated, layered, or lamellar — and these arrangements need not yield the same field-driven response. Layering, compositional modulation, and atomically sharp substitution profiles are already established design motifs in ferroelectric heterostructures and superlattices. However, a systematic and quantitative understanding of how concentration and distribution jointly shape field-driven response, and how distribution effects compare at a given dopant fraction, is still limited.

In this work we focus on Zr-substituted BaTiO$_3$, Ba(Zr$_x$Ti$_{1-x}$)O$_3$ (BZT)~. Substitution of Ti by Zr on the B-site modifies phase stability and functional
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种结合参数化描述符、有效哈密顿量分子动力学与条件自编码器替代模型的计算工作流，首次系统地将掺杂原子在纳米尺度的空间分布（而非仅平均浓度）作为独立变量，实现了对铁电材料完整场驱动响应回线（如电滞回线）的快速预测与逆向设计。
2. 关键结论: (1) 在固定平均掺杂浓度下，掺杂原子的空间分布（如层状、棒状、点状等）是调控Ba(Zr,Ti)O3铁电材料电滞回线形状与功能特性的一个独立且关键的设计参数；(2) 所建立的替代模型能够高效生成“分布-性能”设计图谱，揭示特定功能目标（如储能密度、机电响应）所对应的优选掺杂分布模式家族，例如层状、垂直片层或纳米片状夹杂物分别在不同性能区间占主导。
3. 专家点评: 这项工作将材料设计的维度从平均成分扩展到了纳米尺度空间序构，概念上具有重要突破性，为理解与设计组分调制的铁电体提供了新范式。其构建的“描述符-替代模型”工作流具有通用潜力，可推广至其他掺杂或缺陷体系。然而，该方法目前依赖于有效哈密顿量模型的计算结果，其预测精度受限于该模型对复杂原子相互作用及动力学的描述能力；此外，研究集中于理想化的几何分布模式，尚未充分探讨实际合成过程中可能形成的更复杂、非理想的分布形态及其动力学稳定性，这将是连接计算设计与实验制备的关键挑战。

title: A New Paradigm for Computational Chemistry
abstract: Computational chemistry has become an indispensable tool for generating data and insights, pervading all branches of experimental chemistry. Its most central concept is the potential energy hypersurface, key to all chemistry and materials science, as it assigns an energy to a molecular structure, the necessary ingredient for reaction mechanism elucidation and reaction rate calculation. Density functional theory (DFT) has been the most important method in practice for obtaining such energies, which is mirrored in the use of high-performance computing hardware. In the last two decades, a new class of surrogate potential energy functions has been evolving with remarkable properties: quantum accuracy combined with force-field speed. Until very recently, their application was hampered by the fact that they needed to be trained on truly large system-specific data sets, generated before a computational chemistry study could be started (in sharp contrast to DFT, which, as a first-principles method, works out of the box, but at a far higher price of computational cost). Very recently, this roadblock has been overcome by so-called foundation machine learning interatomic potentials, which are poised to completely change the way we do computational chemistry, likely prompting us to abandon DFT as the prime method of choice for this purpose in less than a decade.
zh_abstract: 计算化学已成为生成数据和提供洞见不可或缺的工具，渗透到实验化学的各个分支。其最核心的概念是势能超曲面，这是所有化学和材料科学的关键，因为它为分子结构分配能量，是阐明反应机理和计算反应速率的必要要素。密度泛函理论（DFT）在实践中一直是获取此类能量最重要的方法，这也反映在高性能计算硬件的使用上。近二十年来，一类新的替代势能函数逐渐发展起来，其特性引人注目：兼具量子精度与分子力场速度。直到最近，这类函数的应用仍受限于一个事实：它们需要在计算化学研究开始之前，基于真正庞大的特定系统数据集进行训练（这与DFT形成鲜明对比；DFT作为第一性原理方法，可以开箱即用，但计算成本要高得多）。最近，这一障碍已被所谓的“基础机器学习原子间势”所克服。这类势函数有望彻底改变我们进行计算化学研究的方式，很可能在不到十年的时间里，促使我们放弃将DFT作为实现此目的的首要方法。
introduction:
Central to our understanding of chemical processes is the assignment of a potential energy to a molecular structure, more specifically to a nuclear configuration, which leads to the concept of a potential energy surface that allows us to study reaction chemistry in terms of stable intermediates, reaction paths, transition state structures, and so forth. It is the Born-Oppenheimer approximation, the so-called clamped-nuclei approximation, which allows us to calculate the electronic energy of such a fixed arrangement of atomic nuclei. There exists a plethora of quantum chemical methods to calculate this electronic energy, all characterized by some balance of accuracy and feasibility. These methods allow us to predict reaction energies and activation barriers routinely , alongside molecular structures and transition states on the basis of the first principles of quantum mechanics, an accomplishment that was recognized by a share of the 1998 Nobel Prize in Chemistry to John Pople.

In the 1990s, approximate density functional theory (DFT) took the lead for this purpose within computational chemistry owing to its convincing compromise of bearable computational cost and sufficient reliability, leading to the recognition of its impact on chemistry by the other share of the 1998 Nobel Prize in Chemistry to Walter Kohn. 
More than 90\
and about one third of all computer science applications on supercomputer systems . Hence, the practical and economic importance as well as the ecological footprint of DFT can hardly be overestimated.

The accuracy (and to some degree the efficiency) of DFT depends on the approximate form chosen for the so-called exchange--correlation (xc) density functional, typically denoted by one of the notorious capital-letter acronyms. Although an exact xc functional can be shown to exist, its analytical form is not known and would probably also be too involved for efficient computational chemistry approaches. deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 该论文提出，以“基础机器学习原子间势”为代表的新型势能面替代模型，将因其“量子化学精度与分子力学速度”的结合，在十年内取代密度泛函理论成为计算化学获取势能面的首选方法，从而实现该领域的范式转变。

2. 关键结论: (1) 势能面是连接分子结构与能量、从而理解所有化学过程的核心概念; (2) 密度泛函理论因其在计算成本与精度间的平衡，已成为过去数十年获取势能面的主导实践方法，但其计算开销巨大; (3) 新兴的机器学习原子间势能函数已能实现接近量子化学的精度和分子力学的计算速度，但此前受限于需要针对特定体系进行大量数据训练; (4) 近期出现的“基础机器学习原子间势”模型通过预训练克服了这一数据瓶颈，有望彻底改变计算化学的研究范式。

3. 专家点评: 该观点极具前瞻性和冲击力，准确指出了计算化学领域因机器学习介入而面临的范式变革临界点。然而，其“十年内取代DFT”的断言可能过于激进，忽略了DFT方法本身在理论可解释性、普适性以及与新机器学习方法结合发展方面的潜力；同时，对“基础模型”在复杂电子结构、化学反应动态等关键场景的可靠性、可转移性及不确定性量化等根本性挑战未作深入探讨，这些将是决定其预言能否实现的关键。

title: A Self-Evolving Agentic Framework for Metasurface Inverse Design
abstract: Metasurface inverse design has become central to realizing complex optical functionality, yet translating target responses into executable, solver-compatible workflows still demands specialized expertise in computational electromagnetics and solver-specific software engineering. Recent large language models (LLMs) offer a complementary route to reducing this workflow-construction burden, but existing language-driven systems remain largely session-bounded and do not preserve reusable workflow knowledge across inverse-design tasks. We present an agentic framework for metasurface inverse design that addresses this limitation through context-level skill evolution. The framework couples a coding agent, evolving skill artifacts, and a deterministic evaluator grounded in physical simulation so that solver-specific strategies can be iteratively refined across tasks without modifying model weights or the underlying physics solver. We evaluate the framework on a benchmark spanning multiple metasurface inverse-design task types, with separate training-aligned and held-out task families. Evolved skills raise in-distribution task success from 38% to 74%, increase criteria pass fraction from 0.510 to 0.870, and reduce average attempts from 4.10 to 2.30. On held-out task families, binary success changes only marginally, but improvements in best margin together with shifts in error composition and agent behavior indicate partial transfer of workflow knowledge. These results suggest that the main value of skill evolution lies in accumulating reusable solver-specific expertise around reliable computational engines, thereby offering a practical path toward more autonomous and accessible metasurface inverse-design workflows.
zh_abstract: 超表面逆向设计已成为实现复杂光学功能的核心，但将目标响应转化为可执行且兼容求解器的工作流，仍然需要计算电磁学和求解器专用软件工程方面的专业知识。近期的大型语言模型为降低这种工作流构建负担提供了一条补充路径，但现有的语言驱动系统在很大程度上仍局限于单次会话，无法在跨逆向设计任务中保存可重用的工作流知识。我们提出了一种用于超表面逆向设计的智能体框架，该框架通过上下文级别的技能演化来解决这一局限。该框架将编码智能体、演化的技能构件以及基于物理仿真的确定性评估器相结合，使得特定于求解器的策略能够在不同任务间迭代优化，而无需修改模型权重或底层物理求解器。我们在涵盖多种超表面逆向设计任务类型的基准测试上评估该框架，测试集包括与训练对齐的任务族和预留的任务族。演化后的技能将分布内任务的成功率从38%提升至74%，将标准通过率从0.510提升至0.870，并将平均尝试次数从4.10降至2.30。在预留任务族上，二元成功率仅略有变化，但最佳裕度的提升以及错误构成和智能体行为的变化表明，工作流知识实现了部分迁移。这些结果表明，技能演化的主要价值在于围绕可靠的计算引擎积累可重用的、特定于求解器的专业知识，从而为构建更自主、更易访问的超表面逆向设计工作流提供了一条实用路径。
introduction:
Metasurface design is increasingly cast as an inverse problem, in which a target optical response is specified and the corresponding structure is sought . This paradigm reflects the growing demand for broadband, multifunctional, and highly integrated meta-optical devices, whose associated design spaces are high-dimensional, strongly coupled, and resistant to intuition-guided exploration, particularly under freeform parameterizations . In parallel, deep-learning-assisted methods have broadened the computational design landscape for metasurfaces and flat optics . Consequently, intuition-driven geometry tuning and parameter sweeps are no longer adequate for the efficient identification of high-performance structures, and computational inverse-design workflows have become central to metasurface research . Yet the growing centrality of inverse design has not translated into commensurate ease of automation. Converting a desired optical response into an executable design workflow still requires specialized knowledge of computational electromagnetics together with the software-engineering expertise needed for solver-specific workflow implementation and maintenance . These barriers often confine metasurface inverse-design workflows to relatively narrow, task-specific design problems, making them difficult to extend to more complex functionalities. The same limitations also make broader multiphysics applications harder to realize, thereby restricting further interdisciplinary exploration and development.


In practice, the difficulty lies in turning a target response into a working inverse-design program. To run an inverse-design task, the researcher must turn a target response into a working program: choose a parameterization, define the objective and constraints, decide how to initialize and optimize the variables, and verify the solver outputs . Recent progress in -based coding, tool use, and natural-language interaction makes part of this workflow easier. Early studie
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一个通过上下文级技能演化而非修改模型权重来实现跨任务可复用专业知识积累的智能体框架，用于降低超表面逆向设计工作流的构建门槛。

2. 关键结论: 该框架通过编码智能体、演化技能构件和基于物理模拟的确定性评估器耦合，实现了针对特定求解器的策略在任务间的迭代精化；在分布内任务上，技能演化将任务成功率从38%显著提升至74%，并将平均尝试次数减半；在分布外任务上，虽然二进制成功率提升有限，但最佳边际的改善、错误构成的转变以及智能体行为的改变表明，工作流知识实现了部分迁移。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作的核心价值在于将AI智能体的焦点从一次性任务求解转向了可积累、可复用的“技能”或“工作流知识”库的构建，这为复杂科学计算任务的长期自动化提供了一条务实路径。其局限性在于，技能的有效性严重依赖于底层物理求解器的可靠性和评估器的确定性，且“部分迁移”的结果表明，当前框架对于处理真正新颖、超出训练任务分布范围的问题泛化能力仍有待加强。若该框架能与更广泛的物理仿真器及多目标优化策略集成，有望成为连接高层次设计意图与底层专业仿真代码的通用中间层。

title: Towards Verifiable and Self-Correcting AI Physicists for Quantum Many-Body Simulations
abstract: Recent advances in automated scientific discovery have shown remarkable promise across frontier research domains, with agent systems driven by large language models (LLMs) emerging as powerful tools for physics research. However, in practical applications, LLM scientific research is prone to hallucinations, highlighting the need for reliable verification and error-correction mechanisms. Here we introduce PhysVEC, an automated multi-agent framework for verifiable and error-correcting AI-driven physics research. PhysVEC incorporates a programming verifier and a scientific verifier to ensure both coding correctness and physical validity, and provides human-auditable evidence at each stage. We curate QMB100, an end-to-end research-level benchmark dataset consisting of $100$ tasks extracted from $21$ high impact articles that focus on quantum many-body physics. We evaluated PhysVEC with four frontier LLMs and found that it significantly outperformed baselines in both programming tests and scientific tests across all LLMs and task categories. PhysVEC demonstrates effective inference-time scaling and delivers accurate physical predictions through integrated verification and error-correction mechanisms, paving the way for reliable and interpretable AI physicists.
zh_abstract: 自动化学术发现领域的最新进展在前沿研究领域展现出巨大潜力，其中基于大语言模型（LLM）驱动的智能体系统已成为物理学研究的强大工具。然而在实际应用中，LLM科研易产生幻觉现象，凸显了对可靠验证与纠错机制的需求。本文提出PhysVEC——一个可验证且具备纠错能力的自动多智能体框架，用于AI驱动的物理研究。PhysVEC集成编程验证器与科学验证器，确保代码正确性与物理有效性，并在各阶段提供可人工审计的证据链。我们构建了QMB100基准数据集，该端到端科研级数据集包含从21篇高影响力量子多体物理论文中提取的100项任务。通过四种前沿大语言模型的测试，PhysVEC在所有模型和任务类别的编程测试与科学测试中均显著超越基线方法。该框架展现出有效的推理时扩展能力，并通过集成验证与纠错机制实现精确的物理预测，为构建可靠且可解释的AI物理学家开辟了新路径。
introduction:
Automated scientific discovery has emerged as a transformative force across various frontier research fields, from accelerating machine learning , material synthesis , to reshaping experimental physics  and theoretical physics . Two developments underpin this surge: (1) large language models have markedly improved their capacity for multi-step reasoning, planning, and synthesis of technical information ; (2) the advancement of the agent paradigm has enabled these models to interact with external tools, execute code, and iteratively refine solutions in closed loops . Such systems dramatically lower the barrier for researchers to adopt diverse tools and compress the iteration cycle between theoretical insight and empirical verification. Beyond efficiency, automated systems open new possibilities for cross-disciplinary discovery, leveraging the LLMs' capability to connect and integrate insights across disciplines that human researchers might rarely bridge . Specifically, AI-driven systems find a particularly natural application in scientific simulations. Rather than merely processing literature, such systems can operate directly within the research pipeline by editing scripts, running simulations, post-processing data, and presenting results. Encouraged by these perspectives, several recent studies have demonstrated strong performance of LLM-based agents in various scientific simulation problems .

Despite this progress, critical gaps remain before AI-driven systems can be reliably deployed in practical research. In scientific simulations, ensuring both programming correctness and physical validity is essential. Although LLM-based agents have shown impressive performance in curated problems and exam-level tasks , reproducing the results of peer-reviewed journal articles presents a qualitatively more difficult challenge: it requires operating under realistic constraints and performing rigorous setup and computation. Moreover, LLM-generated scientific scripts often suf
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一个集成了编程验证器和科学验证器的多智能体框架，通过实时验证与自我修正机制，旨在解决AI驱动物理研究中普遍存在的幻觉与错误问题，并强调其过程的可审计性。

2. 关键结论: (1) 所提出的PhysVEC框架通过双重验证机制，在编程正确性和物理有效性上显著超越了基线方法；(2) 构建了QMB100基准数据集，该数据集源自高水平研究论文，为评估AI在真实复杂科研任务中的表现提供了高标准测试平台；(3) 框架展示了有效的推理时扩展能力，并能够通过集成验证与纠错机制产生准确的物理预测。

3. 专家点评: 该工作直面AI驱动科学研究中“幻觉”这一核心挑战，其提出的验证与自修正框架是迈向可靠、可解释“AI科学家”的关键一步，具有重要的方法论意义。然而，其有效性严重依赖于所构建的验证器（尤其是科学验证器）本身的完备性与正确性，这在开放、探索性的前沿科学问题中可能构成瓶颈；此外，框架在“纠错”后最终输出的物理结论，其新颖性与原创性尚未得到评估，这关系到此类系统是真正的研究伙伴还是高效的工具执行者。

title: Reliable and Efficient Automated Transition-State Searches with Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials
abstract: Transition-state searches are central to understanding reaction mechanisms, but the high computational cost of density-functional theory (DFT) limits their application in high-throughput catalyst and materials discovery. Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) offer near-DFT accuracy at orders-of-magnitude lower cost, yet their reliability for transition-state searches remains underexplored. Here, we systematically benchmark hybrid transition-state-search workflows combining six freely available potentials (MACE-OMol25, UMA-Small, UMA-Medium, eSEN-S, AIMNet2, and GFN2-xTB) with two reaction-path-finding algorithms (the freezing-string method and climbing-image nudged elastic band) across 58 diverse reactions spanning small organics, polymerization chemistry, and transition-metal catalysis. We find that models trained on the Open Molecules 2025 dataset exhibit markedly superior performance, with MACE-OMol25 achieving a 96.6% success rate while requiring fewer than four DFT-gradient evaluations per reaction on organic systems - a 94-96% reduction compared to conventional DFT-based searches. Low-level refinement on the MLIP surface before high-level DFT optimization reduces computational cost three-fold with minimal loss in reliability. For transition-metal systems, UMA-Medium demonstrates promising transferability to in-distribution transition metal complex reactions and out-of-distribution organometallic C-H activation. These results establish MLIP-accelerated workflows as practical tools for automated reaction discovery, enabling near-DFT accuracy at a fraction of traditional expense.
zh_abstract: 过渡态搜索是理解反应机理的核心，但密度泛函理论（DFT）的高计算成本限制了其在高通量催化剂与材料发现中的应用。机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）能以数量级更低的成本提供接近DFT的精度，然而其在过渡态搜索中的可靠性仍未得到充分探究。本文系统性地对混合过渡态搜索工作流程进行了基准测试，该流程结合了六种可自由获取的势函数（MACE-OMol25, UMA-Small, UMA-Medium, eSEN-S, AIMNet2 和 GFN2-xTB）与两种反应路径寻找算法（冻结弦方法和爬升图像微动弹性带法），测试涵盖58个涵盖小分子有机化学、聚合反应和过渡金属催化的多样化反应。我们发现，基于Open Molecules 2025数据集训练的模型表现出显著更优的性能，其中MACE-OMol25在有机体系上实现了96.6%的成功率，且每个反应所需的DFT梯度评估少于四次——相比传统的基于DFT的搜索，计算量减少了94-96%。在高级别DFT优化之前，先在MLIP势能面上进行低级别精修，能以极小的可靠性损失将计算成本降低三倍。对于过渡金属体系，UMA-Medium在分布内（in-distribution）的过渡金属配合物反应和分布外（out-of-distribution）的金属有机C-H活化反应中均展现出有前景的迁移性。这些结果确立了MLIP加速的工作流程可作为自动化反应发现的实用工具，以传统成本的一小部分实现接近DFT的精度。
introduction:
Determining reaction mechanisms is central to the design of new materials, catalysts, and synthetic routes. Experimental elucidation of mechanisms and reaction parameters is often challenging and resource intensive due to the rarity of barrier-crossing events and the fleeting nature of activated complexes such as transition states. Theoretical approaches therefore play an essential complementary role, providing mechanistic insight and, once validated, may enable high-throughput screening of reactive systems. Many theoretical methods center on identifying the transition state, whose relative energy and geometry determine the rate and selectivity of a reaction. The transition state is the highest energy point along the minimum-energy path (MEP) connecting reactant and product states, corresponding to a first-order saddle point on the Born–Oppenheimer potential-energy surface (PES). The energy of the transition state relative to the reactant and product states defines the activation barrier and thereby the reaction kinetics. Accurately capturing these energetics requires PESs from electronic-structure methods such as density-functional theory (DFT), which can accurately describe complex chemical phenomena including bond formation and dissociation. However, despite favorable scaling relative to post-Hartree–Fock methods, DFT-based searches quickly become prohibitively expensive in large systems or when multiple reactions are under investigation due to the non-linear scaling of DFT and large number of in-series PES evaluations required by TS-search algorithms. Consequently, there is a growing need for workflows that can generate high-quality TS guesses with minimal computational cost.

To address this issue, many algorithms have been developed to automate TS searches, including machine-learning algorithms that attempt to directly predict reaction parameters or TSs and methods based on a chain-of-states reaction-path representation that explore the PES. The latter group i
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 本文通过系统性的基准测试，首次明确建立了基于Open Molecules 2025数据集训练的机器学习原子间势函数（如MACE-OMol25）在自动化过渡态搜索工作流中的高可靠性（>96%成功率）与超高计算效率（相比传统DFT方法减少94-96%计算量），并将其适用范围从有机体系成功拓展至过渡金属催化反应。

2. 关键结论: 在有机反应体系中，基于OMol25数据集训练的MLIPs（特别是MACE-OMol25）表现出极高的成功率（96.6%）和计算效率（平均每个反应仅需不到4次DFT梯度计算）；在MLIP势能面上进行低精度预优化，再进行高精度DFT精修，能以三倍的计算成本降低换取可靠的结果；对于过渡金属体系，UMA-Medium模型显示出对分布内和部分分布外（如C-H活化）反应的良好迁移能力；综合而言，MLIP加速的工作流为实现高通量反应发现提供了兼具DFT精度与极低计算成本的实用工具。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作的核心价值在于其系统性和实用性，它并非提出新算法，而是通过严谨的基准测试，为计算化学社区提供了关于“哪些MLIP在过渡态搜索中真正可靠”的明确指南，有望显著推动MLIP从研究向日常应用的转变。然而，研究对“成功”的定义（如与DFT参考值的能量偏差阈值、几何收敛标准）需要更详细的说明，这直接影响结论的普适性。此外，尽管在过渡金属体系上展示了潜力，但测试集相对有限，其对于更复杂、多步或涉及强电子关联性的催化循环的普适性仍有待更严峻的考验。

title: Automating Computational Chemistry Workflows via OpenClaw and Domain-Specific Skills
abstract: Automating multistep computational chemistry tasks remains challenging because reasoning, workflow specification, software execution, and high-performance computing (HPC) execution are often tightly coupled. We demonstrate a decoupled agent-skill design for computational chemistry automation leveraging OpenClaw. Specifically, OpenClaw provides centralized control and supervision; schema-defined planning skills translate scientific goals into executable task specifications; domain skills encapsulate specific computational chemistry procedures; and DPDispatcher manages job execution across heterogeneous HPC environments. In a molecular dynamics (MD) case study of methane oxidation, the system completed cross-tool execution, bounded recovery from runtime failures, and reaction network extraction, illustrating a scalable and maintainable approach to multistep computational chemistry automation.
zh_abstract: 自动化执行多步骤计算化学任务仍然具有挑战性，因为推理、工作流规范、软件执行与高性能计算（HPC）执行通常紧密耦合。我们展示了一种基于 OpenClaw 的去耦合智能体-技能设计，用于实现计算化学自动化。具体而言，OpenClaw 提供集中式控制与监督；通过模式定义的规划技能将科学目标转化为可执行的任务规范；领域技能封装了特定的计算化学流程；而 DPDispatcher 则负责管理跨异构 HPC 环境的作业执行。在甲烷氧化的分子动力学（MD）案例研究中，该系统完成了跨工具执行、运行时故障的有界恢复以及反应网络提取，展示了一种可扩展且可维护的多步骤计算化学自动化方法。
introduction:
Computational chemistry has become an indispensable tool for probing,
predicting,
and rationalizing chemical and materials systems.
In practice,
however,
the major bottleneck is often not the lack of computational methods themselves,
but the difficulty of reliably coordinating heterogeneous software tools,
data representations,
and execution environments for multi-step research tasks.
Real applications routinely require molecular structure preparation,
input generation,
parameter configuration,
data-format conversion,
remote job submission,
monitoring,
error recovery,
and downstream analysis across multiple codes and platforms.
Because these operations are strongly interdependent,
automation depends not only on executing individual tools,
but also on maintaining consistency across task specification,
software invocation,
intermediate data handoff,
and HPC execution.
As such tasks become increasingly multi-step and data-intensive,
the central challenge is no longer simply to automate isolated calculations,
but to achieve robust,
reusable,
and auditable end-to-end automation.

One major line of prior work approaches this problem through workflow-based automation.
Representative examples include general workflow infrastructures such as AiiDA,
FireWorks,
and QMflows,
as well as domain-oriented workflow systems for specific scientific tasks.
In artificial intelligence (AI)-driven atomistic simulation,
for example,
DP-GEN and NepTrain automate active-learning cycles for machine-learning potentials; CatFlow and DP-TI support free-energy and thermodynamic-integration workflows; ChecMatE,
AutoSteper,
APEX,
and RiD-kit provide workflow support for machine-learning-potential-based materials and molecular simulations; and mech2d and maptool illustrate high-throughput materials-screening workflows.
These systems have proven highly effective for repetitive,
well-defined,
and high-throughput computational tasks by formalizing task dependencies,
provenance tracking,
data organizati
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出并验证了一种基于OpenClaw的、控制与执行解耦的“代理-技能”架构，用于实现可扩展、可维护且具备鲁棒性的端到端计算化学多步骤工作流自动化。

2. 关键结论: (1) 通过将高层推理与规划（代理）、领域特定计算过程（领域技能）以及异构高性能计算环境作业执行三者解耦，可以系统性地解决计算化学多步骤任务自动化中工具、数据和执行环境异质性强、相互依赖紧密的难题；(2) 该架构支持跨工具执行、运行时故障的有界恢复以及下游分析（如反应网络提取），在甲烷氧化分子动力学案例中得到了验证；(3) 相较于传统的、紧密耦合的工作流系统，该设计强调了可维护性和可扩展性，为构建复杂、长周期、数据密集型的自动化科学研究流程提供了新范式。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作从工程架构层面切入，精准地指出了当前计算化学自动化从“单点计算”迈向“智能流程”的核心瓶颈，其解耦思想具有重要的方法论意义。然而，其案例研究（甲烷氧化MD）相对经典，未能充分展示该框架在处理更复杂、不确定性更高的探索性任务（如未知反应路径自动搜索）时的能力与局限。此外，文中提及的“规划技能”如何获取与形式化复杂的化学直觉与决策逻辑，是决定该框架能否从“自动化”走向“智能化”的关键，但这一点未在现有材料中深入讨论，是未来需要关注的重点。

title: Mimosa Framework: Toward Evolving Multi-Agent Systems for Scientific Research
abstract: Current Autonomous Scientific Research (ASR) systems, despite leveraging large language models (LLMs) and agentic architectures, remain constrained by fixed workflows and toolsets that prevent adaptation to evolving tasks and environments. We introduce Mimosa, an evolving multi-agent framework that automatically synthesizes task-specific multi-agent workflows and iteratively refines them through experimental feedback.
