Moreover, we find that an interplay of parallel and rhombohedral stackings allows for flat band engineering and enhancement in arbitrarily stacked MLGs. The existence of flat bands in MLGs might offer another interesting platform for exploring the superconductivity in graphene systems beyond the twisted bilayer graphene.
zh_abstract: 多层石墨烯(MLG)的堆叠几何结构为调控其费米能级附近的电子结构提供了一个有趣的自度——单层石墨烯中的线性能带可能得以保留，也可能演化为抛物线型或平带。通过紧束缚模型，我们对任意堆叠MLG的电子能带结构进行了详细解析分析。研究表明，其费米能级附近的低能带色散关系可通过孤立子堆叠结构推导得出。AA堆叠零本征值动量的解析解使我们能够推广任意堆叠MLG的零能量动量结论。此外，我们发现平行堆叠与菱面体堆叠的相互作用可实现平带调控，并增强任意堆叠MLG的平带特性。MLG中平带的存在可能为探索超越扭曲双层石墨烯的石墨烯体系超导性提供又一个有趣的研究平台。
introduction:
The electronic properties of multilayer graphene are fundamentally determined by its stacking geometry, which controls the band structure near the Fermi level. While single layer graphene features massless Dirac fermions with a linear dispersion , multilayer graphene systems exhibit dramatically different behaviors depending on their stacking order and layer number. Early theoretical and experimental studies established that Bernal (AB), rhombohedral (ABC), and parallel (AA) stackings each produce distinct electronic structures . Moreover, the nature of charge carriers in few-layer graphene is highly sensitive to both the number of layers and the stacking geometry, making the possibility of analyzing a general arbitrary multilayer stack challenging. Rhombohedral stacking is particularly notable for generating flat bands at low energies, characterized by vanishing Fermi velocity and enhanced density of states. These flat bands play a central role in promoting strong electron-electron correlations and have become a key ingredient for realizing exotic quantum phases including superconductivity .

The discovery of superconductivity in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene has generated intense interest in flat band engineering as a route to unconventional superconductivity . When graphene layers are twisted at specific magic angles (the first  being $  1.1$), moir\'e superlattices form with isolated flat bands that support Mott insulating states and superconducting domes reminiscent of high-$T_c$ cuprates. This paradigm has been extended to multilayer systems; for example, magic-angle twisted multilayer graphene ($N$ = 3, 4, 5 layers) forms a robust family of moir\'e superconductors, revealing that flat bands are a common feature but with important variations between even and odd layer numbers . Moreover, gate-tunable  superconductivity in ABC-trilayer graphene/hexagonal boron nitride systems have been observed, showing Mott insulating states and superconducting domes th
conclusion: We have studied the electronic properties of graphene by considering the properties of the special cases of graphene stacking, AA, AB, and ABC, and applying them to a general, arbitrarily stacked multilayer graphene. We observe a remarkable level of correspondence when we incorporate these stacks together in an arbitrary fashion. Specifically, in studying stacking faults we observed that the embedding of an ABC stack could generate a flat band that very much resembles the sole ABC stack's flat band. The possibility to induce these flat bands which generate correlated electrons while also maintaining linear bands which generate massless Dirac fermions has also been discussed. Moreover, we saw that an embedding of an AA stack allowed us to analytically solve the momenta for which there is an energy eigenvalue of zero. This then allowed us to make a more general statement about the zero energy momenta for arbitrary stacking. The existence of these properties suggests the possibility for a more general consideration of arbitrary stacking. In general, such arbitrary stacking could contain a multitude of parallel, Bernal, and rhombohedral stacking for which one could attempt to predict the properties thereof. We have done so for the momenta for which the energy eigenvalue is zero, which we have found out is in direct relation to the existence of AA substacks; it is therefore plausible that more properties could be associated with the existence of other types of substacks. A primitive method which is what we have shown to be successful in many situations would be to decompose the graphene stack in a well defined manner and considering the decomposition's properties to then predict that of the arbitrary stack; it is qualitatively accurate for the detection of flat bands, and quantitatively accurate for finding the rings of zero energy. These calculations furthermore show the ability to extend the flat band of graphene, which is promising for enhancing its many notable pro
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出并验证了任意堆叠多层石墨烯的低能能带结构可由其孤立子堆叠的特性推导得出，为理解复杂堆叠结构中的平带和零能量动量提供了通用分析框架。
2. 关键结论: (1) 任意堆叠多层石墨烯的低能电子结构可由其子堆叠的独立性质推断；(2) AA堆叠的零能量动量解析解可推广至任意堆叠结构；(3) 平行和菱面体堆叠的相互作用可用于任意堆叠多层石墨烯中的平带工程与增强。
3. 专家点评: 该工作通过紧束缚模型的解析分析，将复杂堆叠问题简化为基本堆叠单元的组合，提供了超越传统特定堆叠（如AB、ABC）研究的通用理论工具。然而，该分析主要基于非弛豫的理想堆叠模型，未考虑实际体系中不可避免的晶格弛豫和重构效应，这可能显著改变预测的能带特性，特别是在涉及平带的关联电子态研究中。

title: DFT and MLIP study of solute segregation to coherent and semi-coherent α-Fe/Fe$_3$C interfaces
abstract: Solute segregation to interfaces significantly impacts material behavior. A large majority of theoretical works focus on grain boundaries and coherent interfaces. Studies on semi-coherent interfaces are usually prohibited by the structural complexity, yielding models beyond the practical capability of density functional theory (DFT), or chemical complexity, restricted by the availability of (classical) interatomic potentials. This work investigates solute segregation to the coherent and semi-coherent $α$-Fe/Fe$_3$C interface in pearlite and its effect on mechanical properties using novel universal machine learning interatomic potentials (uMLIPs). DFT calculated solution enthalpies, segregation energetics, and changes in cohesion at the coherent interface are used to benchmark several state-of-the-art uMLIPs. We find that the GRACE-2L-OAM and GRACE-2L-OMAT models most accurately reproduce the quantum-mechanical predictions. While Cu has the strongest segregation energy of $\approx$ -0.3 eV to the coherent interface among the investigated tramp and trace elements, all of them, As, Cr, Cu, Mo, Ni, P, Sb, and Sn, exhibit significantly more negative segregation values reaching below $\approx$ -1.5 eV in the presence of the misfit dislocation at the semi-coherent interface. The deepest traps are identified in the vicinity of the dislocation core, although the spatial distribution of segregation energies differs markedly among the solute species. The cohesion of the coherent interface is strongly reduced by Sb, Sn, P, and As, and only mildly by Cu, whereas Ni shows a negligible effect, and Cr and Mo slightly enhance cohesion. In contrast, all investigated solutes (except for P) tend to embrittle the semi-coherent interface, with Sn and, especially, Sb having the strongest impact in tensile tests performed in the out-of-plane direction. Abstract shortened for ArXiv.
zh_abstract: 溶质在界面处的偏析会显著影响材料性能。绝大多数理论研究集中于晶界和共格界面，而对半共格界面的研究通常受限于其结构复杂性（构建的模型超出密度泛函理论实际计算能力）或化学复杂性（受经典原子间势可用性限制）。本研究利用新型通用机器学习原子间势，探究了珠光体中溶质在共格与半共格$α$-Fe/Fe$_3$C界面的偏析行为及其对力学性能的影响。通过DFT计算的固溶焓、偏析能以及共格界面内聚能变化，对多种先进通用机器学习原子间势进行了基准测试。研究发现GRACE-2L-OAM和GRACE-2L-OMAT模型最能精确复现量子力学预测结果。在研究的残余元素和痕量元素中，Cu在共格界面处表现出最强的偏析能（约-0.3 eV），而所有元素（As、Cr、Cu、Mo、Ni、P、Sb、Sn）在半共格界面的失配位错存在时，其偏析能显著更负，最低可达约-1.5 eV。尽管不同溶质元素的偏析能空间分布存在显著差异，最深能阱均位于位错核附近。共格界面的内聚能受Sb、Sn、P和As强烈削弱，受Cu轻微影响，Ni作用可忽略不计，而Cr和Mo则略有增强。相比之下，所有研究的溶质（除P外）均会促使半共格界面脆化，其中Sn和（特别是）Sb在垂直界面方向的拉伸测试中表现出最强的脆化效应。摘要内容为适配ArXiv要求有所缩减。
introduction:
Pearlite, formed through the eutectoid transformation of austenite, ranks among the decisive technological microstructures in steel. It is composed of the soft and ductile body-centered cubic ferrite ($$, space group $Im3m$) and the rigid orthorhombic cementite ($
$, space group $Pnma$) phase. The morphology of pearlite, which is highly influenced by its thermal history, is typically lamellar in a majority of industrial applications. The thickness of these lamellae plays a crucial role in adjusting the steels' strength and ductility, as described by the Hall-Petch relation~. Another critical factor influencing the mechanical properties of pearlitic steels is their chemical composition. Here, most of the literature focuses on the effect of alloying elements on the prior austenite grain size~, their impact on the eutectoid transformation point~, and  diffusion~, which influence the size of the pearlite colonies and lamella fineness~. For instance,  decreases the lamellae spacing by elevating the equilibrium eutectoid transformation temperature, which enables greater undercooling, and also by lowering the  diffusion coefficient in austenite~. According to~, elements such as  and , which stabilize ferrite and form carbides, generally lessen the spacing of lamellae, whereas those that stabilize austenite typically enlarge it. Alloying elements may also influence the lamellae's appearance. While  has been shown to decrease the regularity,  has been shown to have the opposite effect~. 

Despite the large interfacial area between ferrite and cementite in pearlite, comparatively little attention has been paid to the influence of alloying and trace elements on interface properties. One notable exception is  embrittlement, where both experimental~ and theoretical~ studies have explored  segregation and its effect on the ferrite–cementite interface. In contrast, solute segregation to pearlitic interfaces remains understudied, especially when compared with the extensive literatu
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 本研究首次结合高精度DFT与通用机器学习势函数，系统性地揭示了多种溶质原子在珠光体中半共格α-Fe/Fe$_3$C界面的异常强偏聚行为及其对界面力学性能的显著影响。

2. 关键结论: (1) 与共格界面相比，所有研究的溶质原子（As、Cr、Cu、Mo、Ni、P、Sb、Sn）在半共格界面的错配位错核心附近都表现出显著更强的偏聚趋势，偏聚能可低于-1.5 eV；(2) 不同溶质原子在界面上的空间偏聚分布存在明显差异；(3) 溶质对界面内聚力的影响在共格和半共格界面中表现不同：在共格界面中，Sb、Sn、P、As严重削弱内聚力，Cr、Mo轻微增强内聚力，Ni影响可忽略；而在半共格界面中，除P外所有溶质都导致界面脆化，其中Sb和Sn的影响最为严重。

3. 专家点评: 该工作通过先进的uMLIP方法突破了半共格界面研究的计算瓶颈，对理解珠光体钢的合金设计具有重要价值。然而，研究主要聚焦于静态偏聚和理想拉伸测试，未能考虑实际服役条件下界面在循环加载或高温环境中的动态演化行为。此外，结论部分缺失限制了对其完整科学贡献的评估，特别是缺乏与实验数据的直接对比验证。

title: Controlled Theory of Skyrmion Chern Bands in Moiré Quantum Materials: Quantum Geometry and Collective Dynamics
abstract: Recent experiments in moiré quantum materials exhibit quantized Hall states without an external magnetic field, motivating continuum mechanisms based on smooth moiré-periodic pseudospin textures. We present a controlled theory of skyrmion Chern bands generated by such textures. An exact local $SU(2)$ transformation reveals an emergent non-Abelian gauge field; for large branch splitting we perform an operator-level Schrieffer-Wolff expansion, yielding a single-branch Hamiltonian together with systematically dressed physical operators that define the projected interacting theory beyond strict adiabaticity. The leading dynamics is governed by a $U(1)$ Berry connection whose flux is set by the skyrmion density, while controlled non-adiabatic corrections are fixed by the texture's real-space quantum geometric tensor. In a Landau-level representation built from the averaged emergent field, moiré-periodic modulations induce Umklapp-resolved deformations of Girvin-MacDonald-Platzman kinematics and microscopic sources of excess optical quantum weight above the topological lower bound. Assuming a gapped Hall phase, we further derive a skyrmion-crystal effective field theory with a universal Berry-phase term and a noncommutative magnetophonon. Our results provide experimentally accessible signatures for twisted transition-metal dichalcogenide homobilayers and rhombohedral graphene aligned with hexagonal boron nitride.
zh_abstract: 近期莫尔量子材料实验中观测到无需外磁场的量子化霍尔态，这推动了基于平滑莫尔周期赝自旋纹理的连续介质机制研究。我们提出了一种由此类纹理产生斯格明子陈能带的受控理论。通过精确局域SU(2)变换揭示了 emergent 非阿贝尔规范场；在大能隙劈裂条件下，我们采用算子级Schrieffer-Wolff展开，得到单支哈密顿量及系统修饰的物理算子，从而在严格绝热近似之外定义了投影相互作用理论。主导动力学由U(1)贝里联络描述，其通量由斯格明子密度决定，而受控的非绝热修正则由纹理实空间量子几何张量确定。在基于平均emergent场构建的朗道能级表示中，莫尔周期调制会引起Girvin-MacDonald-Platzman动力学的Umklapp分辨变形，并产生超越拓扑下界的超额光学量子权重的微观源。假设存在有能隙的霍尔相，我们进一步推导出具有普适贝里相位项和非对易磁声子的斯格明子晶体有效场理论。本研究为扭曲过渡金属二硫族化合物同质双层及六方氮化硼衬底对齐的菱面体石墨烯提供了可实验观测的特征信号。
introduction:
Moir\'e superlattices have turned van der Waals heterostructures into tunable platforms for correlation-driven topological phases. In several settings, narrow and isolated Chern bands emerge at zero external magnetic field, and interactions stabilize integer and fractional quantized Hall states. Zero-field quantum Hall plateaus have been observed in twisted transition-metal dichalcogenide (TMD) homobilayers and in graphene-based heterostructures, establishing moir\'e Chern bands as a route to quantum anomalous Hall phases and fractional Chern insulators (FCIs)~. Graphene aligned with hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) provides an additional knob: stacking and alignment can strongly reshape Berry curvature and topology in moir\'e minibands~. In parallel, field-induced fractional quantum Hall states have been observed in systems with strong superlattice potentials~. At compressible fractional fillings---notably near an effective half filling in an emergent Landau-level description---long-wavelength composite-fermion theories based on flux attachment provide a complementary framework~. Optical probes such as terahertz (THz) spectroscopy and inelastic Raman scattering give direct access to neutral collective modes~.

Despite their close connection to quantum Hall physics, moir\'e Chern bands are not simply continuum Landau levels in disguise. Berry curvature and quantum metric are generally inhomogeneous, and the projected density operators carry intrinsic Umklapp structure: density components at momenta differing by moir\'e reciprocal lattice vectors are coupled. These microscopic features can reorganize collective spectra and redistribute oscillator strength, making finite-crystal-momentum modes visible in nominally long-wavelength channels through Umklapp-induced mode folding. A theory that keeps both topology and moir\'e periodicity explicit is therefore essential for interpreting optical spectroscopy and for diagnosing how closely a given Chern band approaches the ideal
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种受控理论框架，通过精确的局域SU(2)变换和非绝热修正，系统性地描述了莫尔量子材料中斯格明子陈数能带的量子几何与集体动力学。

2. 关键结论: 在大的分支劈裂下，通过算子级别的Schrieffer-Wolff展开可以得到单分支哈密顿量，并系统性地修正物理算符；主导动力学由U(1)贝里联络决定，其通量由斯格明子密度设定，而非绝热修正则由纹理的实空间量子几何张量固定；在基于平均涌现场构建的朗道能级表示中，莫尔周期调制诱导了Girvin-MacDonald-Platzman动力学的Umklapp分辨形变，以及超出拓扑下界的额外光学量子权重的微观来源；对于有能隙的霍尔相，推导出了包含通用贝里相项和非对易磁声子的斯格明子晶体有效场论。

3. 专家点评: 该工作的重要意义在于为理解莫尔陈数能带的微观起源提供了严格的理论基础，特别是将量子几何与拓扑性质直接联系起来。理论预测的光学量子权重增强和集体模式特征为实验探测（如太赫兹光谱）提供了可验证的途径；然而，该理论依赖于大分支劈裂和能隙霍尔相的假设，在实际材料中这些条件可能不完全满足，且对强关联效应的处理仍需进一步探索。

title: Machine learning electronic structure and atomistic properties from the external potential
abstract: Electronic structure calculations remain a major bottleneck in atomistic simulations and, not surprisingly, have attracted significant attention in machine learning (ML). Most existing approaches learn a direct map from molecular geometries, typically represented as graphs or encoded local environments, to molecular properties or use ML as a surrogate for electronic structure theory by targeting quantities such as Fock or density matrices expressed in an atomic orbital (AO) basis.   Inspired by the Hohenberg-Kohn theorem, in this work, we propose an operator-centered framework in which the external (nuclear) potential, expressed in an AO basis, serves as the model input. From this operator, we construct hierarchical, body-ordered representations of atomic configurations that closely mirror the principles underlying several popular atom-centered descriptors. At the same time, the matrix-valued nature of the external potential provides a natural connection to equivariant message-passing neural networks. In particular, we show that successive products of the external potential provide a scalable route to equivariant message passing and enable an efficient description of long-range effects. We demonstrate that this approach can be used to model molecular properties, such as energies and dipole moments, from the external potential, or learn effective operator-to-operator maps, including mappings to the Fock matrix and the reduced density matrix from which multiple molecular observables can be simultaneously derived.
zh_abstract: 电子结构计算仍然是原子尺度模拟中的一个主要瓶颈，因而在机器学习(ML)领域获得了广泛关注。现有方法大多学习从分子几何结构（通常表示为图或编码的局域环境）到分子性质的直接映射，或者通过以原子轨道(AO)基表示的福克矩阵或密度矩阵等量为目标，将机器学习作为电子结构理论的替代模型。受Hohenberg-Kohn定理启发，本研究提出了一种以算子为中心的框架：将以原子轨道基表示的外场（原子核）势作为模型输入。基于该算子，我们构建了原子构型的层次化、体序表示，其紧密映射了多种常用原子中心描述符的基本原理。同时，外场势的矩阵值特性为等变消息传递神经网络提供了自然连接。特别地，我们证明通过对外场势进行连续乘积运算，可为等变消息传递提供可扩展路径，并实现对长程效应的高效描述。实验表明，该方法既可用于根据外场势建模分子性质（如能量和偶极矩），也能学习有效的算子-算子映射关系——包括映射至福克矩阵和约化密度矩阵，从而可同时推导多个分子观测量。
introduction:
Machine learning (ML) is reshaping the modeling of complex physical systems, enabling faster and more accurate simulations and new approaches to predicting quantum mechanical properties.
In atomistic modeling, this progress spans the development of accurate interatomic potentials~, surrogate models for individual properties such as dipole moments~ or excitation energies~, and more recently, models that learn
elements of electronic structure directly. By targeting the fundamental ingredients of quantum mechanics, such as self-consistent electronic densities, effective single-particle Hamiltonians, or density matrices, ML models provide a route to unified prediction/optimization of multiple observables within a single framework, in addition to accelerating underlying electronic structure calculations.

Within these workflows, ML can interact with electronic structure in multiple ways. 
Some approaches take ingredients such as effective one-electron Hamiltonians as inputs to predict a wide range of molecular properties~, while others bypass traditional QM calculations altogether by directly predicting electronic density coefficients~, Fock matrices ~, density matrices~, or density functionals~. Several complementary strategies integrate ML into a modular hybrid QM-ML pipeline, where electronic operators serve as intermediate optimizable representations, rather than final targets~.  
Despite these conceptual differences, atomic configurations are commonly represented as graphs or point clouds across these workflows, whether the target is a molecular property, such as energy or dipole moment, or a converged electronic operator, such as a Fock or density matrix. While these approaches have been demonstrably successful, they face the challenge of learning complex nonlinear correlations between inputs and outputs, especially in the latter case, where the outputs are high-dimensional matrix representations of quantum operators on a basis, typically chosen to comprise atom-ce
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种以基组下的外部势算符为中心输入的新型机器学习框架，绕过了传统的基于几何构型或局域环境的描述符，直接映射到电子结构算符或分子性质。

2. 关键结论: 外部势算符的矩阵形式可构建出与多种原子中心描述符原理相似的、具有层次性和体序性的构型表示；该算符的矩阵性质自然与等变消息传递神经网络相关联；通过外部势算符的连续乘积，可以实现可扩展的等变消息传递并高效描述长程效应；该框架既能用于从外部势预测分子性质，也能学习有效的算符间映射。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作在概念上极具启发性，它将霍恩伯格-科恩定理的数学形式与等变神经网络的计算框架进行了优雅的融合，为统一处理多种电子结构问题提供了潜在的理论基础。然而，该方法的实际计算效率和对大型复杂体系的泛化能力仍有待于广泛的基准测试来验证，其性能可能高度依赖于所选原子基组的质量和完备性。

title: Rethinking Diffusion Models with Symmetries through Canonicalization with Applications to Molecular Graph Generation
abstract: Many generative tasks in chemistry and science involve distributions invariant to group symmetries (e.g., permutation and rotation). A common strategy enforces invariance and equivariance through architectural constraints such as equivariant denoisers and invariant priors. In this paper, we challenge this tradition through the alternative canonicalization perspective: first map each sample to an orbit representative with a canonical pose or order, train an unconstrained (non-equivariant) diffusion or flow model on the canonical slice, and finally recover the invariant distribution by sampling a random symmetry transform at generation time. Building on a formal quotient-space perspective, our work provides a comprehensive theory of canonical diffusion by proving: (i) the correctness, universality and superior expressivity of canonical generative models over invariant targets; (ii) canonicalization accelerates training by removing diffusion score complexity induced by group mixtures and reducing conditional variance in flow matching. We then show that aligned priors and optimal transport act complementarily with canonicalization and further improves training efficiency. We instantiate the framework for molecular graph generation under $S_n \times SE(3)$ symmetries. By leveraging geometric spectra-based canonicalization and mild positional encodings, canonical diffusion significantly outperforms equivariant baselines in 3D molecule generation tasks, with similar or even less computation. Moreover, with a novel architecture Canon, CanonFlow achieves state-of-the-art performance on the challenging GEOM-DRUG dataset, and the advantage remains large in few-step generation.
zh_abstract: 化学与科学领域的许多生成任务涉及对群对称性（如置换、旋转）不变的分布。传统方法通常通过架构约束（如等变去噪器和不变先验）来强制实现不变性与等变性。本文提出了一种替代性方案——典范化视角：首先将每个样本映射至具有典范姿态或顺序的轨道代表，在典范切片上训练无约束（非等变）扩散或流模型，最后在生成时通过随机对称变换恢复不变分布。基于形式化的商空间视角，我们通过严格证明建立了典范扩散的完整理论：(i) 在不变目标上，典范生成模型具有正确性、普适性及更优的表达能力；(ii) 典范化通过消除群混合引入的扩散评分复杂性、降低流匹配的条件方差，从而加速训练。我们进一步证明对齐先验与最优传输可与典范化形成互补，进一步提升训练效率。针对 $S_n \times SE(3)$ 对称性下的分子图生成任务，我们实现了该框架。通过基于几何谱的典范化与轻量位置编码，典范扩散在3D分子生成任务中以相当甚至更少的计算量显著超越等变基线模型。此外，凭借新颖架构 Canon，CanonFlow 在具有挑战性的 GEOM-DRUG 数据集上实现了最先进性能，且在少步生成中仍保持显著优势。
introduction:
Generative modeling is fundamentally grounded in the geometric structure of data. In domains such as computer vision and natural language processing (NLP), data exhibits specific symmetries—for instance, objects in images possess translation invariance, while semantic meaning in text relies on sequential order. 
Recent diffusion~ and flow-based~ generative models have achieved great success across images~, videos~, text~, and biomolecules~. 
Crucially, however, modalities like images are not fully invariant to all transformations: an upside-down landscape or a reversed sentence typically loses its semantic validity. Consequently, state-of-the-art diffusion models in these fields explicitly break symmetries: they utilize fixed grid topologies or inject positional encodings (PEs) to anchor the generation process to a canonical orientation.

In contrast, molecular generation operates on a fundamentally different geometric space defined by the direct product of permutation and Euclidean symmetries, $S_N  SE(3)$. Unlike natural images, a rotated molecule or a re-indexed molecular graph represents the exact same physical entity.
Molecular generative models typically enforce the constraints by building equivariant architectures and/or invariant priors~, so that the learned vector field (score/velocity) respects the group action and the generated distribution is symmetry-consistent. While principled, this approach often incurs substantial architectural and computational overhead (e.g., equivariant layers, tensor algebra), and it can obscure an additional challenge: symmetry creates latent “gauge” ambiguity, so intermediate noisy states may correspond to multiple equivalent group-transformed configurations. This complex mixture-like nature results in  ``trajectory crossing” and conflicting gradients, as the model struggles to determine  valid orientation to generate from a symmetric noise vector, making the learned dynamics less straight.

[t]
    
    [width=]{motiv.pdf}
conclusion: We studied symmetry in diffusion/flow-based generative modeling through the lens of canonicalization and transport. For molecular data, where representations are invariant to permutations and rigid motions, we showed that symmetry can induce latent  at intermediate noise levels, inflating conditional variance and making few-step solvers less reliable. Canonicalization provides a principled gauge fixing: it collapses each orbit to a unique slice representative, removing the symmetry-induced ambiguity term and enabling the use of expressive non-equivariant backbones with stable, fixed indexing semantics (e.g., rank-based inputs). The remaining within-slice  difficulty can be mitigated by better aligned priors and near-Monge couplings during training. Together, these results clarify when and why canonicalization and OT act complementarily, how to avoid projection- or conditioning-induced mismatches, and how to design practical, scalable symmetry-aware generators for molecules that improve few-step quality while preserving invariance by construction. Canonical diffusion yields state-of-the-art results across several metrics on popular geometric molecule generation benchmarks, with significant advantages in training convergence.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出并系统论证了通过“规范化”而非传统“等变性架构约束”来处理生成模型中对称性问题的新范式，即在规范切片上训练非等变扩散模型，再通过随机对称变换恢复不变分布。

2. 关键结论: (1) 规范化生成模型在处理不变目标时具有正确性、普适性及优于等变模型的表达能力；(2) 规范化通过消除群混合引入的扩散分数复杂性并降低流匹配中的条件方差，从而加速训练；(3) 对齐先验和最优传输与规范化互补，可进一步提高训练效率；(4) 在分子图生成的实例中，该方法在3D分子生成任务上显著优于等变基线模型，并在GEOM-DRUG数据集上达到最先进性能。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作挑战了依赖等变架构处理对称性的传统思路，其理论分析深刻揭示了对称性在中间状态引入的“规范模糊性”是训练复杂性和轨迹交叉等问题的根源。将对称性处理从模型架构设计转移到数据预处理（规范化），为利用更强大、计算效率更高的非等变骨干网络开辟了新途径，具有重要的方法论意义。然而，该方法的成功高度依赖于找到有效的规范化映射，其普适性在不同对称群和数据结构中的可行性仍需进一步探索和验证。

title: Vision Transformer for Multi-Domain Phase Retrieval in Coherent Diffraction Imaging
abstract: Bragg coherent diffraction imaging (BCDI) phase retrieval becomes rapidly difficult in the strong-phase regime, where a crystal contains distortions beyond half a lattice spacing. An important special case is the phase domain problem, where blocks of a crystal are displaced with sharp jumps at domain walls. The strong-phase, here defined as beyond $\pm π/2$, generates split Bragg peaks and dense fringe structure for which classical iterative solvers often stagnate or return different solutions from different initialisations. Here, we introduce an unsupervised Fourier Vision Transformer (Fourier ViT) to solve this block-phase, multi-domain phase-retrieval problem directly from measured 2D Bragg diffraction intensities. Fourier ViT couples reciprocal-space information globally through multiscale Fourier token mixing, while shallow convolutional front and back-ends provide local filtering and reconstruction. We validate the approach on large-scale synthetic datasets of Voronoi multi-domain crystals with strong-phase contrast under realistic noise corruptions, and on experimental diffraction from a $\mathrm{La}_{2-x}\mathrm{Ca}_x\mathrm{MnO}_4$ nanocrystal. Across the regimes considered, Fourier ViT achieves the lowest reciprocal-space mismatch ($χ^2$) among the compared methods and preserves domain-resolved phase reconstructions for increasing numbers of domains. On experimental data, with the same real-space support, Fourier ViT matches the iterative benchmark $χ^2$ while improving robustness to random initialisations, yielding a higher success rate of low-$χ^2$ reconstructions than the complex convolutional neural network baseline.
zh_abstract: 布拉格相干衍射成像(BCDI)的相位恢复在强相位区（即晶体畸变超过半个晶格间距的区域）会迅速变得困难。其中一种重要的特殊情况是相位畴问题——晶体块在畴壁处发生突变位移。强相位（此处定义为超过±π/2）会产生分裂的布拉格峰和密集条纹结构，导致传统迭代求解器常陷入停滞或随初始化不同返回相异解。本文提出一种无监督傅里叶视觉变换器(Fourier ViT)，可直接通过测量的二维布拉格衍射强度解决这类块状相位、多畴结构的相位恢复问题。该模型通过多尺度傅里叶令牌混合实现倒易空间信息的全局耦合，同时利用浅层卷积前后端进行局部滤波与重建。我们在含真实噪声的强相位对比Voronoi多畴晶体大规模合成数据集，以及$\mathrm{La}_{2-x}\mathrm{Ca}_x\mathrm{MnO}_4$纳米晶体实验衍射数据上验证了该方法。在所有测试场景中，Fourier ViT在对比方法中实现了最低的倒易空间失配度($χ^2$)，并在畴数量增加时保持畴分辨相位重建能力。对于实验数据，在相同实空间支撑条件下，Fourier ViT在匹配迭代基准$χ^2$指标的同时，提升了对随机初始化的鲁棒性，其低$χ^2$重建成功率优于复杂的卷积神经网络基线。

title: Stacking-dependent magnetic ordering in bilayer ScI$_{2}$
abstract: Stacking-dependent magnetism in two-dimensional van der Waals materials offers an effective route for controlling magnetic order without chemical modification. Here, we present a combined first-principles and finite-temperature study of magnetic ordering in bilayer ScI$_{2}$ with different stacking configurations. Using density functional theory with Hubbard-U corrections, we investigate the structural, electronic, and magnetic properties of monolayer and bilayer ScI$_{2}$ in $AA$, $AB$, and $BA$ stackings. The electronic structure exhibits a spin-polarized ground state dominated by Sc-$d$ states near the Fermi level. Mapping total energies onto an effective Heisenberg spin Hamiltonian reveals strong intralayer ferromagnetic exchange that is largely insensitive to stacking, while the inter-layer exchange depends strongly on stacking geometry, favoring ferromagnetic coupling for $AA$ and $BA$ stackings and antiferromagnetic coupling for the $AB$ stacking. Spin-orbit coupling calculations show that both monolayer and bilayer ScI$_{2}$ possess a robust out-of-plane magnetic easy axis. Finite-temperature Monte Carlo simulations indicate that all bilayer configurations sustain magnetic ordering at and above room temperature, with ordering temperatures in the range $360-375$ K, as confirmed by Binder cumulant analysis and finite-size scaling. These results demonstrate that stacking geometry enables control of the magnetic ground state in bilayer ScI$_{2}$ without significantly affecting its thermal stability.
zh_abstract: 二维范德瓦尔斯材料中堆叠依赖的磁性为实现无需化学改性的磁序调控提供了有效途径。本文通过第一性原理与有限温度模拟相结合的方法，研究了不同堆叠构型双层ScI$_{2}$的磁有序行为。采用Hubbard-U修正的密度泛函理论，我们系统分析了单层及$AA$、$AB$、$BA$堆叠双层ScI$_{2}$的结构、电子和磁学性质。电子结构分析显示其自旋极化基态主要由费米能级附近的Sc-$d$轨道主导。通过将总能量映射至有效海森堡自旋模型，发现层内铁磁交换作用对堆叠方式不敏感，而层间交换作用强烈依赖于堆叠构型：$AA$与$BA$堆叠呈现铁磁耦合，$AB$堆叠则表现为反铁磁耦合。自旋轨道耦合计算表明单层与双层ScI$_{2}$均具有稳定的垂直磁各向异性。基于有限温度蒙特卡洛模拟，所有双层构型在室温及以上温度均能维持磁有序，其有序温度经Binder累积量分析与有限尺寸标度确认处于360-375 K区间。这些结果证明堆叠几何可有效调控双层ScI$_{2}$的磁基态，同时不会显著影响其热稳定性。

title: Antiferroaxial altermagnetism
abstract: The antiferroaxial state is emerging as an important ferroic order in condensed matter systems. Here, we establish antiferroaxial altermagnetism as a broadly prevalent, generic, and microscopically grounded multiferroic mechanism, in which antiferroaxial counter-rotating distortions both induce altermagnetism and enable its deterministic and reversible switching. Within a unified Landau-theory and symmetry framework, we identify a symmetry-allowed trilinear invariant coupling the antiferroaxial order, the Néel vector, and the altermagnetic order, and derive general symmetry criteria for its occurrence. This coupling locks the induced altermagnetism to the antiferroaxial order, so that reversing the latter reverses the spin splitting and associated time-reversal-odd responses, such as anomalous Hall conductivity. We provide a practical spin group dictionary mapping Néel-vector representations to the resulting $d$-, $g$-, and $i$-wave antiferroaxial altermagnetism, validate the mechanism with ligand-rotation tight-binding models and first-principles calculations, and identify many candidate materials by screening the MAGNDATA and C2DB databases. Our results elevate antiferroaxiality to a universal ferroic control knob for structurally programmable altermagnetic spintronics.
zh_abstract: 反轴态正逐渐成为凝聚态体系中一种重要的铁序形式。本文首次将反轴交替磁性确立为一种广泛存在、普适且具有微观基础的多铁性机制，其中反轴反向旋转畸变既能诱导交替磁性，又可实现其确定性与可逆性切换。基于统一的朗道理论与对称性框架，我们识别出连接反轴序、奈尔矢量与交替磁序的对称性允许三重线性耦合项，并推导出其存在的普适对称性判据。该耦合将诱导的交替磁性锁定于反轴序，使得反转反轴序即可翻转自旋劈裂及相关的时间反演奇响应（如反常霍尔电导）。我们构建了实用的自旋群字典，将奈尔矢量表示映射至由此产生的d波、g波与i波反轴交替磁性，通过配体旋转紧束缚模型和第一性原理计算验证了该机制，并通过筛选MAGNDATA与C2DB数据库鉴定了多种候选材料。本研究将反轴性提升为结构可编程交替磁自旋电子学的通用铁序调控开关。

title: Fourier Transformers for Latent Crystallographic Diffusion and Generative Modeling
abstract: The discovery of new crystalline materials calls for generative models that handle periodic boundary conditions, crystallographic symmetries, and physical constraints, while scaling to large and structurally diverse unit cells. We propose a reciprocal-space generative pipeline that represents crystals through a truncated Fourier transform of the species-resolved unit-cell density, rather than modeling atomic coordinates directly. This representation is periodicity-native, admits simple algebraic actions of space-group symmetries, and naturally supports variable atomic multiplicities during generation, addressing a common limitation of particle-based approaches. Using only nine Fourier basis functions per spatial dimension, our approach reconstructs unit cells containing up to 108 atoms per chemical species. We instantiate this pipeline with a transformer variational autoencoder over complex-valued Fourier coefficients, and a latent diffusion model that generates in the compressed latent space. We evaluate reconstruction and latent diffusion on the LeMaterial benchmark and compare unconditional generation against coordinate-based baselines in the small-cell regime ($\leq 16$ atoms per unit cell).
zh_abstract: 新型晶体材料的发现需要能够处理周期性边界条件、晶体学对称性和物理约束的生成模型，同时还需适应大型且结构多样的晶胞。我们提出了一种倒空间生成流程，通过物种分辨晶胞密度的截断傅里叶变换来表征晶体，而非直接建模原子坐标。这种表征方式原生支持周期性，允许空间群对称性的简单代数运算，并在生成过程中天然支持可变原子多重性，从而解决了基于粒子方法的常见局限性。每个空间维度仅使用九个傅里叶基函数，我们的方法就能重构每个化学物种含多达108个原子的晶胞。我们通过基于复数值傅里叶系数的变换器变分自编码器（transformer variational autoencoder）及其在压缩潜空间中进行生成的潜扩散模型（latent diffusion model）实现了该流程。我们在LeMaterial基准上评估了重构和潜扩散性能，并在小晶胞体系（每个晶胞≤16个原子）中与基于坐标的基线方法进行了无条件生成对比。
introduction:
The discovery of new crystalline materials underpins progress in energy storage, catalysis, and ionic transport.
Useful phenomena may arise in compositionally rich and structurally complex unit cells containing many atoms and multiple chemical species .
Yet even for small unit cells, the size of the admissible design space scales rapidly with atom count and compositional diversity.

Exhaustively exploring such high-dimensional design spaces using density functional theory (DFT)  is computationally costly, motivating the development of generative models that can propose physically plausible candidate structures at scale.






Recent generative models (e.g. ) can learn distributions over known crystals and propose new candidates for downstream screening, but extending these approaches to realistic crystallographic regimes remains challenging. Crystals are inherently periodic, with geometry defined on a three-dimensional torus and constrained by crystallographic symmetries , while many practically relevant materials exhibit variable atomic multiplicities and stoichiometries. Coordinate- and particle-based generators handle periodicity and symmetry through geometric conventions and equivariant architectures, but often incur substantial modeling overhead and, in many diffusion formulations, implicitly assume a fixed number of atoms. This limits support for generative moves that change multiplicity and complicates stable behavior across symmetry subgroups when composition changes.


In this work we take a different view: we represent each crystal through the truncated Fourier transform of a species-resolved unit-cell density, and perform learning and generation directly in reciprocal space. This representation is periodicity-native by construction and provides a compact, fixed-shape description that scales with unit-cell complexity. Importantly, crystallographic symmetries act on Fourier coefficients via simple algebraic transformations (permutations of wave vectors and
conclusion:
We presented a reciprocal-space generative pipeline for crystalline materials based on a truncated Fourier representation of species-resolved unit-cell density. This encoding makes periodicity exact, exposes crystallographic symmetries as simple algebraic structure in reciprocal space, and avoids fixed-size point-set assumptions to enable variable atomic multiplicities during generation.
We instantiate this representation with a complex-valued transformer VAE that compresses Fourier content into a structured auxiliary latent ladder, together with a latent reverse diffusion model that operates directly in this compressed space.

Empirically, we show that modest Fourier resolution supports exact coordinate recovery on rational grids for structurally complex, multi-species unit cells, and that reverse diffusion remains stable in the signal-dominant regime under appropriate architectural choices. While unconditional diffusion amplifies the small-cell regime present in the meta-stable training distribution, the encoder and diffuser remain capable of processing higher atom-count structures, indicating that conditioned or guided diffusion is a promising direction for extending generative coverage. Overall, these results position reciprocal-space modeling as a scalable alternative to coordinate-based crystal generators.



This work advances generative modeling for crystalline materials by introducing a reciprocal-space formulation that natively handles periodicity and supports scalable latent diffusion. By enabling efficient modeling of structurally complex crystals, the proposed approach may accelerate computational materials discovery and screening workflows. The work is intended for scientific research applications and does not raise foreseeable negative societal impacts.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种在倒易空间通过截断傅里叶变换表示晶体、并利用变换器变分自编码器和隐空间扩散模型进行生成的创新方法，从根本上解决了周期性边界条件和可变原子多样性问题。
2. 关键结论: (1) 通过截断傅里叶变换表示晶体，使周期性成为固有特性，并将晶体学对称性转化为倒易空间中的简单代数变换; (2) 该方法避免了基于坐标的方法对固定原子数量的假设，支持生成过程中原子多样性的变化; (3) 仅使用每空间维度九个傅里叶基函数即可重建包含多达108个原子的复杂晶胞; (4) 通过变换器VAE将傅里叶系数压缩到结构化隐空间，并在该空间进行扩散生成。
3. 专家点评: 该方法在晶体生成的理论框架上做出了重要突破，其倒易空间表示优雅地解决了周期性边界条件和对称性约束这一根本难题。然而，论文评估主要局限于小晶胞体系，其在大晶胞和复杂化学成分材料生成方面的实际效果与可扩展性仍有待验证；此外，基于傅里叶截断的表示可能对局部原子环境的精细结构敏感度不足，这可能会影响生成材料的功能特性预测准确性。

title: Realistic tight-binding model for V2Se2O-family altermagnets
abstract: Following earlier theoretical prediction, intercalated V2Se2O-family altermagnets such as RbV2Te2O and KV2Se2O have now been experimentally confirmed as d-wave altermagnets, representing the only known van der Waals layered altermagnetic systems. By combining crystal-symmetry-paired spin-momentum locking (CSML) with the layered structure, the V2Se2O-family offers a suitable platform for studying low-dimensional spintronic responses and exploring the interplay among multiple quantum degrees of freedom. To establish a concrete theoretical foundation for understanding and utilizing these materials, we investigate six representative members of the V2Se2O-family and construct a realistic tight-binding model parameterized by first-principles calculations, which is benchmarked by experimental measurements. This model accurately captures essential altermagnetic electronic properties, including CSML and noncollinear spin-conserved currents. It further incorporates strain-coupling parameters, enabling the simulation of strain-tunable responses such as the piezo-Hall effects. This realistic model allows systematic exploration of multiple degrees of freedom (like spin, valley, and layer) within a single system, and lays the groundwork for understanding their coupling with other quantum materials, such as topological insulators and superconductors, thereby advancing both the fundamental understanding and potential device applications of this novel class of layered altermagnets.
zh_abstract: 继早期理论预测之后，插层型V₂Se₂O族交变磁体（如RbV₂Te₂O和KV₂Se₂O）现已被实验证实为d波交变磁体，成为目前唯一已知的范德瓦尔斯层状交变磁体系。该材料家族通过将晶体对称性配对的自旋-动量锁定（CSML）与层状结构相结合，为研究低维自旋电子响应和探索多重量子自由度间的相互作用提供了理想平台。为建立理解与利用这类材料的坚实理论基础，我们研究了V₂Se₂O家族的六个代表性成员，基于第一性原理计算构建了参数化的真实紧束缚模型，并通过实验测量进行了基准验证。该模型精确捕捉了交变磁体的核心电子特性，包括CSML和非共线自旋守恒电流，进一步引入了应变耦合参数，使得模拟应变可调响应（如压电霍尔效应）成为可能。这一真实模型支持在单一体系内系统探索多重自由度（如自旋、能谷和层自由度），并为理解其与拓扑绝缘体、超导体等其他量子材料的耦合奠定基础，从而推动对此类新型层状交变磁体的基础认知与潜在器件应用。
introduction:
Altermagnets (AMs) uniquely combine nonrelativistic spin-splitting with zero net-magnetization, thereby merging the advantages of both ferromagnets and antiferromagnets . These novel properties originate from specific crystal symmetry $$ (rotation or mirror), which simultaneously connects antiparallel magnetic sublattices in real space and enforces $$-paired spin–momentum locking (CSML) in reciprocal space . This fundamental mechanism gives rise to various novel phenomena, including noncollinear spin-conserved currents , unconventional itinerant piezomagnetism , magneto-optical effects  and giant/tunnel magnetoresistance . These $$-governed features in both real and momentum space establish AM as a highly promising platform for generating, manipulating, and detecting spin responses, holding significant potential for next-generation spintronic devices .

However, experimental realization of altermagnetic candidates, particularly those capable of efficiently generating spin currents, remains severely limited. This is primarily due to stringent symmetry and magnetic-order requirements. Specifically, the generation of nonrelativistic spin current necessitates anisotropic spin-polarized conductivity, which can be eliminated by rotational symmetry higher than two-fold within the same magnetic sublattice . Consequently, $g$-wave altermagnets like MnTe  and CrSb , exhibit isotropic conductivity due to their three-fold rotation, thus are excluded as effective spin sources. Additional complications arise from intricate magnetic orders: for instance, the magnetic ground state of RuO$_2$ is still debated , while MnTe$_2$ exhibits noncoplanar magnetic order breaking spin conservation . Moreover, most reported altermagnets are three-dimensional bulk crystals that cannot be easily exfoliated into two-dimensional forms, limiting their integration into nanoscale devices and their potential coupling with other quantum materials such as superconductors and topological insulators . In
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 为V2Se2O家族反铁磁体构建了一个参数化的紧束缚模型，该模型结合了晶体对称性锁定的自旋-动量耦合与层状结构，并能模拟应变可调响应。

2. 关键结论: (1) V2Se2O家族是唯一已知的范德华层状d波反铁磁体，为研究低维自旋电子学响应提供了平台; (2) 所构建的紧束缚模型准确捕捉了反铁磁电子特性，包括晶体对称性锁定的自旋-动量耦合和非共线自旋守恒电流; (3) 模型包含应变耦合参数，能够模拟压电霍尔效应等应变可调响应; (4) 该模型为探索自旋、能谷和层间等多自由度耦合及其与拓扑绝缘体/超导体等其他量子材料的界面效应奠定了基础。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作通过构建参数化的紧束缚模型，为理解层状反铁磁体的基本物理和潜在器件应用提供了重要理论工具。模型结合第一性原理计算和实验测量，增强了其预测可靠性，特别是应变耦合参数的引入扩展了其在可调器件模拟方面的应用价值。然而，模型的实际预测能力仍需更多独立实验验证，且对材料界面效应的描述可能受限于模型的简化假设。

title: Markov State Models for Tracking Reaction Dynamics on Catalytic Nanoparticles
abstract: Markov state models (MSMs) are a powerful tool to analyze and coarse-grain complex dynamical data into interpretable kinetic processes. This capability is particularly important in heterogeneous catalysis, where a medley of reactants and intermediates interact on surfaces that might simultaneously experience structural fluctuations. For these very complex systems, standard transition state theory (TST) approaches are no longer appropriate, motivating alternative approaches that can retain dynamical complexity while providing physical insight. With machine learned interatomic potentials being more and more ubiquitous, directly simulating complex catalytic systems with molecular dynamics (MD) is becoming increasingly feasible. Extending MSMs to dynamically coarse grain MD simulation data of catalytic processes, we analyze hydrogen dynamics on rhodium catalysts with slab and nanoparticle geometries over a range of hydrogen surface concentrations. Somewhat counterintuitively, nanoparticle features, such as corners and edges, effectively slow down the association/dissociation process, and the cooperative behavior of hydrogen-hydrogen interactions leads to a non-monotonic concentration dependence of the rates, which would not be predicted with standard TST.
zh_abstract: 马尔可夫状态模型（MSM）是一种强大工具，能将复杂动力学数据分析和粗粒化为可解释的动力学过程。这一能力在多相催化领域尤为重要——在该领域中反应物与中间体在可能持续发生结构波动的表面相互作用。对于此类高度复杂的体系，传统的过渡态理论方法已不再适用，这促使我们发展既能保留动力学复杂性又能提供物理洞察的替代方法。随着机器学习势函数日益普及，利用分子动力学直接模拟复杂催化体系正变得越来越可行。通过将MSM拓展至催化过程的分子动力学模拟数据动态粗粒度化，我们分析了不同氢表面浓度下具有板状/纳米颗粒结构的铑催化剂上的氢动力学行为。与直觉相反的是，纳米颗粒的棱角特征会有效减缓结合/解离过程，且氢-氢相互作用的协同行为会导致速率呈现非单调的浓度依赖性——这是传统过渡态理论无法预测的。
introduction:
Uncovering the mechanisms that drive the selectivity and efficiency of catalytic reactions is essential when aiming to improve known catalysts and propose new catalyst materials. 

The catalytic activity of a material depends on its composition and structure, as well as operating conditions like temperature and pressure. Typical theoretical approaches to determining reaction mechanisms and rates with  accuracy identify the so-called rate limiting step, calculate the energy barriers of the reactive events, and estimate the corresponding rate constants within harmonic transition state theory (TST).~

For example, when analyzing a dissociative adsorption reaction of a small molecule on a catalytic surface, great care is taken to find the optimal binding orientation, the lowest energy transition state, and the vibrational frequencies of reactants and intermediates, such that one can calculate accurate adsorption and dissociation energies.~ However, these calculations are often of a single adsorbate on an otherwise bare, defect-free surface. 

As a step beyond this static picture and to capture the dynamical evolution and statistical interplay of various processes, kinetic Monte Carlo (KMC) models have been successfully applied to catalytic systems.~ This type of first-principles-based microkinetic modeling usually builds on a predefined event table of possible  processes for which the corresponding rate constants are again determined by combining electronic structure calculations with hTST.
However, under operating conditions, the structure of the catalyst is under constant change, continuously creating and destroying active sites on timescales that might be comparable to the catalytic reaction itself.~ Additionally, the concentration and number of chemical species interacting on the catalyst surface can widely fluctuate during operation.


Identifying all possible atomistic processes and their corresponding energy barriers for such complex scenarios by hand is tedious
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 将马尔可夫状态模型应用于催化纳米颗粒体系，揭示了传统过渡态理论无法预测的氢动力学非单调浓度依赖性和纳米结构特征对反应速率的反直觉减缓效应。

2. 关键结论: (1) 纳米颗粒的角、边等特征反而会减慢氢的缔合/解离过程; (2) 氢-氢相互作用的协同行为导致反应速率随浓度变化呈现非单调性; (3) 在存在结构涨落和多种表面物种的复杂催化系统中，标准过渡态理论方法不再适用

3. 专家点评: 这项工作通过动力学粗粒化方法突破了传统静态能垒分析的限制，为理解真实催化环境中的复杂动力学行为提供了新范式。然而，该方法的准确性严重依赖于机器学习势函数的可靠性，且结论主要基于铑-氢模型体系，其普适性仍需在不同催化体系中进一步验证。将MSM与实时结构演化相结合可能是未来发展的关键方向。

title: MoireStudio: A Universal Twisted Electronic Structure Calculation Package
abstract: Twistronics is an emerging and captivating field in condensed matter physics and material science. However, accurately and efficiently calculating the electronic structures of twisted systems remains a significant challenge. To address this, we have developed MoireStudio, a universal Python-based computational package for twisted electronic structures. Its functionalities include commensurate structure search, structure generation, parameterization, and construction for tight-binding models and continuum models, and the precise incorporation of full relaxation effects. The package is applicable to arbitrary combinations of two-dimensional materials, including rectangular lattices and heterostructures. User-friendly and easy to use, MoireStudio supports parallel large-scale computations, provides visualization capabilities, and offers interfaces with third-party software. It is poised to become a convenient and powerful tool for researchers in twistronics fields.
zh_abstract: 扭角电子学是凝聚态物理和材料科学中一个新兴且极具吸引力的研究领域。然而，如何准确高效地计算扭角体系的电子结构仍是一个重大挑战。为此，我们开发了MoireStudio——一个基于Python的通用扭角电子结构计算软件包。其功能包括公度结构搜索、结构生成、紧束缚模型与连续模型的参数化构建，以及全弛豫效应的精确引入。该软件包适用于任意二维材料（包括矩形晶格和异质结）的组合。MoireStudio具备用户友好、易于使用的特点，支持并行大规模计算，提供可视化功能，并设有与第三方软件的接口。它有望成为扭角电子学领域研究者便捷而强大的工具。
introduction:
Two-dimensional (2D) layered materials forming moiré superlattices through interlayer twist angles or lattice mismatch have given risen to a series of novel quantum phenomena. In recent years, twistronics has become a vibrant research frontier in condensed matter physics and material science, spanning from strong correlations, superconductivity, and topology in magic-angle graphene to fractional Chern insulator in twisted transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) bilayers~.

Currently, mainstream methods for studying moiré systems mainly include density functional theory (DFT), tight-binding (TB) model, and the $k p$ continuum model. However, due to the unique properties of moiré systems, their applications face various challenges. (1) DFT offers high accuracy and broad applicability, but its computational cost is high. Particularly, the novel properties of twisted systems often emerge in supercells containing thousands or even tens of thousands of atoms, making DFT calculations prohibitively expensive. (2) The TB model method provides an intuitive physical picture and a balance between accuracy and computational cost, and is well-established. However, it is more suitable for simple structures. Obtaining accurate TB parameters for real materials still requires DFT calculations and Wannier interpolation. (3) Since its proposal, the twisted continuum model method has been notable for its clever implementation and minimal computational cost. However, parameterization for the continuum model is often difficult, and currently, there are very few materials whose continuum models are widely accepted. Furthermore, using this model requires a certain understanding of twistronics, which somewhat hinders its integration with other fields. Another noteworthy method is combining deep learning with DFT to enable the calculation of twisted structures. This approach is promising but still under development, and its high demand for training data is also a challenge. These methods, each
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 开发了一个集成了多种计算方法、能够处理任意二维材料异质结并精确纳入完全弛豫效应的通用性扭曲电子结构计算软件包。

2. 关键结论: (1) 该软件包解决了扭曲系统中准确高效计算电子结构的挑战；(2) 它整合了公度结构搜索、模型构建、参数化及弛豫效应处理等多种功能；(3) 其设计具有通用性、用户友好性，并支持大规模并行计算和可视化。

3. 专家点评: 该工作通过整合多种计算范式和自动化流程，显著降低了扭曲电子结构研究的门槛，对推动扭转电子学领域的发展具有重要价值。然而，其核心模型的准确性仍依赖于底层参数的质量，这些参数通常来自DFT或其他实验数据，这可能成为其普适性的潜在瓶颈。此外，软件在处理高度关联体系或动态效应时的能力，仍需在实际应用中得到进一步验证。

title: AtomMOF: All-Atom Flow Matching for MOF-Adsorbate Structure Prediction
abstract: Deep generative models have shown promise for modeling metal-organic frameworks (MOFs), but existing approaches (1) rely on coarse-grained representations that assume fixed bond lengths and angles, and (2) neglect the MOF-adsorbate interactions, which are critical for downstream applications. We introduce AtomMOF, a scalable flow-based model built on an all-atom Diffusion Transformer that maps 2D molecular graphs of building blocks and adsorbates directly to equilibrium 3D structures without imposing structural constraints. We further present scaling laws for porous crystal generation, indicating predictable performance gains with increased model capacity, and introduce Feynman-Kac steering guided by machine-learned interatomic potentials to improve geometric validity and sampling stability. On the (MOF-only) BW dataset, AtomMOF increases the match rate by 35.00% and reduces RMSD by 32.64%. On the ODAC25 dataset (MOF-adsorbate), AtomMOF is substantially more sample-efficient than grand canonical Monte Carlo in recovering adsorption configurations and can identify candidates with lower adsorption energies than the reference dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/nayoung10/AtomMOF.
zh_abstract: 深度生成模型在金属有机框架（MOF）建模领域展现出潜力，但现有方法存在两大局限：（1）依赖假定固定键长键角的粗粒度表征；（2）忽略对下游应用至关重要的MOF-吸附质相互作用。我们提出AtomMOF——一种基于全原子扩散Transformer的可扩展流模型，能够将构建单元与吸附质的二维分子图直接映射至平衡三维结构，且不施加任何结构约束。我们进一步建立了多孔晶体生成的缩放定律，表明模型容量提升可带来可预测的性能增益，并引入基于机器学习原子间势的Feynman-Kac引导策略来提升几何合理性与采样稳定性。在（纯MOF）BW数据集上，AtomMOF使匹配率提升35.00%，RMSD降低32.64%。在ODAC25数据集（MOF-吸附质）上，AtomMOF在重构吸附构型时比巨正则蒙特卡洛方法具有显著更高的采样效率，并能筛选出吸附能低于参考数据集的候选材料。代码详见https://github.com/nayoung10/AtomMOF。

title: The impact of spurious imaginary phonon modes on thermal properties of Metal-organic Frameworks
abstract: Metal-organic Frameworks (MOFs) have emerged as potential candidates for direct air capture (DAC) of green house gases and water. Thermal properties of MOFs, such as their heat capacity, are used to determine the energy penalty associated with the adsorbent retrieval during the Temperature Swing Adsorption process. To aid exploration of the vast experimental design space of MOFs for such applications, computational methods like Density Functional Theory (DFT) or surrogate machine learning models trained on DFT data have been developed for obtaining phonon-derived heat capacities of MOFs. However, the high cost of explicit phonon computation in large and flexible nanoporous MOFs often necessitates the use of small supercells or lower convergence criteria which decrease predictive accuracy. These approximations often result in spurious imaginary phonon modes which are commonly ignored in practice. At present, there is no clear consensus in the literature on what magnitude of negative frequency or what fraction of imaginary modes can be considered acceptable. Here, we systematically demonstrate that spurious imaginary phonon modes can introduce substantial errors in heat capacity estimates, leading to incorrect ranking of MOFs in thermal-property-based screening. We further show that benchmarking machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) against DFT datasets containing spurious imaginary modes can misrepresent models that predict physically meaningful phonon spectra for dynamically stable MOFs. Finally, we introduce a simple, rapid post-processing workflow that can be applied to standard phonon calculations to effectively correct heat capacity estimates and account for spurious imaginary modes in MOFs.
zh_abstract: 金属有机框架（MOFs）已成为直接空气捕获温室气体和水的潜在候选材料。MOFs的热学性质（如热容）被用于评估变温吸附过程中吸附剂再生相关的能量损耗。为助力探索MOFs在此类应用中的广阔实验设计空间，研究者已开发出密度泛函理论（DFT）及基于DFT数据训练的替代机器学习模型等计算方法，用于获取MOFs的声子衍生热容。然而，在大型柔性纳米多孔MOFs中进行显式声子计算的高成本常迫使研究者采用小型超晶胞或较低收敛标准，这降低了预测精度。此类近似处理常导致出现虚假的虚频声子模式，而在实践中这些模式通常被忽略。目前学界对于可接受的负频率幅值或虚频模式比例尚未形成明确共识。本文系统论证了虚假虚频声子模式会引入显著的热容估算误差，导致基于热性质的MOFs筛选排序失准。我们进一步指出，在包含虚假虚频模式的DFT数据集上对机器学习原子间势函数（MLIPs）进行基准测试时，可能误判那些能准确预测动态稳定MOFs物理声子谱的模型。最后，我们提出了一种简单快速的后处理流程，可应用于标准声子计算，有效校正热容估算值并合理处理MOFs中的虚假虚频模式。

title: Real and momentum space analysis of topological phases in 2D d-wave altermagnets
abstract: Altermagnetism has recently emerged as a third fundamental branch of magnetism, combining the vanishing net magnetization of antiferromagnets with the high-momentum-dependent spin splitting of ferromagnets. This study provides a comprehensive real- and momentum-space analysis of topological phases in two-dimensional d-wave altermagnets. By employing a tight-binding Hamiltonian, we characterize the topological phase transition occurring at a critical intra-sublattice hopping strength ($t_a^C$). We examine the emergence of Dirac nodal points and the resulting Berry curvature singularities, supported by a visual analysis of pseudospin texture winding. Crucially, we analize spin splitting, effective altermagnetic strength, and investigate the transport implications of these phases, uncovering giant conductivity anisotropy and spin-dependent "steering" effects driven by group velocity distribution across the Fermi surface. Beyond bulk properties, we analyze the edge state topology in ribbon geometries through the lens of information-theoretic markers like fidelity-susceptibility and inverse participation ratio, offering an alternative to traditional Chern number calculations. Our results demonstrate that the hybridization of edge states in ultra-narrow nanoribbons opens a controllable energy gap, a feature we exploit to propose a novel topological altermagnetic field-effect transistor design where ballistic and spatially spin-polarized transport can be electrostatically gated. This work establishes a theoretical and information-theoretic framework for "edgetronics" in altermagnetic materials, paving the way for next-generation, high-speed spintronic and "spin-splitter" logic devices and architectures.
zh_abstract: 交变磁性（Altermagnetism）作为磁学的第三大基础分支近日兴起，它兼具反铁磁体的零净磁化强度特性与铁磁体的高动量依赖型自旋劈裂特性。本研究对二维d波交变磁体中的拓扑相进行了实空间与动量空间的综合分析。通过采用紧束缚哈密顿量，我们刻画了在临界子晶格内跃迁强度（$t_a^C$）处发生的拓扑相变。我们考察了狄拉克节点点的产生及由此导致的贝里曲率奇点，并通过伪自旋纹理缠绕的可视化分析加以验证。研究重点分析了自旋劈裂、等效交变磁强度，并探讨了这些拓扑相的输运效应，揭示了费米面群速度分布驱动的巨导电各向异性与自旋依赖型"导向"效应。在体相特性之外，我们通过保真度敏感性、逆参与率等信息论指标分析了带状几何结构中的边缘态拓扑，为传统陈数计算提供了替代方案。研究结果表明，超窄纳米带中边缘态的杂化会打开可控能隙，我们利用这一特性提出了一种新型拓扑交变磁场效应晶体管设计，可通过静电栅压实现弹道输运与空间自旋极化输运的调控。本工作为交变磁材料中的"边缘电子学"建立了理论与信息论框架，为新一代高速自旋电子器件及"自旋分束器"逻辑元件与架构的发展奠定了基础。
introduction:
For nearly a century, our understanding of magnetic order was built upon a fundamental binary: ferromagnetism (FM), characterized by parallel spin alignment and a net macroscopic magnetization, and antiferromagnetism (AFM), where antiparallel spins cancel each other out, resulting in a zero net magnetic moment. As noted in a recent editorial by Igor Mazin , altermagnetism (AM)  has emerged as a ``new punch line'' (a third branch) in fundamental magnetism, disrupting this traditional dichotomy by introducing a third magnetic phase that combines the most desirable properties of both worlds.


The formalization of AM as a distinct phase was established in the seminal work by mejkal, Sinova, and Jungwirth . This theoretical framework has mapped out an extensive ``research landscape'' , identifying numerous candidate materials across metals, insulators, and semiconductors. They demonstrated that certain collinear magnets possess a unique symmetry where opposite magnetic sublattices are connected by crystal rotations rather than the translations or inversions typical of conventional AFMs. This ``nonrelativistic spin and crystal rotation symmetry'' results in a vanishing net magnetization (like an AFM) but allows for large, momentum-dependent spin splitting in the electronic bands (like a FM), even without considering spin-orbit coupling.

Indeed, the most striking signature of an AM is the  Kramers spin degeneracy lifting in momentum space, experimentally confirmed in  . Traditional AFMs maintain degenerate spin-up and spin-down bands due to the combination of time-reversal and inversion symmetry, whereas AMs break this degeneracy. In colloquial terms, spin polarization is the ``secret sauce''. The significance of AM lies in its potential for spintronics. The spin polarization in AMs is not a weak effect because it is protected by the crystal lattice symmetry. Spin polarization allows the material to behave like an FM in transport experiments while acting like an AFM in t

2. 关键结论: (1) 在临界子晶格内跃迁强度处发生拓扑相变，伴随狄拉克节点点和贝里曲率奇点的出现; (2) 费米面群速度分布导致巨导电各向异性和自旋依赖性"导向"效应; (3) 超窄纳米带中边缘态的杂化可打开能隙，该能隙可通过静电栅极进行调控; (4) 提出了一种理论框架，为交替磁体中的"边缘电子学"和下一代高速自旋电子器件奠定基础。

3. 专家点评: 该研究将拓扑物态分析与新兴的交替磁性概念相结合，具有显著的前瞻性，特别是提出的场效应晶体管设计为自旋电子器件的能耗和速度优化提供了新思路。然而，理论模型的实验验证至关重要，实际材料中缺陷和界面效应可能对预测的拓扑边缘态及自旋输运特性产生显著影响。此外，信息论标记物与传统拓扑不变量之间的关系需进一步澄清，以增强该分析方法的普适性。

title: Efficient, Equivariant Predictions of Distributed Charge Models
abstract: A machine learning (ML) based equivariant neural network for constructing distributed charge models (DCMs) of arbitrary resolution, DCM-net, is presented. DCMs efficiently and accurately model the anisotropy of the molecular electrostatic potential (ESP) and go beyond the point charge representation used in conventional molecular mechanics (MM) energy functions. This is particularly relevant for capturing the conformational dependence of the ESP (internal polarization) and chemically relevant features such as lone pairs or σ-holes. Across conformational space, the learned charge positions from DCM-net are stable and continuous. Across the QM9 chemical space, two-charge-per-atom models achieve accuracies comparable to fitted atomic dipoles for previously unseen molecules (0.75 (kcal/mol)/e). Three- and four-charge-per-atom models reach accuracies competitive with atomistic multipole expansions up to quadrupole level (0.55 (kcal/mol)/e). Pronounced improvements of the ESP are found around O and F atoms, both of which are known to feature strongly anisotropic fields, and for aromatic systems. Across the QM9 reference data set, molecular dipole moments improve by 0.1 D compared with fitted monopoles. Transfer learning on dipeptides yields a 0.2 (kcal/mol)/e ESP improvement for unseen samples and a two-fold MAE reduction for molecular dipole moments versus fitted monopoles. Overall, DCM-net offers a fast and physically meaningful approach to generating distributed charge models for running pure ML or mixed ML/MM based molecular simulations. level (0.55 (kcal/mol)/e).
zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习(ML)的等变神经网络——DCM-net，用于构建任意分辨率的分布式电荷模型(DCM)。该模型能高效精确地模拟分子静电势(ESP)的各向异性，超越了传统分子力学(MM)能量函数中使用的点电荷表示法。这对于捕捉ESP的构象依赖性（内极化）和化学相关特征（如孤对电子或σ空穴）尤为重要。在构象空间中，DCM-net学习得到的电荷位置具有稳定性和连续性。在QM9化学空间中，每个原子分配两个电荷的模型对未知分子达到的精度（0.75 (kcal/mol)/e）与拟合的原子偶极子相当；而每个原子分配三至四个电荷的模型精度（0.55 (kcal/mol)/e）可与直至四极矩水平的原子多极展开相媲美。在以强各向异性场为特征的O、F原子及芳香体系周围，ESP呈现显著改善。在整个QM9参考数据集中，分子偶极矩比拟合单极子提升0.1 D。对二肽的迁移学习使未知样本的ESP提升0.2 (kcal/mol)/e，分子偶极矩的MAE较拟合单极子降低一倍。总体而言，DCM-net为生成分布式电荷模型提供了一种快速且具有物理意义的方法，可用于运行基于纯ML或混合ML/MM的分子模拟。
introduction:
The electrostatic potential (ESP) around a molecule can be used to explain
a wide range of molecular properties related to structure, bonding,
stability, and reactivity, among
others.
The ESP can be highly anisotropic leading to a variety of chemically
relevant features including "lone pairs" and "$-$holes", for
example, which cannot be modeled with atom-centered
charges. By
reducing the representation of the local electrostatic environment to
atomic multipoles or point charges (PCs), the true anisotropic
electrostatic potential of the molecule is
neglected. A successful approach to modeling the
molecular electrostatic potential has been to use atom-centered
multipoles (MTPs) to a given order. Often, this expansion is truncated
at the atomic quadrupole moment for all atoms except hydrogens for
which a PC representation is usually
sufficient.
Including higher order atomic multipoles has been successful in
crystal structure prediction and modeling interaction
energies using force
fields. These atomic
multipole expansions can be obtained from the electron density of the
wavefunction, using techniques such as the Minimal Basis Iterative
Stockholder (MBIS) procedure.\\


The quantum theory of atoms in molecules (QTAIM) suggests features in
the molecular density, such as bond critical points, which are well
described using distributed multipoles. Likewise,
PC-based energy functions have been supplemented by off-center PCs in
the OPLS force field to model the anisotropy of the
ESP, sometimes referred to as `extra
charge' or lone pair sites, introduced in the AMBER force field to
better describe hydrogen bonding and halogen
interactions, or virtual interaction
sites in GROMACS. More generally, an atomic
multipole expansion can be approximated using multiple point charges arranged around an atomic center, which leads to "distributed charge models" (DCMs). Formally, to obtain a
DCM-representation of the multipole expansion up to the quadrupole level,

deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种基于等变神经网络的机器学习方法（DCM-net），能够自动且高效地生成任意分辨率的分布式电荷模型，以精确捕捉分子静电势的各向异性。

2. 关键结论: (1) DCM-net能够跨构象空间生成稳定且连续的电荷位置；(2) 对于未见过的分子，每个原子两个电荷的模型即可达到与拟合原子偶极子相当的精度，而每个原子三到四个电荷的模型精度可与高达四极矩的原子多极展开相竞争；(3) 该方法在具有强各向异性场的O、F原子及芳香体系周围显著改善了静电势的预测；(4) 通过二肽的迁移学习，证明了模型对未知样本的良好泛化能力，分子偶极矩的预测误差相比拟合单极子模型降低了一半。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作将物理先验（等变性）与机器学习相结合，提供了一条生成具有明确物理意义的电荷模型的快速途径，对于推动基于纯ML或混合ML/MM的分子模拟具有重要意义。然而，该模型目前仅在QM9数据集和二肽上得到验证，其在更复杂生物大分子体系或凝聚相中的性能和迁移能力仍需进一步考察。此外，模型在计算效率与精度之间的权衡，以及在力场参数化中的实际整合效果，是决定其最终影响力的关键。

title: Mimyria: Machine learned vibrational spectroscopy for aqueous systems made simple
abstract: Vibrational spectroscopy provides a powerful connection between molecular dynamics (MD) simulations and experiment, but its routine use in condensed-phase systems remains limited. We introduce mimyria, a modular and automated framework that orchestrates electronic-structure reference calculations, trains atom-resolved machine-learning response models, and generates IR and Raman spectra from MD trajectories within a unified workflow. We introduce the polarizability gradient tensor (PGT) as a novel atom-resolved machine-learning target property for Raman spectroscopy, complementing the established atomic polar tensor (APT) for IR spectroscopy. As a necessary prerequisite, we demonstrate how both PGTs and APTs can accurately be computed from electronic-structure theory, validate them across formally equivalent derivative formulations, and thereby benchmark their numerical consistency. We then employ machine learning as an efficient surrogate to represent the validated APT and PGT response functions on aqueous benchmark systems. We validate the trained models directly at the level of the spectrum against explicit ab initio reference calculations and find that IR and Raman spectra converge with surprisingly small training sets. Moreover, spectral agreement improves more rapidly than the root-mean-square error (RMSE). While RMSE is straightforward to compute, statistically converged reference spectra are generally impractical to obtain, motivating the need to relate model-level errors to observable-level accuracy. By connecting these complementary error measures, we provide practical guidelines and early-stopping criteria for achieving sufficient spectral fidelity. By integrating response-tensor learning, automated training, and spectral-domain validation into a unified workflow, mimyria enables data-efficient and quantitatively reliable vibrational spectroscopy.
zh_abstract: 振动光谱在分子动力学模拟与实验之间建立了重要桥梁，但其在凝聚相体系中的常规应用仍存在局限。本文提出mimyria——一个模块化自动框架，通过统一工作流协调电子结构参考计算、训练原子级机器学习响应模型，并从分子动力学轨迹生成红外与拉曼光谱。我们引入极化率梯度张量作为拉曼光谱的新型原子级机器学习目标属性，与现有的红外光谱原子极化张量形成互补。作为必要前提，我们论证了如何通过电子结构理论精确计算这两种张量，通过形式等效的导数公式进行验证，从而评估其数值一致性。随后我们采用机器学习作为高效代理模型，在水相基准体系中表征经过验证的原子极化张量与极化率梯度张量响应函数。通过在光谱层级直接与显式从头算参考计算对比，我们发现红外与拉曼光谱仅需极小的训练集即可收敛。值得注意的是，光谱一致性的提升速度远快于均方根误差的下降。虽然均方根误差易于计算，但获得统计收敛的参考光谱通常不具可行性，这促使我们需要建立模型层级误差与观测层级精度之间的关联。通过衔接这些互补误差指标，我们为达成足够的光谱保真度提供了实用指南与早停准则。通过将响应张量学习、自动化训练和光谱域验证整合至统一工作流，mimyria实现了数据高效且定量可靠的振动光谱计算。
introduction:
Vibrational spectroscopy provides a direct connection between theory
and experiment, as it 
represents a physical observable that 
is accessible in both domains~.
Derived from  molecular dynamics~(MD) simulations, vibrational spectra explicitly include thermal and anharmonic effects, as well as the influence of thermal fluctuations in condensed-phase systems.
As a result, qualitative~-- and in some cases even quantitative~~-- agreement with experimental data can be achieved.
Vibrational spectra are therefore used to validate performed MD simulations because it probes both the structure and the dynamics of the simulated system.
Beyond its use as a powerful validation tool, condensed-phase theoretical vibrational spectroscopy yields rich physical information: 
spectral features can be associated with specific atomic motions~, 
and molecules in distinct chemical environments,
such as interfaces or solvation shells~,
can be distinguished. 
In addition, dynamical time scales, including reorientation times and collision rates, can be extracted and related to experimental observations~.
Access to such atom-resolved and environment-specific insights relies on the ability to decompose vibrational spectra into contributions from individual atoms or molecules~.
Within IR spectroscopy, 
one powerful route is 
through the atomic polar tensor (APT)~, also called ``Born effective charge tensor''~(BEC)~, which enables the total spectrum to be rigorously expressed in terms of atomic spectral responses~,
without relying on charge partitioning schemes.
This decomposition allows, for instance, vibrational spectra to be analyzed in terms of translational, rotational, and intermolecular vibrational contributions~, thereby providing a direct link between atomic dynamics and spectral signatures.


Condensed-phase theoretical vibrational spectroscopy, however, is not yet routinely employed to extract physical insights.
