deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一个名为Mimyria的集成化工作流，通过引入极化率梯度张量作为机器学习目标属性，并结合原子极化张量，实现了对分子动力学轨迹高效、自动化的红外和拉曼光谱计算。

2. 关键结论: (1) 验证了极化率梯度张量和原子极化张量在电子结构理论中的准确计算和数值一致性; (2) 机器学习模型能够用非常小的训练集就实现光谱的快速收敛; (3) 光谱一致性改善速度快于均方根误差的降低速度，需要建立模型误差与可观测精度之间的关系; (4) 通过整合响应张量学习、自动化训练和光谱域验证，实现了数据高效且定量可靠的光谱计算

3. 专家点评: 该工作通过建立完整的工作流显著降低了振动光谱的计算门槛，特别是引入PGT作为机器学习目标具有方法学创新性。然而，文中提到的"小训练集"实现收敛需要谨慎评估其普适性，可能仅限于特定水体系；将模型误差与光谱精度关联的尝试很有价值，但缺乏对不同化学环境的系统性验证。

title: From Evaluation to Design: Using Potential Energy Surface Smoothness Metrics to Guide Machine Learning Interatomic Potential Architectures
abstract: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (MLIPs) sometimes fail to reproduce the physical smoothness of the quantum potential energy surface (PES), leading to erroneous behavior in downstream simulations that standard energy and force regression evaluations can miss. Existing evaluations, such as microcanonical molecular dynamics (MD), are computationally expensive and primarily probe near-equilibrium states. To improve evaluation metrics for MLIPs, we introduce the Bond Smoothness Characterization Test (BSCT). This efficient benchmark probes the PES via controlled bond deformations and detects non-smoothness, including discontinuities, artificial minima, and spurious forces, both near and far from equilibrium. We show that BSCT correlates strongly with MD stability while requiring a fraction of the cost of MD. To demonstrate how BSCT can guide iterative model design, we utilize an unconstrained Transformer backbone as a testbed, illustrating how refinements such as a new differentiable $k$-nearest neighbors algorithm and temperature-controlled attention reduce artifacts identified by our metric. By optimizing model design systematically based on BSCT, the resulting MLIP simultaneously achieves a low conventional E/F regression error, stable MD simulations, and robust atomistic property predictions. Our results establish BSCT as both a validation metric and as an "in-the-loop" model design proxy that alerts MLIP developers to physical challenges that cannot be efficiently evaluated by current MLIP benchmarks.
zh_abstract: 机器学习原子间势能（MLIPs）有时无法再现量子势能面（PES）的物理平滑性，导致下游模拟中出现错误行为，而标准的能量和力回归评估可能无法发现这些错误。现有的评估方法，如微正则分子动力学（MD），计算成本高昂且主要探测近平衡状态。为改进MLIPs的评估指标，我们引入了键平滑性表征测试（BSCT）。这一高效基准通过受控键变形探测PES，并能检测平衡态附近及远离平衡态的非平滑现象，包括不连续性、人工最小值和伪力。我们证明BSCT与MD稳定性高度相关，同时仅需MD计算成本的一小部分。为展示BSCT如何指导迭代模型设计，我们采用无约束Transformer架构作为测试平台，演示了如何通过新型可微分k近邻算法和温控注意力机制等改进，减少本指标所识别的伪影。基于BSCT系统优化模型设计后，所得MLIP同时实现了较低的传统能量/力回归误差、稳定的MD模拟和可靠的原子性质预测。我们的研究确立BSCT既可作为验证指标，也可作为“循环内”模型设计代理，能够提醒MLIP开发者注意当前MLIP基准无法有效评估的物理挑战。

title: Physics-inspired transformer quantum states via latent imaginary-time evolution
abstract: Neural quantum states (NQS) are powerful ansätze in the variational Monte Carlo framework, yet their architectures are often treated as black boxes. We propose a physically transparent framework in which NQS are treated as neural approximations to latent imaginary-time evolution. This viewpoint suggests that standard Transformer-based NQS (TQS) architectures correspond to physically unmotivated effective Hamiltonians dependent on imaginary time in a latent space. Building on this interpretation, we introduce physics-inspired transformer quantum states (PITQS), which enforce a static effective Hamiltonian by sharing weights across layers and improve propagation accuracy via Trotter-Suzuki decompositions without increasing the number of variational parameters. For the frustrated $J_1$-$J_2$ Heisenberg model, our ansätze achieve accuracies comparable to or exceeding state-of-the-art TQS while using substantially fewer variational parameters. This study demonstrates that reinterpreting the deep network structure as a latent cooling process enables a more physically grounded, systematic, and compact design, thereby bridging the gap between black-box expressivity and physically transparent construction.
zh_abstract: 神经量子态(NQS)是变分蒙特卡洛框架中强大的拟设，但其架构常被视为黑箱。我们提出一个物理意义清晰的框架，将NQS视为潜在虚时演化的神经近似。该观点表明：基于标准Transformer的NQS架构对应着潜在空间中依赖虚时的、缺乏物理动机的有效哈密顿量。基于此解释，我们引入物理启发的Transformer量子态(PITQS)，通过层间权重共享强制实现静态有效哈密顿量，并利用Trotter-Suzuki分解提高传播精度而不增加变分参数数量。对于阻挫$J_1$-$J_2$海森堡模型，我们的拟设在变分参数显著减少的情况下，达到了与最先进TQS相当或更优的精度。本研究表明：将深度网络结构重新阐释为潜在冷却过程，可实现物理基础更坚实、系统化且紧凑的设计，从而弥合黑箱表达性与物理透明构造之间的鸿沟。

title: End-to-End Differentiable Learning of a Single Functional for DFT and Linear-Response TDDFT
abstract: Density functional theory (DFT) and linear-response time-dependent density functional theory (LR-TDDFT) rely on an exchange-correlation (xc) approximation that provides not only energy but also its functional derivatives that enter the self-consistent potential and the response kernel. Here we present an end-to-end differentiable workflow to optimize a single deep-learned energy functional using targets from both Kohn-Sham DFT and adiabatic LR-TDDFT within the Tamm-Dancoff approximation. Implemented in a JAX-based two-component quantum chemistry code (IQC), the learned functional yields a consistent potential and LR kernel via automatic differentiation, enabling gradient-based training through the SCF fixed point and the Casida equation. As a proof of concept in a fixed finite basis (cc-pVDZ), we learn an exchange-correlation functional on the helium spectrum while incorporating one-electron self-interaction cancelation and the Lieb-Oxford inequality as penalty terms, and we assess its possible transfer to molecular test cases.
zh_abstract: 密度泛函理论（DFT）与线性响应含时密度泛函理论（LR-TDDFT）依赖于交换关联（xc）近似，该近似不仅提供能量，还提供其进入自洽势和响应核的泛函导数。本文提出一种端到端可微分工作流，通过在Tamm-Dancoff近似下结合Kohn-Sham DFT和绝热LR-TDDFT的目标，优化单个深度学习能量泛函。该学习泛函在基于JAX的二分量量子化学程序（IQC）中实现，通过自动微分生成一致的自洽势和LR核，支持基于梯度的训练穿越SCF不动点和Casida方程。作为固定有限基组（cc-pVDZ）下的概念验证，我们以氦原子光谱为对象学习交换关联泛函，同时引入单电子自相互作用抵消与Lieb-Oxford不等式作为惩罚项，并评估其向分子测试案例迁移的可行性。

title: Structures of iron and cobalt bimetallic clusters for optimized chemical vapor deposition growth of single-walled carbon nanotubes
abstract: We investigate iron-cobalt (Fe-Co) alloys as a representative high-performance catalyst system for SWCNT growth in a systematic manner by combining chemical vapor deposition (CVD) experiments with chirality-resolved spectroscopic analysis, as well as molecular dynamics (MD) simulations based on density functional theory-derived machine learning force fields while varying the Fe-Co ratio. Using zeolite-based SWCNTs prepared by alcohol CVD, absorption and photoluminescence spectroscopy, together with two-dimensional excitation-emission fitting was employed to quantify chirality-specific growth efficiency. Two distinct growth regimes were identified. At a relatively low temperature of 600 C, pure Co exhibits the highest catalytic activity, promoting efficient growth of small-diameter (0.7-0.9 nm) SWCNTs. In contrast, at 850 C, the Fe0.75Co0.25 alloy shows a pronounced enhancement in growth efficiency compared with pure Fe, pure Co, and other Fe-Co compositions, also yielding larger diameter tubes (0.9-1.1nm). Similar growth behavior was observed on SiO2 substrates, enabling detailed transmission electron microscopy analysis of catalyst nanoparticles. Electron microscopy and energy-dispersive X-ray spectroscopy reveal that high SWCNT yields correlate with the formation of small, uniform Fe-Co nanoparticles with Co-enriched surfaces, in excellent agreement with MD simulations. Lastly, MD results are summarized in a composition-diameter phase diagram that rationalizes the experimentally observed growth trends. The exceptional performance of the Fe0.75Co0.25 catalyst at high temperature is attributed to the stabilization of small and uniform catalyst clusters, providing mechanistic insight into the synergistic roles of alloy composition and temperature in SWCNT growth.
zh_abstract: 我们通过将化学气相沉积实验与手性分辨光谱分析、基于密度泛函理论衍生机器学习力场的分子动力学模拟相结合，系统研究了铁钴合金作为单壁碳纳米管生长的代表性高性能催化剂体系，并系统改变了铁钴比例。采用醇类化学气相沉积法制备的沸石基单壁碳纳米管，结合吸收光谱和光致发光光谱技术，以及二维激发-发射拟合方法，对手性特异性生长效率进行了量化分析。研究发现了两种不同的生长机制：在600℃相对较低温度下，纯钴催化剂表现出最高催化活性，能有效促进小直径单壁碳纳米管的生长；而在850℃高温条件下，Fe0.75Co0.25合金相较于纯铁、纯钴及其他铁钴组分显示出显著增强的生长效率，同时生成更大直径的碳管。在二氧化硅基底上也观察到类似的生长行为，这使得我们能够对催化剂纳米颗粒进行详细的透射电子显微镜分析。电子显微镜与能量色散X射线光谱分析表明，高单壁碳纳米管产率与形成具有钴富集表面的小型均匀铁钴纳米颗粒密切相关，该结果与分子动力学模拟高度吻合。最后，我们将分子动力学模拟结果整合成组分-直径相图，合理解释了实验观察到的生长趋势。Fe0.75Co0.25催化剂在高温下的卓越性能归因于细小均匀催化剂簇的稳定形成，这为理解合金组分与温度在单壁碳纳米管生长中的协同作用机制提供了重要见解。

title: Approaching the Thermodynamic Limit with Neural-Network Quantum States
abstract: Accessing the thermodynamic-limit properties of strongly correlated quantum matter requires simulations on very large lattices, a regime that remains challenging for numerical methods, especially in frustrated two-dimensional systems. We introduce the Spatial Attention mechanism, a minimal and physically interpretable inductive bias for Neural-Network Quantum States, implemented as a single learned length scale within the Transformer architecture. This bias stabilizes large-scale optimization and enables access to thermodynamic-limit physics through highly accurate simulations on unprecedented system sizes within the Variational Monte Carlo framework. Applied to the spin-$\tfrac12$ triangular-lattice Heisenberg antiferromagnet, our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on clusters of up to $42\times42$ sites. The ability to simulate such large systems allows controlled finite-size scaling of energies and order parameters, enabling the extraction of experimentally relevant quantities such as spin-wave velocities and uniform susceptibilities. In turn, we find extrapolated thermodynamic limit energies systematically better than those obtained with tensor-network approaches such as iPEPS. The resulting magnetization is strongly renormalized, $M_0=0.148(1)$ (about $30\%$ of the classical value), revealing that less accurate variational states systematically overestimate magnetic order. Analysis of the optimized wave function further suggests an intrinsically non-local sign structure, indicating that the sign problem cannot be removed by local basis transformations. We finally demonstrate the generality of the method by obtaining state-of-the-art energies for a $J_1$-$J_2$ Heisenberg model on a $20\times20$ square lattice, outperforming Residual Convolutional Neural Networks.
zh_abstract: 获取强关联量子物质的热力学极限性质需要在超大晶格上进行模拟，这对数值方法而言仍具挑战性，尤其在受挫二维系统中。我们引入空间注意力机制——一种用于神经网络量子态的最小化且具物理解释性的归纳偏置，该机制在Transformer架构中实现为单一可学习长度标度。这种偏置能稳定大规模优化，并通过变分蒙特卡洛框架下前所未有的系统规模高精度模拟，实现对热力学极限物理的探索。将该方法应用于自旋-1/2三角晶格海森堡反铁磁体时，我们在高达42×42位点的集群上获得了当前最优结果。模拟此类大系统的能力实现了能量和序参量的可控有限尺寸标度，从而能够提取实验相关量（如自旋波速度和均匀磁化率）。相较之下，我们发现外推得到的热力学极限能量系统性地优于iPEPS等张量网络方法所得结果。由此获得的磁化强度存在显著重正化，M₀=0.148(1)（约为经典值的30%），揭示精度较低的变分态会系统性地高估磁有序度。对优化波函数的分析进一步表明存在内禀非定域符号结构，说明符号问题无法通过定域基变换消除。最后，我们通过在20×20方格晶格上对J₁-J₂海森堡模型获得当前最优能量，证明了该方法的普适性，其表现优于残差卷积神经网络。
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 将一种具有可解释物理意义的空间注意力机制（体现为单一可学习的长度尺度）作为归纳偏置引入Transformer架构的神经网络量子态，从而首次在变分蒙特卡洛框架内稳定地实现了对强关联二维阻挫系统在热力学极限下的高精度模拟。

2. 关键结论: (1) 该方法在自旋-1/2三角晶格海森堡反铁磁体上实现了高达42x42格点的最先进模拟，其外推的热力学极限能量系统地优于iPEPS等张量网络方法; (2) 由此得到的磁化强度M0=0.148(1)远低于经典值，表明精度较低的变分态会系统性地高估磁有序; (3) 对优化波函数的分析表明其具有本质上非局域的符号结构，意味着局域基变换无法消除符号问题; (4) 该方法在20x20方格子的J1-J2海森堡模型上也取得了最先进的能量结果，证明了其通用性。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作标志着神经网络量子态在解决具有挑战性的二维阻挫磁体问题上迈出了关键一步，其模拟的尺度首次达到了能够可靠进行有限尺寸缩放并提取实验相关量的程度。然而，该方法的成功严重依赖于一个精心设计的、物理启发的归纳偏置，其普适性在不同类型的强关联模型（如掺杂系统或费米子模型）中仍有待检验。此外，尽管分析暗示了符号问题的内在非局域性，但对该非局域起源的深入理论理解以及它如何普遍地存在于其他阻挫系统中，仍然是未来研究需要解决的根本性问题。

title: Efficient Equivariant High-Order Crystal Tensor Prediction via Cartesian Local-Environment Many-Body Coupling
abstract: End-to-end prediction of high-order crystal tensor properties from atomic structures remains challenging: while spherical-harmonic equivariant models are expressive, their Clebsch-Gordan tensor products incur substantial compute and memory costs for higher-order targets. We propose the Cartesian Environment Interaction Tensor Network (CEITNet), an approach that constructs a multi-channel Cartesian local environment tensor for each atom and performs flexible many-body mixing via a learnable channel-space interaction. By performing learning in channel space and using Cartesian tensor bases to assemble equivariant outputs, CEITNet enables efficient construction of high-order tensor. Across benchmark datasets for order-2 dielectric, order-3 piezoelectric, and order-4 elastic tensor prediction, CEITNet surpasses prior high-order prediction methods on key accuracy criteria while offering high computational efficiency.
zh_abstract: 从原子结构端到端预测高阶晶体张量性质仍具挑战：虽然球谐等变模型表达能力强大，但其克莱布希-戈丹张量积运算在高阶目标预测中会产生高昂的计算与内存成本。我们提出笛卡尔环境交互张量网络（CEITNet），该方法为每个原子构建多通道笛卡尔局部环境张量，并通过可学习的通道空间交互实现灵活的多体混合。通过在通道空间进行学习，并利用笛卡尔张量基组装等变输出，CEITNet能够高效构建高阶张量。在二阶介电张量、三阶压电张量及四阶弹性张量预测的基准数据集测试中，CEITNet在关键精度指标上超越现有高阶预测方法，同时保持卓越计算效率。
introduction:
Tensor properties of crystal materials are fundamental in advancing many technological fields, leading to significant innovations in device development. As a result, accurate prediction of crystal tensor properties has attracted increasing attention from the research community.
First principles methods, such as density functional theory (DFT), have facilitated the prediction of various properties within an acceptable error margin compared to traditional laboratory experiments. 
{However, density functional theory calculations can be computationally demanding, especially when evaluating high-order

tensor properties of large crystalline systems, as they require iterative self-consistent optimization of both electronic states and atomic configurations with explicit wavefunction descriptions} .
Their computational complexity {scales cubically or even more steeply with the number of atoms in the system }. 
Consequently, this leads to difficulties in high-order tensor prediction, limiting the development of related fields. On a broader level, the energy consumption and carbon footprint associated with large-scale computational chemistry and material simulations are garnering increasing attention . Therefore, developing data-driven prediction methods that balance accuracy with efficiency is imperative for accelerating material screening and discovery.

A central challenge in applying deep learning to tensor prediction lies in satisfying geometric equivariance. Unlike predicting scalar properties like total energy or formation energy , tensor properties exhibit strict directional dependency: when a crystal structure experiences rotation in 3D space, tensor properties must transform according to the coordinate transformation rules . Neglecting this inductive bias leads to physically inconsistent predictions and degraded sample efficiency and generalization capabilities , hindering the model's ability to learn correct physical laws from limited, expensive DFT data.

Currentl
conclusion:
In conclusion, we propose the Cartesian Environment Interaction Tensor Network, for predicting high-order crystal tensor properties.
To improve computational efficiency, CEITNet adopts a decoupled design that separates invariant atomic encoding from equivariant tensor construction, avoiding the propagation of high-order equivariant features. Building on Cartesian geometric bases derived from interatomic directions, CEITNet constructs channelized local-environment tensors and introduces a learnable channel-interaction module to enable flexible many-body mixing.
Experimental results demonstrate that CEITNet achieves state-of-the-art performance  across different high-order tensor prediction tasks on key accuracy criteria. Moreover, compared with spherical-harmonic-based approaches, CEITNet offers substantial computational advantages, highlighting its effectiveness and flexibility in multi-task settings. 

Despite the strong performance of CEITNet, there are several limitations:
First, compared with equivariant methods based on spherical harmonics, our Cartesian framework typically requires non-trivial design of the corresponding coupling process when transferring to different tensor types. Systematically selecting a set of bases and coupling templates that is both computationally efficient and sufficiently expressive for a new task still involves some hyperparameter tuning.
Second, in this work, we instantiate the model with a coupling between two environment streams, which effectively restricts the explicit interaction order to three-body information, which is also efficient in most cases. In principle, the framework can be extended to model higher-order many-body effects, however, higher-order interactions inevitably introduce trade-offs in computational cost, numerical stability, and the risk of overfitting.

Future work may explore more systematic task transfer, controlled extensions to higher-order many-body couplings, and stronger symmetry-aware inductive biases
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种基于笛卡尔局部环境张量和可学习通道空间相互作用的解耦设计，以高效且等变的方式预测高阶晶体张量，避开了传统球谐方法中计算昂贵的Clebsch-Gordan张量积。

2. 关键结论: (1) 通过将不变原子编码与等变张量构建解耦，避免了高阶等变特征的传播，从而提升了计算效率; (2) 利用笛卡尔几何基构建通道化的局部环境张量，并通过可学习的通道相互作用模块实现灵活的多体混合; (3) 在多个高阶张量预测基准任务上，其关键精度指标超越了现有方法，同时提供了显著的计算优势。

3. 专家点评: 该工作通过其解耦的笛卡尔张量方法，巧妙地绕过了球谐等变网络在高阶情形下的计算瓶颈，这是一个重要的工程与理论结合的成功案例。其显著的计算效率优势使其在大规模材料筛选和高阶张量（如四阶弹性张量）的快速预测方面具有巨大的应用潜力；然而，其性能可能依赖于笛卡尔基的特定选择，在捕捉极其复杂的角向依赖性时，其表达能力和通用性是否始终优于或等同于最先进的球谐方法，仍需在更广泛的基准和体系上进行严格验证。

title: Triplet Envelope Functions for increasing machine learning interatomic potential efficiency and stability
abstract: Central to interatomic potential efficiency is the radial envelope function that enables linear scaling with computational cost by defining a local neighborhood of atoms. This has enabled MLIPs to revolutionize materials science over the past decade by providing DFT accuracy with linear scaling computational cost in molecular dynamics workflows. However, MLIPs still have a relatively high computational cost compared to empirical interatomic potentials, preventing them from transforming molecular dynamics workflows. A central issue is that MLIPs use relatively large cutoff radii, converging to 6A over the last few years. The large cutoffs prioritize accuracy of any material over efficiency in any particular region of phase space, capturing dispersion effects and low density materials at the expense of increased computational cost in higher density materials. Past work has aimed to address this with KNN graph sparsification, which, while significantly reducing cost, has the drawback of breaking energy conservation. In this work, we propose higher-order envelope functions that prune local atomic neighborhoods through physically inspired geometric functions to provide the memory and efficiency benefits of KNN graph sparsification while eliminating non-conservative energy dynamics. Through numerical experiments on solids and liquids with 5-8A cutoffs, we show that triplet envelope functions complement radial envelope functions by doubling training and inference speed, tripling memory efficiency, and increasing simulation stability while not impacting accuracy or data efficiency for the most common 6A cutoff. Moreover, experiments with 8A radial cutoffs show triplet envelope functions create a pathway to larger cutoff radii for efficiently and accurately modeling open structures with large interatomic distances, showing a promising new direction for engineering MLIP efficiency.
zh_abstract: 原子间势能计算效率的核心在于径向包络函数，该函数通过定义原子局部邻域实现计算成本的线性缩放。这一机制使得机器学习势函数在过去十年中彻底改变了材料科学领域，能够在分子动力学工作流程中以线性增长的计算成本达到密度泛函理论的精度水平。然而相较于经验性原子间势函数，机器学习势函数仍存在计算成本较高的问题，阻碍其彻底变革分子动力学工作流程。关键瓶颈在于机器学习势函数普遍采用较大的截断半径（近年来普遍收敛于6埃）。这种大截断半径设计优先考虑普适材料的精度而非相空间特定区域的效率，虽然能有效捕捉色散效应和低密度材料特性，但代价是在高密度材料中增加计算成本。已有研究试图通过KNN图稀疏化解决该问题，虽显著降低计算成本，却存在破坏能量守恒的缺陷。本研究提出高阶包络函数，通过物理启发的几何函数对局部原子邻域进行剪枝，在保留KNN图稀疏化内存与效率优势的同时消除非守恒能量动力学。针对5-8埃截断半径的固体和液体数值实验表明：对于最常见的6埃截断半径，三重态包络函数与径向包络函数形成互补，使训练推理速度提升两倍，内存效率提高三倍，并增强模拟稳定性，且不影响精度或数据效率。此外，8埃径向截断实验证明三重态包络函数为扩大截断半径开辟了新路径，可高效精确模拟具有大原子间距的开放结构，为机器学习势函数效率优化指明了新方向。
introduction:
Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) are a new paradigm in computational materials science due to their reduced cost compared to density functional theory (DFT) calculations .
General purpose models trained on expansive DFT datasets now regularly provide quantitative accuracy across the periodic table .
As a replacement for ab-initio molecular dynamics, this is transformative, but the aspiration for MLIPs is to also replace empirical interatomic potentials.
However, current general purpose models are still orders of magnitude more costly than empirical interatomic potentials, and using MLIPs to probe the thermodynamics and kinetics of materials across nanosecond timescales is still prohibitively expensive . 
These barriers have prevented them from being widely adopted across the computational materials science community, especially in industrial research settings.

Locality is the primary method MLIPs have reduced the cost of simulations with respect to DFT.
A local neighborhood is defined by a radial cutoff $R_c$ that limits the receptive field of MLIPs.
The number of atoms in the local environment determines how much information the MLIP processes and correspondingly its cost.
Importantly, locality makes interatomic potentials scale linearly with the system size for accessing much larger simulations than DFT.
However, since the number of atoms within the neighborhood increases cubically with the cutoff radius, increasing the cutoff has a significant impact on the model cost.

The cost needs to be balanced with accuracy. 
Reducing the radial cutoff generally comes at the expense of accuracy as the physics an MLIP needs to capture has to be within its receptive field.
For isolated small molecules, a cutoff radius of 2-3\ is sufficient to model covalent bonding.
For most metals, a cutoff radius of 4-5 \ is generally sufficient.
It is only when open inorganic structures or dispersion effects are modeled that cutoffs of 6 \ or more are needed.

deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种基于三元组几何函数的高阶包络函数，在保持能量守恒的前提下，通过物理启发的邻域剪枝策略，显著提升了机器学习原子间势的计算效率和内存效率。

2. 关键结论: (1) 三元组包络函数与径向包络函数互补，在6埃截断半径下，可将训练和推理速度提升一倍，内存效率提升三倍，同时不影响精度或数据效率; (2) 该方法克服了传统KNN图稀疏化方法破坏能量守恒的关键缺陷，提高了模拟稳定性; (3) 对于8埃等更大截断半径，该方法为高效精确模拟具有大原子间距的开放结构材料开辟了新途径。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作巧妙地解决了MLIPs在效率与守恒律之间的核心矛盾，其物理启发的剪枝思想比纯算法优化更具鲁棒性。若能将该方法成功集成到主流MLIP框架中，将极大推动其在工业界复杂材料模拟中的应用。然而，其普适性仍需在更广泛的材料体系和更极端的物理条件下进行验证，特别是对于强各向异性或动态成键断裂/形成的体系。

title: Straintronics and twistronics in bilayer graphene
abstract: The interplay of twist and strain in bilayer graphene enables the formation of moiré patterns and narrow bands that host correlated and topological phases. While magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene has been widely studied, strain provides an additional and realistic control knob for band engineering. In this work, we first generate a global method to construct commensurate supercells for arbitrary twist and strain. Then, using atomistic tight-binding and strain-extended continuum models to study the commensurate structures, we identify configurations that minimize the bandwidth beyond the magic angle. The results reveal a strong dependence of band narrowing and topology on strain type, magnitude, direction and lattice relaxation. Particularly, shear strain produces a stronger distortion than uniaxial strain. Including electron-electron interactions through a self-consistent Hartree potential shows that strain broadens the bare bands while reducing electrostatic renormalization. Strain also drives topological transitions as the narrow and remote bands hybridize, establishing twisted and strained bilayer graphene as a tunable platform for flat-band and topological phenomena.
zh_abstract: 双层石墨烯中扭转与应变的相互作用使得莫尔条纹的形成及窄能带的出现成为可能，这些窄能带中存在着关联态和拓扑物相。尽管魔角扭转双层石墨烯已被广泛研究，但应变为能带工程提供了一个额外且实际可行的调控手段。本研究首先提出了一种全局方法，用于构建任意扭转和应变下的公度超晶胞。随后，通过采用原子紧束缚模型和应变扩展连续模型研究这些公度结构，我们找到了超越魔角条件下能带宽度最小化的构型。结果表明，能带窄化效应和拓扑特性强烈依赖于应变的类型、大小、方向及晶格弛豫。特别值得注意的是，剪切应变比单轴应变会产生更强的能带畸变。通过自洽哈特里势引入电子-电子相互作用后，研究发现应变在减弱静电重整化的同时会拓宽裸能带。随着窄能带与远邻能带发生杂化，应变还会驱动拓扑转变，从而确立扭转应变双层石墨烯作为研究平带与拓扑现象的可调控平台。
introduction:
The discovery of correlated phases and unconventional superconductivity in twisted bilayer graphene (TBG) has attracted significant attention over the last few years . These phenomena are intrinsically connected to the emergence of very flat bands due to the moiré potential , induced by the lattice mismatch created by the twist or strain . The quenching of the kinetic energy in the flat bands promotes the appearance of the observed electronic correlations. Any approach to understand the nature of the correlated phases in TBG must then start from a solid understanding of the nature and origin of the flat bands, supported by accurate modelling methods. 

With only a relative twist, the flat bands are well-known to arise at an infinite set of , the largest one being around $1^{}$~. However, in practice the samples usually have at least some residual strain~, defects~ or even twist angle disorders~, typically arising during their fabrication~. The presence of strains, in particular, can significantly modify the geometrical and electronic properties of the system since the moiré acts as a magnifying glass~. Although this may be seen as undesirable, one can conversely use strains as an additional tune parameter in the system~. Compared to the twist, which only rotates the layers, strains distort the layers and thus can lead to a plethora of moiré patterns with potentially rich properties~. This has motivated recent experimental advances in developing new techniques to induce and manipulate the strain in moiré heterostructures~, opening a path to straintronics and twistronics, whereby the electronic properties can be tuned by the combined interplay between twist and strain. Among different types of strain, uniaxial heterostrain
is the most common type, and has been observed in many experimental samples . Consequently, most theoretical works focus on the effects of the uniaxial heterostrain. Recently, under
some new well-developed techniques, shear heterostrain
is introduce
conclusion: In summary, we studied the combined effects of twist and strain in bilayer graphene using atomistic tight-binding and strain-extended continuum models. Strain reshapes the moiré geometry, broadens the narrow bands, splits the vHs, lifts valley degeneracy, and shifts the Dirac points within the mBZ. The shear strain introduces stronger distortion of both the geometrical and electronic properties. Moreover, the strain direction is crucial: it controls both the bandwidth and the valley-resolved topology, and shifts the twist angle that minimizes the bandwidth.  A continuum model with strain-induced scalar and gauge fields reproduces the atomistic spectra and the strain-driven topological transitions that occur when the gap to the remote bands closes and reopens. Including electrostatic (Hartree) interactions, we find nonrigid spectral shifts at low strain that evolve toward an almost rigid shift at higher strain; the interaction mainly reshapes the bands without reversing the strain-induced broadening. Finally, we develop a general method based on the energy minimization, to determine the twist and strain from the STM topography. These results show that strain provides a practical knob to control band structure and valley topology in moiré graphene.
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种在任意扭转和应变下构建双层石墨烯公度超晶胞的普适性方法，并系统揭示了剪切应变相较于单轴应变能更有效地调控能带结构和拓扑性质。
2. 关键结论: (1) 应变可以作为一种超越“魔角”的额外调控手段，实现更窄的带宽；(2) 能带窄化和拓扑特性强烈依赖于应变的类型、大小、方向以及晶格驰豫，其中剪切应变引起的几何和电子结构畸变更强；(3) 应变通过使窄带与远程能带杂化，驱动了拓扑相变；(4) 包含电子-电子相互作用的Hartree势计算表明，应变会拓宽裸能带，同时减弱静电重整化效应。
3. 专家点评: 这项工作将“应变电子学”与“扭转电子学”紧密结合，为理解和设计具有可调平带与拓扑现象的平台提供了关键的理论框架。其建立的普适性模型和对应变类型（特别是剪切应变）的深入分析，对解释实验观测和指导未来应变调控器件的制备具有重要价值。然而，模型中对电子关联效应的处理仍相对简化（如仅采用Hartree近似），未来需要结合更高级的多体计算方法来精确捕捉应变对强关联相和超导性的影响。

title: Machine-Learned Hamiltonians for Quantum Transport Simulation of Valence Change Memories
abstract: The construction of the Hamiltonian matrix \textbf{H} is an essential, yet computationally expensive step in \textit{ab-initio} device simulations based on density-functional theory (DFT). In homogeneous structures, the fact that a unit cell repeats itself along at least one direction can be leveraged to minimize the number of atoms considered and the calculation time. However, such an approach does not lend itself to amorphous or defective materials for which no periodicity exists. In these cases, (much) larger domains containing thousands of atoms might be needed to accurately describe the physics at play, pushing DFT tools to their limit. Here we address this issue by learning and directly predicting the Hamiltonian matrix of large structures through equivariant graph neural networks and so-called augmented partitioning training. We demonstrate the strength of our approach by modeling valence change memory (VCM) cells, achieving a Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of 3.39 to 3.58 meV, as compared to DFT, when predicting the Hamiltonian matrix entries of systems made of $\sim$5,000 atoms. We then replace the DFT-computed Hamiltonian of these VCMs with the predicted one to compute their energy-resolved transmission function with a quantum transport tool. A qualitatively good agreement between both sets of curves is obtained. Our work provides a path forward to overcome the memory and computational limits of DFT, thus enabling the study of large-scale devices beyond current \textit{ab-initio} capabilities
zh_abstract: 在基于密度泛函理论(DFT)的从头算器件模拟中，哈密顿矩阵\textbf{H}的构建是至关重要但计算成本高昂的步骤。对于均匀结构，原胞至少沿一个方向重复的特性可被用于最小化所考虑的原子数量和计算时间。然而，这种方法并不适用于不存在周期性的非晶或缺陷材料。此类情况下可能需要包含数千个原子的（更大）区域才能准确描述物理机制，从而将DFT工具推向极限。本文通过等变图神经网络与增强分区训练方法，实现了对大尺度结构哈密顿矩阵的学习与直接预测。我们通过模拟价变存储器(VCM)单元验证该方法优势，在预测包含$\sim$5,000原子体系的哈密顿矩阵元素时，相较于DFT计算结果实现了3.39-3.58 meV的平均绝对误差(MAE)。进而利用量子输运工具，将DFT计算的VCM哈密顿矩阵替换为预测值进行能量分辨透射函数计算，获得了定性吻合的结果。本研究为突破DFT的内存与计算限制开辟了新路径，使得超越当前从头算能力的大尺度器件研究成为可能。
introduction:
As the dimensions of modern-day electronic devices keep decreasing,  calculations are gaining momentum to capture atomistic details and their influence on key performance metrics. Density-functional theory (DFT) lends itself optimally to this task. Besides the energy and wavefunction of atomic systems, it can also return their Hamiltonian matrix . This quantity can then be passed to a quantum transport (QT) solver to compute the ``current vs. voltage'' characteristics of the targeted device. In structures with atomic disorder such as the amorphous oxides used at the switching layer of resistive random access memories (ReRAM), the construction of  can be tedious. Large unit cells containing thousands of atoms are required to accurately represent ReRAM geometries. As DFT scales with $O(N^{3})$, $N$ being the number of atoms, it becomes prohibitively expensive at these scales, limiting the size of the devices that can be investigated at the  level.

In this work, we present an approach that overcomes this bottleneck by replacing DFT-computed Hamiltonians with machine-learned (ML) ones. We demonstrate this approach by simulating a valence change memory (VCM) cell, a ReRAM type with applications in neuromorphic computing . The VCM of interest is made of a TiN- HfO$_2$- Ti/TiN stack and 5,268 atoms. Its conductance can be modulated by applying an external voltage, which leads to the generation/recombination of oxygen vacancies at the Ti-HfO$_2$ interface and the formation/dissolution of conductive filaments. From a modeling perspective, the underlying structural evolution can be tracked with, for example, kinetic Monte Carlo (KMC)  or molecular dynamics (MD)  simulations. To compute the corresponding ``I-V'' characteristics, the Hamiltonian matrix of samples extracted at regular time intervals should be produced with DFT and passed as input to a QT solver. Bypassing the DFT step with ML requires a model that can learn complex features, e.g., non-regular lattices, the infl
conclusion: We presented an ML-based approach that can be integrated into a large-scale device simulation platform capable of computing from first-principles the ``I-V'' characteristics of atomic structures changing with time. Our model  not only bypasses computationally intensive DFT calculations, it can potentially also be used to construct the Hamiltonian matrix of systems with sizes beyond current DFT capabilities. Future work includes improving the prediction accuracy of our framework by incorporating more  training data and adopting more expressive network architectures. Other applications such as phase-change memories can be envisioned. They undergo gradual amorphous-to-crystalline transitions whose electronic properties could be predicted with ML instead of being computed with DFT .
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 利用等变图神经网络和增强分区训练方法，直接从原子结构预测大尺度非晶/缺陷体系（如价变存储器）的哈密顿量矩阵，从而绕过高计算成本的密度泛函理论计算。
2. 关键结论: (1) 该方法在预测包含约5000个原子的VCM系统哈密顿量矩阵元素时，相对于DFT实现了3.39至3.58 meV的平均绝对误差; (2) 使用预测的哈密顿量计算能量分辨透射函数，与基于DFT哈密顿量的量子传输计算结果在定性上吻合良好; (3) 该框架为克服DFT的内存和计算限制、研究超越当前第一性原理能力的大尺度器件提供了可行路径。
3. 专家点评: 这项工作在连接原子尺度模拟与器件级性能预测方面具有重要价值，其核心突破在于通过机器学习有效捕捉了无序体系中的局域化学环境对电子结构的复杂影响。然而，该方法目前主要展示了定性一致性，其预测哈密顿量的定量精度是否足以可靠地重现关键的输运现象（如电流阈值、开关比）仍需在更广泛的电压和构型范围内进行严格验证。未来的挑战包括将该方法集成到动态模拟流程中，并评估其在非平衡态和不同缺陷浓度下的泛化能力。

title: Enabling AI Deep Potentials for Ab Initio-quality Molecular Dynamics Simulations in GROMACS
abstract: State-of-the-art AI deep potentials provide ab initio-quality results, but at a fraction of the computational cost of first-principles quantum mechanical calculations, such as density functional theory. In this work, we bring AI deep potentials into GROMACS, a production-level Molecular Dynamics (MD) code, by integrating with DeePMD-kit that provides domain-specific deep learning (DL) models of interatomic potential energy and force fields. In particular, we enable AI deep potentials inference across multiple DP model families and DL backends by coupling GROMACS Neural Network Potentials with the C++/CUDA backend in DeePMD-kit. We evaluate two recent large-atom-model architectures, DPA2 that is based on the attention mechanism and DPA3 that is based on GNN, in GROMACS using four ab initio-quality protein-in-water benchmarks (1YRF, 1UBQ, 3LZM, 2PTC) on NVIDIA A100 and GH200 GPUs. Our results show that DPA2 delivers up to 4.23x and 3.18x higher throughput than DPA3 on A100 and GH200 GPUs, respectively. We also provide a characterization study to further contrast DPA2 and DPA3 in throughput, memory usage, and kernel-level execution on GPUs. Our findings identify kernel-launch overhead and domain-decomposed inference as the main optimization priorities for AI deep potentials in production MD simulations.
zh_abstract: 当前最先进的人工智能深度势能为分子动力学模拟提供了媲美第一性原理计算精度的结果，同时显著降低了传统量子力学计算方法（如密度泛函理论）的计算成本。本研究通过集成DeePMD-kit——专为原子间势能和力场提供领域特定深度学习模型的工具包，将AI深度势能引入生产级分子动力学代码GROMACS。我们特别通过耦合GROMACS神经网络势能模块与DeePMD-kit的C++/CUDA后端，实现了跨多种DP模型家族和深度学习后端的AI深度势能推理。在NVIDIA A100和GH200 GPU平台上，我们使用四个具有第一性原理精度的水溶液中蛋白质基准体系（1YRF、1UBQ、3LZM、2PTC），评估了GROMACS中两种新型大原子模型架构：基于注意力机制的DPA2和基于图神经网络的DPA3。实验结果表明，在A100和GH200 GPU上，DPA2的吞吐量分别达到DPA3的4.23倍和3.18倍。我们还通过特征分析对比了DPA2与DPA3在吞吐量、内存使用和GPU内核级执行等方面的表现。研究指出内核启动开销和域分解推理是生产级分子动力学模拟中AI深度势能的主要优化方向。

title: Impact of Local Descriptors Derived from Machine Learning Potentials in Graph Neural Networks for Molecular Property Prediction
abstract: In this study, we present a framework aimed at enhancing molecular property prediction through the integration of local descriptors obtained from large-scale pretrained machine learning potentials into three-dimensional graph neural networks (3D GNNs). As an illustration, we developed an EGNN-PFP model by integrating descriptors derived from the preferred potential (PFP) features, acquired through Matlantis, into an equivariant graph neural network (EGNN), and evaluated its effectiveness. When tested on the QM9 dataset, comprising small organic molecules, the proposed model demonstrated superior accuracy compared to both the original EGNN models and the baseline models without PFP-derived descriptors for 11 out of the 12 molecular properties. Furthermore, when evaluated on the tmQM dataset, which encompasses transition metal complexes, notable enhancements in performance were observed across all five target properties, indicating the significance of the local atomic environment surrounding transition metals. In essence, the proposed methodology is adaptable to any 3D GNN architecture, and further enhancements in prediction accuracy are anticipated when integrated with continually evolving GNN architectures.
zh_abstract: 本研究提出一种通过将大规模预训练机器学习势能获得的局域描述符整合至三维图神经网络（3D GNNs）以提升分子性质预测能力的框架。作为示例，我们将通过Matlantis获取的优选势能（PFP）特征描述符整合到等变图神经网络（EGNN）中，开发了EGNN-PFP模型并评估其有效性。在由小分子有机化合物构成的QM9数据集测试中，该模型在12项分子性质中的11项预测精度均优于原始EGNN模型及未引入PFP描述符的基线模型。此外，在包含过渡金属配合物的tmQM数据集评估中，所有五项目标性质均呈现显著提升，这表明过渡金属周围局域原子环境具有重要影响。该方法可适配于任何3D GNN架构，且随着图神经网络架构的持续演进，预计将实现更高的预测精度提升。

title: Scalable Spatio-Temporal SE(3) Diffusion for Long-Horizon Protein Dynamics
abstract: Molecular dynamics (MD) simulations remain the gold standard for studying protein dynamics, but their computational cost limits access to biologically relevant timescales. Recent generative models have shown promise in accelerating simulations, yet they struggle with long-horizon generation due to architectural constraints, error accumulation, and inadequate modeling of spatio-temporal dynamics. We present STAR-MD (Spatio-Temporal Autoregressive Rollout for Molecular Dynamics), a scalable SE(3)-equivariant diffusion model that generates physically plausible protein trajectories over microsecond timescales. Our key innovation is a causal diffusion transformer with joint spatio-temporal attention that efficiently captures complex space-time dependencies while avoiding the memory bottlenecks of existing methods. On the standard ATLAS benchmark, STAR-MD achieves state-of-the-art performance across all metrics--substantially improving conformational coverage, structural validity, and dynamic fidelity compared to previous methods. STAR-MD successfully extrapolates to generate stable microsecond-scale trajectories where baseline methods fail catastrophically, maintaining high structural quality throughout the extended rollout. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals severe limitations in current models for long-horizon generation, while demonstrating that STAR-MD's joint spatio-temporal modeling enables robust dynamics simulation at biologically relevant timescales, paving the way for accelerated exploration of protein function.
zh_abstract: 分子动力学模拟仍是研究蛋白质动态过程的金标准，但其计算成本限制了在生物相关时间尺度上的应用。近期生成模型虽展现出加速模拟的潜力，但由于架构限制、误差累积和时空动态建模不足，难以实现长程生成。我们提出STAR-MD（分子动力学时空自回归推演），一种可扩展的SE(3)等变扩散模型，能够在微秒时间尺度上生成物理合理的蛋白质轨迹。核心创新是采用联合时空注意力机制的因果扩散Transformer，能有效捕捉复杂时空依赖关系，同时规避现有方法的内存瓶颈。在标准ATLAS基准测试中，STAR-MD在所有指标上均实现最先进性能——相较既有方法显著提升构象覆盖度、结构有效性和动态保真度。当基线方法完全失效时，STAR-MD能成功外推生成稳定的微秒级轨迹，并在扩展推演中始终保持优异结构质量。全面评估揭示了当前模型在长程生成中的严重局限，同时证明STAR-MD的联合时空建模能够实现生物相关时间尺度的稳健动态模拟，为加速探索蛋白质功能开辟新路径。

title: Hydrogen in Brownmillerite Perovskites: First-Principles Insights into Energetics and Induced Electronic-Magnetic Changes
abstract: Hydrogen uptake in brownmillerite perovskites A2B2O5 offers an (electro)chemically accessible route to tune functional properties, but mechanistic understanding and design rules for hydrogen-responsive oxides remain limited. Here we employ density functional theory (DFT) to quantify how H absorption affects electronic structure, magnetic exchange, and anisotropy in representative Sr2Fe2O5 and Sr2Co2O5 oxides. We find that hydrogenation introduces a localized electron that stabilizes near the proton, with B-site-dependent preference. The resulting lattice distortions and redistribution of charge density modify exchange coupling and cant the Neel vector, giving rise to weak ferromagnetism. We also show that absorption energies are highly sensitive to proton-electron arrangements and magnetic order, varying by up to 1 eV across different settings. This sensitivity demands consistent treatment of charge localization and spin states, together with careful choice of computational parameters. Extending to a variety of experimentally reported A2B2O5 compositions, we identify candidates with favorable H uptake and uncover a trend linking more favorable absorption to a higher B-site d-electron count. We also demonstrate that the preferred proton absorption site in these materials is governed by local O-O separations and lattice flexibility, which describe the ability of the framework to accommodate proton-induced distortions. Finally, benchmarks of universal machine-learning interatomic potentials reveal uncertainties of about 1 eV for site-resolved absorption energies, motivating descriptor-based surrogate models and targeted DFT validation. Together, these results establish practical design rules for hydrogen-responsive oxides relevant to iono-electronic devices, sensors, and electrically tunable spin functionality.
zh_abstract: 棕色钙钛矿氧化物A₂B₂O₅对氢的吸附为调控功能特性提供了一条（电）化学可及的路径，但学界对氢响应氧化物的作用机理和设计规则仍缺乏深入认识。本文采用密度泛函理论（DFT）量化研究了氢吸附对典型氧化物Sr₂Fe₂O₅和Sr₂Co₂O₅电子结构、磁交换作用与磁各向异性的影响。研究发现：氢化过程会引入局域电子，该电子稳定存在于质子附近且分布偏好受B位离子调控；由此产生的晶格畸变与电荷密度重分布会改变交换耦合作用，导致尼尔矢量倾斜并诱发弱铁磁性。研究还发现吸附能对质子-电子排布方式和磁序高度敏感，不同条件下波动幅度可达1 eV，这种敏感性要求理论计算必须保持电荷局域化与自旋态处理的一致性，并谨慎选择计算参数。通过扩展研究多种已报道的A₂B₂O₅组分，我们筛选出具有优异氢吸附能力的候选材料，并揭示了更优吸附性能与更高B位d电子数之间的关联规律。研究还证明质子在这些材料中的优先吸附位点受局部氧-氧间距和晶格柔性共同调控，这两项参数反映了晶格框架适应质子诱导畸变的能力。最后，通过对通用机器学习原子间势进行基准测试，发现其对位点分辨吸附能的预测存在约1 eV的不确定性，这推动了基于描述符的代理模型与定向DFT验证的发展。本研究共同建立了适用于离子电子器件、传感器及电控自旋功能元件的氢响应氧化物实用设计规则。
introduction:
Dynamically controlling material properties through reversible electrochemical intercalation of small ions, known as iono-electronics, is a rapidly growing research direction~. When a positive gate voltage is applied, cations migrate from the reservoir through the electrolyte to compensate the flow of electrons and accumulate inside the active-layer material, altering its electric conductance and other properties. Among possible carriers, the small size of H$^+$ makes it uniquely effective, enabling insertion and removal from lattices with minimal structural disruption. Coupled H$^+$ and $^-$ doping has been shown to tune a wide spectrum of functionalities, including mechanical~, optical~, magnetic~, electronic properties ~, and thermal transport~. It can also induce superconductivity~, ferroelectricity~, magnetic skyrmions~, metal--insulator and Mott transitions~, and enhanced catalytic activity~.Proton-responsive oxides are also being explored for neuromorphic devices, where ionic dynamics emulate synaptic plasticity and enable electrochemical random-access memory (H-ECRAM)~. Despite these advances, the microscopic mechanisms of hydrogen incorporation, electron localization, and their influence on correlated electronic states remain insufficiently understood.

Among active layer materials, oxygen-deficient brownmillerite perovskites (A$_2$B$_2$O$_5$) stand out for their compositional flexibility and demonstrated ability to  absorb and conduct hydrogen . Combined experimental and calculation efforts on Sr$_2$Co$_2$O$_5$ and Sr$_2$Fe$_2$O$_5$ reveal dramatic hydrogen-induced transformations, including insulator–metal transitions, changes in magnetic order, and tunable thermal transport . Yet, systematic atomistic insight into how proton–electron pairs modify electronic and magnetic structures across different brownmillerites remains lacking, and no unified framework currently connects hydrogen insertion to these coupled transformations. Developing such a description
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 本文通过第一性原理计算，首次系统地揭示了氢在布朗米勒石钙钛矿A2B2O5中的吸收能、电子局域化行为及其对磁交换耦合与各向异性的调控机制，并建立了基于B位d电子数和局部晶格灵活性的材料设计准则。

2. 关键结论: (1) 氢吸收引入的局域电子会稳定在质子附近，其行为具有B位元素依赖性；(2) 由此产生的晶格畸变和电荷密度重分布会改变磁交换耦合，使奈尔矢量倾斜并诱发弱铁磁性；(3) 氢吸收能对质子-电子构型和磁序高度敏感，变化范围可达1 eV，这要求计算中必须一致地处理电荷局域化和自旋态；(4) 发现更有利的氢吸收趋势与更高的B位d电子数相关；(5) 确定了质子优先吸收位点由局部O-O间距和晶格柔性（即框架容纳质子诱导畸变的能力）共同决定；(6) 基准测试表明通用机器学习原子间势对位点分辨吸收能的预测存在约1 eV的不确定性，凸显了基于描述符的替代模型和针对性DFT验证的必要性。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作通过建立清晰的微观物理图像和实用的材料描述符，显著推进了对氢响应氧化物功能调控的理解，对离子电子学器件设计具有重要指导意义。然而，研究主要基于计算预测，其普适性和准确性亟需系统的实验研究，特别是对氢位置和局域磁结构的直接表征，来进行验证和校准。此外，所揭示的氢吸收能对计算参数的敏感性，以及机器学习势在此类强关联体系中的当前局限性，提醒我们在利用这些工具进行材料筛选时必须保持谨慎。

title: Insights into $CO_{2}$ activation on defective ZnS surfaces
abstract: In this work, we investigate $CO_{2}$ activation on ZnS using Near Ambient-Pressure X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy measurements (NAP-XPS) and density functional theory calculations (DFT). Our NAP-XPS experiments reveal that $CO_{2}$ adsorbs onto a defective ZnS surface upon heating above $473 \ K$ in a $CO_{2}$ atmosphere (up to $0.55 \ mbar$). The $CO_{2}$ adsorption fingerprint is detectable even after cooling to room temperature under ultra-high vacuum. Our DFT calculations suggest that $CO_{2}$ adsorption is energetically favorable on ZnS surfaces containing zinc vacancies, highlighting defect sites as key adsorption centers. Additionally, oxygen adsorption on a defective ZnS surface is exothermic, in contrast to the endothermic behavior observed on a defect-free surface. These findings contribute to a deeper understanding of defect-driven surface reactivity and may inform ZnS-based catalyst's design for $CO_{2}$ capture and reutilization.
zh_abstract: 本研究通过近常压X射线光电子能谱(NAP-XPS)测量和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，探究了$CO_{2}$在ZnS表面的活化机制。NAP-XPS实验表明，在$CO_{2}$气氛中（最高达$0.55\ mbar$）将ZnS加热至$473\ K$以上时，$CO_{2}$会吸附在具有缺陷的ZnS表面。即使随后在超高真空环境下冷却至室温，仍可检测到$CO_{2}$的吸附特征峰。DFT计算表明，在含有锌空位的ZnS表面，$CO_{2}$吸附在能量上更有利，证实缺陷位点是关键吸附中心。此外，缺陷ZnS表面对氧的吸附呈放热特性，而无缺陷表面则表现为吸热行为。这些发现深化了对缺陷驱动表面反应机理的理解，可为设计基于ZnS的$CO_{2}$捕获与再利用催化剂提供理论指导。

title: First-Principles Optical Descriptors and Hybrid Classical-Quantum Classification of Er-Doped CaF$_2$
abstract: We present a physics-informed classical-quantum machine learning framework for discriminating pristine CaF$_2$ from Er-doped CaF$_2$ using first-principles optical descriptors. Finite Ca$_8$F$_{16}$ and Ca$_7$ErF$_{16}$ clusters were constructed from the fluorite structure (a=5.46~$Å$) and treated using density functional theory (DFT) and linear-response time-dependent DFT (LR-TDDFT) within the GPAW code. Geometry optimization was performed in LCAO mode with a DZP basis and PBE exchange-correlation functional, followed by real-space finite-difference ground-state calculations with grid spacing h=0.30~$Å$ and N$_{bands}$=N$_{occ}$+20. Optical excitations up to 10~eV were obtained via the Casida formalism and converted into continuous absorption spectra using Gaussian broadening ($σ$=0.1-0.2~eV). From 1,589 energy-resolved points per system, physically interpretable descriptors including transition energy $E$, extinction coefficient $κ$, and absorption coefficient $α$ were extracted. A classical RBF-kernel support vector machine (SVM) achieves a test accuracy (ACC) of 0.983 and ROC-AUC of 0.999. Quantum support vector machines (QSVMs) evaluated on statevector and noisy simulators reach accuracies of 0.851 and 0.817, respectively, while execution on IBM quantum hardware yields a test-slice accuracy of 0.733 under finite-shot and decoherence constraints. A hybrid quantum neural network (QNN) with a 3-qubit feature map and depth-4 ansatz achieves a test accuracy of 0.93 and AUC of 0.96. Results here demonstrate that dopant-induced optical fingerprints form a robust, physically grounded feature space for benchmarking near-term quantum learning models against strong classical baselines.
zh_abstract: 本文提出一种物理信息驱动的经典-量子机器学习框架，通过第一性原理光学描述符区分纯净CaF$_2$与掺铒CaF$_2$。基于萤石结构(a=5.46~$Å$)构建有限尺寸Ca$_8$F$_{16}$和Ca$_7$ErF$_{16}$团簇，采用GPAW软件包中的密度泛函理论(DFT)及线性响应含时密度泛函理论(LR-TDDFT)进行计算。几何优化在LCAO模式下完成（采用DZP基组和PBE交换关联泛函），随后以实空间有限差分法进行基态计算（网格间距h=0.30~$Å$，能带数N$_{bands}$=N$_{occ}$+20）。通过Casida形式获得最高10~eV的光学激发态，并采用高斯展宽($σ$=0.1-0.2~eV)转换为连续吸收光谱。从每个体系的1,589个能量分辨点中提取出物理可解释描述符，包括跃迁能$E$、消光系数$κ$和吸收系数$α$。经典径向基核支持向量机(SVM)获得0.983的测试精度(ACC)和0.999的ROC-AUC值。在态矢量模拟器和噪声模拟器上评估的量子支持向量机(QSVM)分别达到0.851和0.817的精度，而在IBM量子硬件上受限于有限采样和退相干效应，测试切片精度为0.733。采用3量子比特特征映射和深度4电路构型的混合量子神经网络(QNN)实现了0.93的测试精度和0.96的AUC值。本研究证明：掺杂诱导的光学指纹构成了物理可解释的特征空间，为近期量子学习模型与强经典基准的比较提供了稳健平台。
introduction:
Photon upconversion is a nonlinear optical process in which the sequential absorption of two or more low-energy photons leads to the emission of a single higher-energy photon through intermediate electronic states . Rare-earth (lanthanide) ions play a central role in upconversion materials due to their partially filled electronic shells $4f$, which give rise to ladder-like energy level structures with long-lived metastable states that enable efficient stepwise excitation under low optical intensities . Among these ions, Er$^{3+}$- and Yb$^{3+}$-doped systems are particularly prominent because of favorable energy-level matching and efficient energy transfer pathways . The efficiency of upconversion is strongly influenced by the host lattice, with low-phonon energy fluoride materials such as CaF$_2$ suppressing nonradiative relaxation and providing a chemically compatible environment for rare-earth substitution . These properties have generated extensive interest in rare-earth upconversion materials for applications ranging from solid-state lasers to photovoltaics, bioimaging, and emerging photonic and quantum technologies .


Despite the widespread use of rare-earth upconversion materials, a quantitative first-principles description of upconversion processes remains challenging. Conventional ground-state density functional theory (DFT) accurately captures structural and electronic properties , but is inherently limited to static observables and cannot describe optical excitations or multiphoton dynamics . Time-dependent density functional theory (TDDFT) extends DFT to the time domain and enables the calculation of optical absorption spectra and electronic excitation energies , yet primarily probes linear-response excitations and does not directly capture nonlinear emission processes such as photon upconversion. In rare-earth–doped systems, this limitation is particularly pronounced, as experimentally observed visible upconversion emissions often originate from long-l
conclusion:
This study systematically benchmarks quantum machine learning (QML) models, particularly quantum support vector machines (QSVMs) and various quantum neural network (QNN) architectures, for materials classification and regression tasks. Our experimental and simulated analyses reveal that QSVMs, while conceptually elegant and straightforward to implement, are significantly affected by hardware noise and the limitations of fixed quantum feature maps. In contrast, QNN-based models, especially variational quantum circuits and hybrid quantum-classical architectures, demonstrate greater expressive power, noise resilience, and adaptability across diverse datasets, including real-world materials, quantum phase recognition, and industrial logistics. Our QSVM implementation achieved an accuracy of 0.851 in simulation and 0.733 on IBMQ hardware. In comparison, QNN classifiers, such as SamplerQNNs and scalable QNN (SQNN) architectures, consistently attained higher test accuracies (95–97.5\

These findings underscore a trend: QNNs, due to their trainable variational layers and embedded inductive biases (e.g., unitary constraints, convolutional invariance), surpass QSVMs in both flexibility and predictive performance, especially when dealing with small or structured datasets typical of physical sciences. Moreover, QNNs can be integrated into reinforcement learning agents and phase recognition tools, broadening their utility across industrial optimization and condensed matter physics. Nevertheless, current QML models face practical challenges. While simulations show promise, real-hardware implementations are often limited by qubit fidelity, circuit depth, and readout noise. Addressing these issues, via error mitigation, efficient ansätze, and near-term algorithms, will be key to transitioning from theoretical benchmarks to scalable, deployable quantum solutions. In conclusion, QNN-based architectures offer a compelling advancement over traditional QSVMs for quantum-enhanced learn
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种结合第一性原理计算光学描述符与混合经典-量子机器学习框架的方法，用于区分掺杂与未掺杂的氟化钙材料，并将量子机器学习模型在材料分类任务中的表现与强大的经典基线进行了系统基准测试。

2. 关键结论: (1) 基于第一性原理计算提取的光学描述符（如跃迁能、消光系数、吸收系数）为材料分类构建了一个物理意义明确且鲁棒的特征空间；(2) 经典RBF-SVM模型性能卓越（ACC: 0.983, AUC: 0.999），显著优于当前噪声量子硬件上的量子模型；(3) 在量子模型中，量子神经网络（QNN）比量子支持向量机（QSVM）表现出更强的表达能力、噪声鲁棒性和适应性，例如一个混合QNN在测试集上达到了0.93的准确率；(4) 在当前量子硬件上运行QSVM会因噪声和退相干导致性能显著下降（ACC从模拟的0.851降至硬件的0.733），突显了近期量子设备的局限性。

3. 专家点评: 本工作的主要意义在于为量子机器学习在材料科学中的应用建立了一个严谨的基准测试范例，通过将量子模型与性能强大的经典模型对比，客观地揭示了当前量子计算在实用化道路上的挑战。然而，该研究选取的分类任务对于经典方法而言相对简单，其结论关于量子优势的普适性仍需在更具挑战性的材料特性预测问题上进行验证。此外，文中未深入探讨为何量子神经网络比QSVM更具噪声鲁棒性的物理或算法根源，这是未来理论研究中一个值得深挖的方向。

title: A Cross-Domain Graph Learning Protocol for Single-Step Molecular Geometry Refinement
abstract: Accurate molecular geometries are a prerequisite for reliable quantum-chemical predictions, yet density functional theory (DFT) optimization remains a major bottleneck for high-throughput molecular screening. Here we present GeoOpt-Net, a multi-branch SE(3)-equivariant geometry refinement network that predicts DFT-quality structures at the B3LYP/TZVP level of theory in a single forward pass starting from inexpensive initial conformers generated at a low-cost force-field level. GeoOpt-Net is trained using a two-stage strategy in which a broadly pretrained geometric representation is subsequently fine-tuned to approach B3LYP/TZVP-level accuracy, with theory- and basis-set-aware calibration enabled by a fidelity-aware feature modulation (FAFM) mechanism. Benchmarking against representative approaches spanning classical conformer generation (RDKit), semiempirical quantum methods (xTB), data-driven geometry refinement pipelines (Auto3D), and machine-learning interatomic potentials (UMA) on external drug-like molecules demonstrates that GeoOpt-Net achieves sub-milli-Å all-atom RMSD with near-zero B3LYP/TZVP single-point energy deviations, indicating DFT-ready geometries that closely reproduce both structural and energetic references. Beyond geometric metrics, GeoOpt-Net generates initial guesses intrinsically compatible with DFT convergence criteria, yielding nonzero ``All-YES'' convergence rates (65.0\% under loose and 33.4\% under default thresholds), and substantially reducing re-optimization steps and wall-clock time. GeoOpt-Net further exhibits smooth and predictable energy scaling with molecular complexity while preserving key electronic observables such as dipole moments. Collectively, these results establish GeoOpt-Net as a scalable, physically consistent geometry refinement framework that enables efficient acceleration of DFT-based quantum-chemical workflows.
zh_abstract: 精确的分子几何构型是获得可靠量子化学预测的前提，但密度泛函理论（DFT）结构优化仍是高通量分子筛选的主要瓶颈。本文提出GeoOpt-Net——一种多分支SE(3)等变几何优化网络，能够以低成本力场生成的初始构象为起点，在单次前向传播中预测达到B3LYP/TZVP理论级别精度的DFT质量结构。该网络采用两阶段训练策略：首先通过广泛预训练获得通用几何表示，随后通过保真度感知特征调制（FAFM）机制进行理论与基组感知校准，最终微调至B3LYP/TZVP级别精度。在外源性类药分子数据集上的测试表明，相较于经典构象生成（RDKit）、半经验量子方法（xTB）、数据驱动的几何优化流程（Auto3D）及机器学习原子间势能（UMA）等代表性方法，GeoOpt-Net可实现亚毫埃级全原子RMSD精度，且B3LYP/TZVP单点能偏差趋近于零，表明其生成的DFT就绪构型能同时复现结构与能量参考标准。除几何指标外，该网络生成的初始猜测本质符合DFT收敛标准，在宽松阈值和默认阈值下分别实现65.0%与33.4%的非零“全通过”收敛率，显著减少重新优化步骤与计算时间。GeoOpt-Net还展现出随分子复杂度平滑可预测的能量缩放特性，同时保持偶极矩等关键电子观测量。这些成果共同确立了GeoOpt-Net作为可扩展、物理一致的几何优化框架，能有效加速基于DFT的量子化学工作流程。
introduction:
[ht]
    
    [width=0.95]{Figure/Figure_1.pdf}
    {
    Conceptual comparison of geometry optimization paradigms.
    Left: conventional quantum-chemical optimization on an  potential energy surface.
    Middle: iterative relaxation driven by a learned machine-learning force field.
    Right: GeoOpt-Net directly refines molecular geometries in a single forward pass without explicit
    potential energy surface construction or iterative optimization.
    }
    


Accurate three‐dimensional molecular geometries are the bedrock of computational chemistry~, underpinning reliable predictions of reaction pathways~, spectroscopic signatures~ and the rational design of catalysts~, functional materials~ and drug candidates~.  At the heart of these applications lies the exploration of the potential energy surface (PES), a high‐dimensional hypersurface defined by the Born–Oppenheimer approximation, whose minima correspond to stable conformers and whose saddle points mark transition states~.  Quantum‐mechanical (QM) methods—from Hartree–Fock (HF)~ through Kohn–Sham density functional theory (DFT)~—evaluate energies and forces via the self‐consistent solution of the electronic Schrödinger equation, with computational cost scaling steeply~ (approximately \(O(N^3)\)–\(O(N^4)\)) in the number of basis functions \(N\) (Fig.~ left). In practice, hybrid density functional methods such as B3LYP combined with triple-$$ basis sets (e.g., TZVP) are widely adopted as a pragmatic reference for molecular geometries~. Numerous benchmarks have shown that B3LYP/TZVP geometries are close to basis-set–converged structures for typical organic molecules, with residual geometric differences having only minor impact on relative energies, spectroscopic properties, and chemical trends~. As a result, B3LYP/TZVP has become a de facto standard for geometry optimization in large-scale and high-throughput quantum-chemical workflows.

conclusion:
In this work, we introduced GeoOpt-Net, a multi-scale SE(3)-equivariant geometry refinement framework that bridges inexpensive conformer generation and high-level DFT accuracy at B3LYP/TZVP level of theory. From a methodological perspective, existing approaches for generating DFT-ready structures span several distinct paradigms, including classical conformer generators based on distance geometry and force fields, semiempirical quantum methods, data-driven geometry refinement pipelines, and machine-learning interatomic potentials. GeoOpt-Net belongs to the data-driven refinement category but differs fundamentally from existing approaches by explicitly decoupling bond lengths, bond angles, and dihedral torsions into dedicated equivariant graph streams, which are fused through a lightweight Transformer decoder to capture chemically meaningful local coordination and long-range torsional couplings. This architecture is further combined with a two-stage training strategy, in which broadly transferable geometric representations are first learned by large-scale pretraining and subsequently fine-tuned to higher levels of theory, enabling systematic correction of basis-set- and element-dependent geometric deviations.

Comprehensive benchmarks against RDKit~, xTB~, Auto3D~, and UMA~ using B3LYP/TZVP reference data demonstrate that GeoOpt-Net produces near-DFT-quality geometries in a single forward pass, achieving sub-milli all-atom RMSD and tightly concentrated single-point energy deviations. Ablation experiments further confirm that explicit SE(3) equivariance and spectral graph encodings are indispensable for controlling error growth. Error decomposition reveals that the dominant performance gains arise from substantially improved torsional accuracy, with dihedral errors reduced by one to two orders of magnitude. deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 提出了一种名为GeoOpt-Net的、具有SE(3)等变性的多分支几何优化网络，能够通过单次前向传播，将廉价初始构象直接精修至接近DFT B3LYP/TZVP理论级别的精度，绕过了传统迭代优化或显式构建势能面的过程。

2. 关键结论: (1) GeoOpt-Net在外部类药分子测试集上实现了亚毫埃级别的全原子RMSD和接近零的B3LYP/TZVP单点能偏差，表明其能同时精确复现结构和能量参考值；(2) 该方法生成的几何结构本质兼容DFT收敛标准，显著提高了“All-YES”收敛率，并大幅减少了重新优化步骤和计算时间；(3) 网络展现出随分子复杂度增加而平滑可预测的能量缩放行为，并能保持偶极矩等关键电子观测量；(4) 通过两阶段训练策略和保真度感知特征调制机制，实现了对特定理论级别和基组的校准。

3. 专家点评: 这项工作在加速高通量计算化学工作流程方面潜力巨大，其“一步到位”的策略是对现有迭代优化范式的根本性革新。然而，其性能严重依赖于预训练阶段所覆盖的化学空间广度，对于训练数据分布外的分子或涉及强电子关联的体系，其预测的可靠性和可转移性仍需系统评估。此外，将几何结构分解为键长、键角、二面角等独立流进行处理，虽然在化学上直观，但可能忽略了这些自由度之间更深层次的耦合效应。

title: Topologically switchable transport in a bundled cable of wires
abstract: Advances in the next generation of mesoscopic electronics require an understanding of topological phases in inhomogeneous media and the principles that govern them. Motivated by the nature of motifs available in printable conducting inks, we introduce and study quantum transport in a minimal model that describes a bundle of one-dimensional metallic wires that are randomly interconnected by semiconducting chains. Each of these interconnects is represented by a Su-Schrieffer-Heeger chain, which can reside in either a trivial or a topological phase. Using a tight-binding approach, we show that such a system can transit from an insulating phase to a robust metallic phase as the interconnects undergo a transition from a trivial to a topological phase. In the latter, despite the random interconnectedness, the metal evades Anderson localization and exhibits a ballistic conductance that scales linearly with the number of wires. We show that this behavior originates from hopping renormalization in the wire network. The zero-energy modes of the topological interconnects act as effective random dimers, giving rise to an energy-dependent localization length that diverges as $\sim 1/E^2$. Our work establishes that random networks provide a yet-unexplored platform to host intriguing phases of topological quantum matter.
zh_abstract: 下一代介观电子学的发展需要理解非均匀介质中的拓扑相及其支配原理。受可印刷导电油墨图案特性的启发，我们引入并研究了一个最小模型中的量子输运行为。该模型描述了由半导体链随机互连的一维金属线束，每个互连结构由处于平庸相或拓扑相的Su-Schrieffer-Heeger链表征。通过紧束缚方法计算，我们发现当互连结构从平庸相转变为拓扑相时，系统会从绝缘相过渡到稳健的金属相。在拓扑相中，尽管存在随机互连，金属态仍能规避安德森局域化，并展现出与线束数量呈线性关系的弹道电导。研究揭示该行为源于线束网络中的跳跃重整化——拓扑互连的零能模充当有效随机二聚体，产生按$\sim 1/E^2$发散的能级依赖局域化长度。本工作证实随机网络为承载拓扑量子物质新奇相提供了尚未探索的研究平台。

title: Parametric Quantum State Tomography with HyperRBMs
abstract: Quantum state tomography (QST) is essential for validating quantum devices but suffers from exponential scaling in system size. Neural-network quantum states, such as Restricted Boltzmann Machines (RBMs), can efficiently parameterize individual many-body quantum states and have been successfully used for QST. However, existing approaches are point-wise and require retraining at every parameter value in a phase diagram. We introduce a parametric QST framework based on a hypernetwork that conditions an RBM on Hamiltonian control parameters, enabling a single model to represent an entire family of quantum ground states. Applied to the transverse-field Ising model, our HyperRBM achieves high-fidelity reconstructions from local Pauli measurements on 1D and 2D lattices across both phases and through the critical region. Crucially, the model accurately reproduces the fidelity susceptibility and identifies the quantum phase transition without prior knowledge of the critical point. These results demonstrate that hypernetwork-modulated neural quantum states provide an efficient and scalable route to tomographic reconstruction across full phase diagrams.
zh_abstract: 量子态层析（QST）是验证量子器件的关键技术，但面临系统尺寸指数级增长的计算瓶颈。基于受限玻尔兹曼机（RBM）的神经网络量子态能够高效参数化多体量子态，已成功应用于QST任务。然而，现有方法属于逐点重建，需要在相图的每个参数点重新训练模型。我们提出一种基于超网络的参数化QST框架，通过哈密顿量控制参数调控RBM，使单一模型能表征整个量子基态族。在横场伊辛模型上的实验表明，我们的HyperRBM模型在一维和二维晶格中仅通过局域泡利测量，即可实现跨越双相区与临界区的高保真度重构。关键的是，该模型无需临界点先验知识即可精确复现保真度磁化率，并成功识别量子相变。这些结果证明，超网络调制的神经量子态为全相图层析重建提供了高效可扩展的解决方案。

title: MEIDNet: Multimodal generative AI framework for inverse materials design
abstract: In this work, we present Multimodal Equivariant Inverse Design Network (MEIDNet), a framework that jointly learns structural information and materials properties through contrastive learning, while encoding structures via an equivariant graph neural network (EGNN). By combining generative inverse design with multimodal learning, our approach accelerates the exploration of chemical-structural space and facilitates the discovery of materials that satisfy predefined property targets. MEIDNet exhibits strong latent-space alignment with cosine similarity 0.96 by fusion of three modalities through cross-modal learning. Through implementation of curriculum learning strategies, MEIDNet achieves ~60 times higher learning efficiency than conventional training techniques. The potential of our multimodal approach is demonstrated by generating low-bandgap perovskite structures at a stable, unique, and novel (SUN) rate of 13.6 %, which are further validated by ab initio methods. Our inverse design framework demonstrates both scalability and adaptability, paving the way for the universal learning of chemical space across diverse modalities.
zh_abstract: 在本研究中，我们提出多模态等变逆向设计网络（MEIDNet），该框架通过对比学习联合学习结构信息与材料特性，并采用等变图神经网络（EGNN）进行结构编码。通过将生成式逆向设计与多模态学习相结合，我们的方法加速了化学-结构空间的探索，促进了满足预设性能目标的材料发现。MEIDNet通过跨模态学习融合三种模态，在潜在空间实现了余弦相似度0.96的强对齐性。通过实施课程学习策略，MEIDNet的学习效率较传统训练技术提升约60倍。我们通过以13.6%的稳定-独特-新颖（SUN）比率生成低带隙钙钛矿结构，证明了多模态方法的潜力，这些结构已通过第一性原理计算验证。本逆向设计框架兼具可扩展性与适应性，为跨模态化学空间的通用学习开辟了新途径。

title: Dynamically training machine-learning-based force fields for strongly anharmonic materials
abstract: Machine learning (ML) force fields have emerged as a powerful tool for computing materials properties at finite temperatures, particularly in regimes where traditional phonon-based perturbation theories fail or cannot be extended beyond the harmonic approximation. These approaches offer accuracy comparable to ab initio molecular dynamics (MD), but at a fraction of the computational cost. However, their reliability critically depends on the quality and representativeness of the training data. In particular, static training datasets often lead to failure when the force field encounters previously unseen atomic configurations during MD simulations. In this work, we present a framework for dynamically training ML force fields and demonstrate its effectiveness across materials with varying degrees of anharmonicity, including cubic boron arsenide (c-BAs), silicon (Si), and tin selenide (SnSe). Our method builds on the conventional lattice dynamics expansion of total energy and incorporates Bayesian error estimation to guide adaptive data acquisition during simulation. Specifically, we show that trajectory-averaged Bayesian errors enable efficient and targeted exploration of the configuration space, significantly enhancing the robustness and transferability of the resulting force fields. We further demonstrate how Bayesian error estimation can be applied to determine the convergence of the dynamic training without requiring additional ab initio data. This proposed framework offers a practical and easily implementable scheme to improve the training process, which is the most critical step in developing reliable ML force fields.
zh_abstract: 机器学习力场已成为在有限温度下计算材料性质的有力工具，尤其在传统基于声子的微扰理论失效或无法超越谐波近似范畴的体系中表现突出。该方法在保持与第一性原理分子动力学相当精度的同时，显著降低了计算成本。然而其可靠性高度依赖于训练数据的质量与代表性——当分子动力学模拟中出现训练集未涵盖的原子构型时，基于静态数据训练的力场往往会失效。本文提出动态训练机器学习力场的框架，并在具有不同非谐性程度的材料（包括立方砷化硼、硅和硒化锡）中验证其有效性。我们的方法基于传统晶格动力学总能展开式，引入贝叶斯误差估计来指导模拟过程中的自适应数据采集。研究表明，轨迹平均贝叶斯误差可实现构型空间的高效靶向探索，显著增强力场的鲁棒性与迁移能力。我们还演示了如何借助贝叶斯误差估计判定动态训练收敛性，而无需额外第一性原理数据。该框架为改进训练过程提供了实用且易于实施的方案，而训练过程的优化正是开发可靠机器学习力场最关键的环节。

title: Accurate Thermophysical Properties of Water using Machine-Learned Potentials
abstract: Simulating water from first principles remains a significant computational challenge due to the slow dynamics of the underlying system. Although machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLPs) can accelerate these simulations, they often fail to achieve the required level of accuracy for reliable uncertainty quantification. In this study, we use MACE - an equivariant graph neural network architecture that has been trained using an extensive RPBE-D3 database - to predict density isobars, diffusion constants, radial distribution functions, and melting points. Although equivariant MACE models are computationally more expensive than simpler architectures, such as kernel-based potentials (KbPs), their significantly lower total energy errors allow for reliable thermodynamic reweighting with minimal bias. Our results are consistent with those of previous studies using KbPs; however, equivariant models can be validated against the ground-truth density functional theory (DFT) ensemble, providing a critical advantage. These findings establish equivariant MLPs as robust and reliable tools for investigating the thermophysical properties of water with DFT-level accuracy.
zh_abstract: 由于水系统动力学缓慢，基于第一性原理模拟水仍然是一个重大的计算挑战。虽然机器学习原子间势能（MLPs）可以加速这些模拟，但其精度往往难以达到可靠不确定性量化的要求。本研究采用MACE——一种通过扩展RPBE-D3数据库训练的等变图神经网络架构——来预测密度等压线、扩散系数、径向分布函数和熔点。尽管等变MACE模型的计算成本高于基于核的势能（KbPs）等简单架构，但其显著降低的总能量误差使得热力学重加权能够以最小偏差可靠实现。我们的结果与先前使用KbPs的研究一致，但等变模型可通过与真实密度泛函理论（DFT）系综进行验证，这提供了关键优势。这些发现确立了等变MLPs作为以DFT级别精度研究水热物理性质的稳健可靠工具。

title: Learning Hamiltonian Flow Maps: Mean Flow Consistency for Large-Timestep Molecular Dynamics
abstract: Simulating the long-time evolution of Hamiltonian systems is limited by the small timesteps required for stable numerical integration. To overcome this constraint, we introduce a framework to learn Hamiltonian Flow Maps by predicting the mean phase-space evolution over a chosen time span $Δt$, enabling stable large-timestep updates far beyond the stability limits of classical integrators. To this end, we impose a Mean Flow consistency condition for time-averaged Hamiltonian dynamics. Unlike prior approaches, this allows training on independent phase-space samples without access to future states, avoiding expensive trajectory generation. Validated across diverse Hamiltonian systems, our method in particular improves upon molecular dynamics simulations using machine-learned force fields (MLFF). Our models maintain comparable training and inference cost, but support significantly larger integration timesteps while trained directly on widely-available trajectory-free MLFF datasets.
zh_abstract: 对哈密顿系统进行长时间演化模拟时，数值积分稳定性所要求的小步长会限制计算效率。为突破这一限制，我们提出了学习哈密顿流映射的框架，通过预测选定时间跨度$Δt$内的平均相空间演化量，实现超越经典积分器稳定性限制的大步长稳定更新。为此，我们为时间平均哈密顿动力学建立了平均流一致性条件。与现有方法不同，该框架仅需基于独立的相空间样本进行训练，无需获取未来状态，从而避免了昂贵的轨迹生成成本。在多个哈密顿系统中的验证表明，我们的方法特别改进了基于机器学习力场（MLFF）的分子动力学模拟。所提出的模型在保持相近训练和推理成本的同时，支持显著增大积分步长，且能直接使用广泛存在的无轨迹MLFF数据集进行训练。

title: Elign: Equivariant Diffusion Model Alignment from Foundational Machine Learning Force Fields
abstract: Generative models for 3D molecular conformations must respect Euclidean symmetries and concentrate probability mass on thermodynamically favorable, mechanically stable structures. However, E(3)-equivariant diffusion models often reproduce biases from semi-empirical training data rather than capturing the equilibrium distribution of a high-fidelity Hamiltonian. While physics-based guidance can correct this, it faces two computational bottlenecks: expensive quantum-chemical evaluations (e.g., DFT) and the need to repeat such queries at every sampling step. We present Elign, a post-training framework that amortizes both costs. First, we replace expensive DFT evaluations with a faster, pretrained foundational machine-learning force field (MLFF) to provide physical signals. Second, we eliminate repeated run-time queries by shifting physical steering to the training phase. To achieve the second amortization, we formulate reverse diffusion as a reinforcement learning problem and introduce Force--Energy Disentangled Group Relative Policy Optimization (FED-GRPO) to fine-tune the denoising policy. FED-GRPO includes a potential-based energy reward and a force-based stability reward, which are optimized and group-normalized independently. Experiments show that Elign generates conformations with lower gold-standard DFT energies and forces, while improving stability. Crucially, inference remains as fast as unguided sampling, since no energy evaluations are required during generation.
zh_abstract: 面向三维分子构象的生成模型需遵循欧几里得对称性，并将概率质量集中于热力学有利、机械稳定的结构。然而，基于E(3)等变的扩散模型往往重现半经验训练数据中的偏差，而非捕捉高精度哈密顿量的平衡分布。虽然基于物理的引导能修正此问题，但其面临两个计算瓶颈：昂贵的量子化学计算（如DFT）以及需要在每个采样步骤重复此类查询。我们提出Elign——一种可分摊双重成本的后训练框架。首先，我们采用预训练的快速机器学习力场（MLFF）替代昂贵DFT计算以提供物理信号；其次，通过将物理引导移至训练阶段，消除运行时重复查询。为实现第二种成本分摊，我们将反向扩散构建为强化学习问题，并提出力-能量解耦分组相对策略优化（FED-GRPO）对去噪策略进行微调。FED-GRPO包含基于势函数的能量奖励和基于力的稳定性奖励，二者通过独立的分组归一化进行优化。实验表明，Elign生成的构象具有更低的金标准DFT能量与力，同时提升稳定性。关键的是，由于生成过程中无需能量评估，其推理速度与无引导采样相当。

title: Stripe antiferromagnetism and chiral superconductivity in tWSe$_2$
abstract: The layer-dependent Hamiltonians of parallel-stacked MoTe$_2$ and WSe$_2$ homobilayer moiré materials are topologically non-trivial, both in real space and in momentum space, and have been shown to support integer and fractional quantum anomalous Hall states, as well as antiferromagnetic and superconducting states. Here, we address the interplay between the antiferromagnetic and superconducting states observed in tWSe$_2$ when the Fermi level is close to its $M$-point van Hove singularity and the displacement field is small. We combine DFT with path-integrals to construct a minimal moiré band model that accounts for lattice relaxation along the $c$-axis and perform Hartree-Fock calculations to identify competing charge and spin ordered states. For tWSe$_2$ at $θ=2.7^\circ$ and $θ=3.65^\circ$, we find that a layer antiferromagnet (AFM), a stripe spin-density-wave (SDW), and the ferromagnetic Chern insulator (FM) are the primary candidates for the ground state at zero displacement field, and argue that antiferromagnetic spin interactions on the next neighbor bond $J_2$ can induce a time-reversal symmetry breaking chiral superconducting state.
zh_abstract: 平行堆垛MoTe$_{2}$与WSe$_{2}$同质双层莫尔材料的层间关联哈密顿量在实空间与动量空间均具有拓扑非平庸性，已被证实可支持整数与分数量子反常霍尔态、反铁磁态及超导态。本文针对tWSe$_{2}$体系中费米能级接近其$M$点范霍夫奇点且位移场较小时观测到的反铁磁态与超导态间相互作用展开研究。我们结合密度泛函理论(DFT)与路径积分方法，构建了考虑c轴晶格弛豫的最小莫尔能带模型，并通过哈特里-福克计算识别竞争性的电荷与自旋有序态。对于转角θ=2.7°与3.65°的tWSe$_{2}$体系，研究发现层间反铁磁体(AFM)、条状自旋密度波(SDW)及铁磁陈绝缘体(FM)是零位移场下基态的主要候选相，并论证次近邻键$J_2$上的反铁磁自旋相互作用可诱导出时间反演对称性破缺的手性超导态。
introduction:
Over the past decade, experimental and theoretical advances have 
demonstrated the richness of two-dimensional van der Waals moir\'{e} materials [] as a platform for tunable strongly correlated states, including, for example, Mott insulators [], Kondo lattice states [], unconventional magnets with tunable
exchange interactions [], and room-temperature
memristors []. Recently, observations of fractional Chern insulator (FCI) states in tMoTe$_2$ [] homobilayers
and rhombohedral pentalayer-graphene/hBN moir\'{e} materials [], and superconductivity (SC) in both tWSe$_2$ [] and
tMoTe$_2$ [] homobilayers
have promoted moir\'{e} physics to a new level of significance.  
In both graphene and TMD systems, many questions about 
the FCI states remain, in particular in 
explaining the moir\'{e} band filling factors and twist angles at which they appear and differences between materials. For example, while FCIs were observed experimentally in twisted homobilayer MoTe$_2$ (tMoTe$_2$) 
at the hole filling of $=-{3}$, no broken symmetries were observed at the 
particle-hole conjugate filling factor $=-{3}$, in
disagreement with theoretical predictions []. 
Another important challenge is to understand the nature of the 
superconducting states observed in both tWSe$_2$ [] and  tMoTe$_2$ [], whose non-superconducting phase diagrams appear to be very different. 

The emergence of a particular order in a system
is subject to a delicate interplay between 
band-topology and electronic correlations  []. 
To shed light on when one state is most likely to be preferred over others in TMD homobilayer moir\'e materials,
we perform full moir\'e continuum model mean-field calculations, concentrating on the case of a
moir\'e band hole filling factor $=1$.  
We perform our calculations using a continuum model [] 
constructed from density-functional theory (DFT) calculations 
that account for local structural relaxation along the $c$-axis.
The model is derived by building accurate Wannier tight-bind
deep_summary:
1. 核心创新: 该研究构建了一个结合晶格弛豫的极小化莫尔能带模型，揭示了tWSe$_2$中由次近邻反铁磁自旋相互作用$J_2$诱导产生时间反演对称性破缺的手性超导态的机制。
2. 关键结论: 在零位移场下，层状反铁磁体、条纹自旋密度波和铁磁陈绝缘体是tWSe$_2$在特定扭转角下的主要基态候选者；当费米能级接近M点范霍夫奇点且位移场较小时，反铁磁与超导态之间存在紧密的相互作用；次近邻反铁磁相互作用$J_2$是驱动时间反演对称性破缺手性超导态的关键因素。
3. 专家点评: 该工作通过将第一性原理与多体理论相结合，为理解TMD莫尔材料中竞争序的微观起源提供了重要视角，特别是将特定的磁涨落与非常规超导相关联，具有深刻的物理意义。然而，该模型对材料细节和相互作用的处理仍需进一步实验验证，且结论强烈依赖于模型参数，其普适性有待在其他莫尔体系中检验。

title: Global Plane Waves From Local Gaussians: Periodic Charge Densities in a Blink
abstract: We introduce ELECTRAFI, a fast, end-to-end differentiable model for predicting periodic charge densities in crystalline materials. ELECTRAFI constructs anisotropic Gaussians in real space and exploits their closed-form Fourier transforms to analytically evaluate plane-wave coefficients via the Poisson summation formula. This formulation delegates non-local and periodic behavior to analytic transforms, enabling reconstruction of the full periodic charge density with a single inverse FFT. By avoiding explicit real-space grid probing, periodic image summation, and spherical harmonic expansions, ELECTRAFI matches or exceeds state-of-the-art accuracy across periodic benchmarks while being up to $633 \times$ faster than the strongest competing method, reconstructing crystal charge densities in a fraction of a second. When used to initialize DFT calculations, ELECTRAFI reduces total DFT compute cost by up to ~20%, whereas slower charge density models negate savings due to high inference times. Our results show that accuracy and inference cost jointly determine end-to-end DFT speedups, and motivate our focus on efficiency.
zh_abstract: 本文提出ELECTRAFI——一种快速、端到端可微的晶体材料周期性电荷密度预测模型。该方法在实空间构建各向异性高斯函数，并利用其闭式傅里叶变换特性，通过泊松求和公式解析计算平面波系数。这种表述将非局域周期行为委托给解析变换处理，仅需单次逆快速傅里叶变换即可重建完整周期电荷密度。通过避免显式实空间网格探测、周期镜像求和与球谐函数展开，ELECTRAFI在保持与现有最优方法相当或更优精度的同时，重建晶体电荷密度的速度比最强竞争方法提升633倍（仅需零点几秒）。当用于初始化DFT计算时，ELECTRAFI可降低约20%的总DFT计算成本，而推理速度较慢的电荷密度模型则会因高延迟抵消这种优势。我们的研究表明，精度与推理成本共同决定了端到端DFT加速效果，这印证了我们对效率关注的必要性。

title: One-Dimensional Electronic States in a Moiré Superlattice of Twisted Bilayer WTe2
abstract: One-dimensional (1D) moiré superlattices provide a new route to engineering reduced-dimensional electronic states in van der Waals materials, yet their electronic structure and microscopic origin remain largely unexplored. Here, we investigate the structural relaxation and electronic properties of a 1D moiré superlattice formed in twisted bilayer 1T$'$-WTe$_2$ using density functional theory calculations, complemented by high-angle annular dark-field scanning transmission electron microscopy. We show that lattice relaxation strongly reconstructs the moiré stripes, leading to stacking-dependent stripe widths that are in excellent agreement with experimental observations. The relaxed structure hosts quasi-one-dimensional electronic bands near the Fermi level, characterized by strong dispersion along the stripe direction and nearly flat dispersion in the perpendicular direction. By comparing the full bilayer with isolated relaxed layers, we establish that these 1D electronic states are governed predominantly by an intralayer moiré potential induced by in-plane lattice relaxation, rather than by interlayer hybridization. We extract this position-dependent moiré potential directly from DFT calculations and construct an effective tight-binding model that reproduces both the band dispersion and the real-space localization of the electronic wave functions. Our results identify lattice relaxation as the key mechanism underlying 1D electronic states in 1D moiré superlattices. %and establish twisted bilayer WTe$_2$ as a promising platform for exploring emergent one-dimensional moiré physics. The framework developed here provides a unified theoretical basis for realizing and exploring one-dimensional moiré physics in a broad class of anisotropic two-dimensional materials.
zh_abstract: 一维莫尔超晶格为在范德瓦尔斯材料中调控低维电子态提供了新路径，然而其电子结构及微观起源仍待深入探索。本文结合密度泛函理论计算与大角度环形暗场扫描透射电子显微镜，研究了扭转双层1T$'$-WTe$_2$中形成的一维莫尔超晶格的结构弛豫与电子特性。研究表明，晶格弛豫会显著重构莫尔条纹，导致条纹宽度随堆叠方式变化，该结果与实验观测高度吻合。弛豫后的结构在费米能级附近承载准一维电子能带，其特征为沿条纹方向的强色散与垂直方向的近平坦色散。通过对比完整双层结构与分离弛豫层，我们证实这些一维电子态主要受面内晶格弛豫诱导的层内莫尔势调控，而非层间杂化作用。我们直接从DFT计算中提取这一随位置变化的莫尔势，并构建了能同时复现能带色散与电子波函数实空间局域化的有效紧束缚模型。本研究揭示了晶格弛豫作为一维莫尔超晶格中一维电子态的关键形成机制，所建立的理论框架为在各类各向异性二维材料中实现和探索一维莫尔物理提供了统一理论基础。
